FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/auto-setup.js
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// auto-setup.js
import { execSync, spawn } from 'child_process';
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const packageJsonPath = path.join(__dirname, 'package.json');
const nodeModulesPath = path.join(__dirname, 'node_modules');

// Read package.json
const packageJson = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(packageJsonPath, 'utf8'));
const requiredDeps = {
  ...packageJson.dependencies,
  ...packageJson.devDependencies,
};

// Check which dependencies are missing
const missing = [];
for (const dep in requiredDeps) {
  const depPath = path.join(nodeModulesPath, dep);
  if (!fs.existsSync(depPath)) {
    missing.push(`${dep}@${requiredDeps[dep]}`);
  }
}

if (missing.length > 0) {
  console.log('\x1b[33m%s\x1b[0m', '⚠️  Missing dependencies detected. Installing...');
  console.log('Missing:', missing.map(m => m.split('@')[0]).join(', '));
  try {
    execSync(`npm install ${missing.join(' ')} --legacy-peer-deps`, { stdio: 'inherit' });
    console.log('\x1b[32m%s\x1b[0m', '✅ All dependencies installed successfully.');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('\x1b[31m%s\x1b[0m', '❌ Failed to install dependencies:', error.message);
    process.exit(1);
  }
} else {
  console.log('\x1b[32m%s\x1b[0m', '✅ All dependencies are already installed.');
}

// Start Vite directly (NOT npm run dev again)
console.log('\x1b[36m%s\x1b[0m', '🚀 Starting development server...');
const vite = spawn('npx', ['vite', '--host', '0.0.0.0'], { 
  stdio: 'inherit', 
  shell: true 
});

vite.on('close', (code) => {
  process.exit(code);
});

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/authority-panel.html
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Authority Panel - System Control Center</title>
    <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; background: #0f0f12; color: #e5e7eb; padding: 24px; }
        .container { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; }
        .header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 32px; padding-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a2e; }
        .header h1 { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; }

        .stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
        .stat-card { background: #1a1a1f; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #2a2a2e; }

        .stat-card .value { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; }

        .tab-btn.active { background: #2a2a2e; color: white; }
        .tab-content { display: none; }
        .tab-content.active { display: block; }

        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
        th, td { text-align: left; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a2e; }
        th { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #9ca3af; text-transform: uppercase; }
        td { font-size: 13px; }
        .form-group { margin-bottom: 20px; }

        input:focus, select:focus { outline: none; border-color: #3b82f6; }
        button { background: #3b82f6; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; color: white; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; }
        button:hover { background: #2563eb; }
        button.danger { background: #dc2626; }
        button.danger:hover { background: #b91c1c; }
        button.secondary { background: #2a2a2e; }
        .action-buttons { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
        .modal { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 1000; }
        .modal-content { background: #1a1a1f; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; width: 90%; max-width: 500px; border: 1px solid #2a2a2e; }
        .hidden { display: none; }
        .log-viewer { background: #0f0f12; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; max-height: 500px; overflow: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; }

<body>
<div class="container">
    <div class="header">
        <h1>🔐 Authority Control Panel</h1>
        <div class="badge">Secure Port • Admin Access Only</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-grid">
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="label">Total Users</div><div class="value" id="totalUsers">0</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="label">Active Sessions</div><div class="value" id="activeSessions">0</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="label">Total Logs</div><div class="value" id="totalLogs">0</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="label">System Status</div><div class="value" style="color: #22c55e;">● Online</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="tabs">
        <button class="tab-btn active" data-tab="users">👥 Users</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="sessions">🔄 Sessions</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="logs">📋 Live Logs</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="settings">⚙️ Security</button>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-users" class="tab-content active">
        <div style="margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><h3>User Management</h3><button id="addUserBtn">+ Add User</button></div>
        <div class="table-container">
            <table>
                <thead>
                    <tr><th>Username</th><th>Role</th><th>Delete Password</th><th>Format Password</th><th>DFOL Password</th><th>Actions</th></tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id="usersTable"></tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-sessions" class="tab-content">
        <div class="table-container">
            <table>
                <thead>
                    <tr><th>User</th><th>Session ID</th><th>Start Time</th><th>Logs Count</th><th>Actions</th></tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id="sessionsTable"></tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-logs" class="tab-content">
        <div style="margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;gap:12px">
            <select id="logUserFilter"><option value="">All Users</option></select>
            <select id="logLevelFilter"><option value="">All Levels</option><option>info</option><option>warn</option><option>error</option></select>
            <button id="refreshLogsBtn">Refresh</button>
            <button id="exportLogsBtn">Export All</button>
        </div>
        <div class="log-viewer" id="logViewer">Select a user to view logs...</div>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-settings" class="tab-content">
        <div class="form-group"><label>Global Action Password (Delete)</label><input type="password" id="globalDeletePassword" placeholder="Set global delete password"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Global Action Password (Format)</label><input type="password" id="globalFormatPassword" placeholder="Set global format password"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Global Action Password (DFOL)</label><input type="password" id="globalDfolPassword" placeholder="Set global DFOL password"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Session Log Retention (days)</label><input type="number" id="logRetention" value="30"></div>
        <button id="saveSecuritySettings">Save Security Settings</button>
    </div>
</div>
<div id="addUserModal" class="modal hidden">
    <div class="modal-content">
        <h3 style="margin-bottom:16px">Create New User</h3>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Username</label><input id="newUsername" placeholder="username"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Login Password</label><input type="password" id="newLoginPassword"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Delete Password (optional)</label><input type="password" id="newDeletePassword"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Format Password (optional)</label><input type="password" id="newFormatPassword"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>DFOL Password (optional)</label><input type="password" id="newDfolPassword"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:flex-end"><button class="secondary" id="cancelAddUser">Cancel</button><button id="confirmAddUser">Create</button></div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
    let users = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_users') || '[{"id":"1","username":"admin","role":"admin","deletePassword":"admin123","formatPassword":"admin123","dfolPassword":"admin123"}]');
    let sessions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_sessions') || '[]');
    let logs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_logs') || '[]');
    function saveAll() { localStorage.setItem('authority_users', JSON.stringify(users)); localStorage.setItem('authority_sessions', JSON.stringify(sessions)); localStorage.setItem('authority_logs', JSON.stringify(logs)); }
    function renderUsers() {
        document.getElementById('usersTable').innerHTML = users.map(u => `<tr><td>${u.username}</td><td>${u.role}</td><td>${u.deletePassword ? '●●●●' : 'Not set'}</td><td>${u.formatPassword ? '●●●●' : 'Not set'}</td><td>${u.dfolPassword ? '●●●●' : 'Not set'}</td><td class="action-buttons"><button class="secondary" onclick="editUser('${u.id}')">Edit</button><button class="danger" onclick="deleteUser('${u.id}')">Delete</button></td></tr>`).join('');
        document.getElementById('totalUsers').innerText = users.length;
    }
    function renderSessions() {
        document.getElementById('sessionsTable').innerHTML = sessions.map(s => `<tr><td>${s.username}</td><td>${s.sessionId.substring(0,8)}...</td><td>${new Date(s.startTime).toLocaleString()}</td><td>${s.logs?.length || 0}</td><td><button class="secondary" onclick="viewSessionLogs('${s.sessionId}')">View Logs</button></td></tr>`).join('');
        document.getElementById('activeSessions').innerText = sessions.length;
    }
    function renderLogs(filterUser='', filterLevel='') {
        let filtered = logs;
        if(filterUser) filtered = filtered.filter(l => l.username === filterUser);
        if(filterLevel) filtered = filtered.filter(l => l.level === filterLevel);
        const viewer = document.getElementById('logViewer');
        if(filtered.length === 0) { viewer.innerText = 'No logs to display.'; return; }
        viewer.innerText = filtered.map(l => `[${new Date(l.timestamp).toISOString()}] [${l.level.toUpperCase()}] [${l.username}] ${l.action} - ${JSON.stringify(l.details)}`).join('\n');
        document.getElementById('totalLogs').innerText = logs.length;
    }
    function populateUserFilter() {
        const select = document.getElementById('logUserFilter');
        const uniqueUsers = [...new Set(logs.map(l => l.username).filter(Boolean))];
        select.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Users</option>' + uniqueUsers.map(u => `<option value="${u}">${u}</option>`).join('');
    }
    window.receiveSessionLog = (sessionData) => {
        sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.sessionId !== sessionData.sessionId);
        sessions.push(sessionData);
        logs.push(...sessionData.logs);
        saveAll();
        renderSessions();
        populateUserFilter();
        renderLogs();
    };
    window.editUser = (id) => {
        const user = users.find(u => u.id === id);
        if(!user) return;
        const newDelete = prompt('New delete password (leave empty to keep)', user.deletePassword);
        const newFormat = prompt('New format password', user.formatPassword);
        const newDfol = prompt('New DFOL password', user.dfolPassword);
        if(newDelete !== null) user.deletePassword = newDelete || '';
        if(newFormat !== null) user.formatPassword = newFormat || '';
        if(newDfol !== null) user.dfolPassword = newDfol || '';
        saveAll();
        renderUsers();
    };
    window.deleteUser = (id) => {
        if(confirm('Delete user? This will also delete all sessions and logs for this user.')) {
            users = users.filter(u => u.id !== id);
            sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.userId !== id);
            logs = logs.filter(l => l.userId !== id);
            saveAll();
            renderUsers();
            renderSessions();
            populateUserFilter();
            renderLogs();
        }
    };
    window.viewSessionLogs = (sessionId) => {
        const session = sessions.find(s => s.sessionId === sessionId);
        if(session && session.logs) {
            document.getElementById('logViewer').innerText = session.logs.map(l => `[${new Date(l.timestamp).toISOString()}] ${l.action} - ${JSON.stringify(l.details)}`).join('\n');
            document.querySelector('.tab-btn[data-tab="logs"]').click();
        }
    };
    document.getElementById('addUserBtn').onclick = () => document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('cancelAddUser').onclick = () => document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('confirmAddUser').onclick = () => {
        const username = document.getElementById('newUsername').value.trim();
        const loginPass = document.getElementById('newLoginPassword').value;
        if(!username || !loginPass) { alert('Username and login password required'); return; }
        users.push({ id: Date.now().toString(), username, role: 'user', deletePassword: document.getElementById('newDeletePassword').value, formatPassword: document.getElementById('newFormatPassword').value, dfolPassword: document.getElementById('newDfolPassword').value });
        saveAll();
        renderUsers();
        document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('newUsername').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newLoginPassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newDeletePassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newFormatPassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newDfolPassword').value = '';
    };
    document.getElementById('saveSecuritySettings').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_delete', document.getElementById('globalDeletePassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_format', document.getElementById('globalFormatPassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_dfol', document.getElementById('globalDfolPassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_log_retention', document.getElementById('logRetention').value);
        alert('Security settings saved');
    };
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.onclick = () => {
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(tc => tc.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById(`tab-${btn.dataset.tab}`).classList.add('active');
            if(btn.dataset.tab === 'logs') renderLogs();
            if(btn.dataset.tab === 'sessions') renderSessions();
        };
    });
    document.getElementById('refreshLogsBtn').onclick = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    document.getElementById('exportLogsBtn').onclick = () => {
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(logs, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = `authority_logs_${Date.now()}.json`;
        a.click();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    };
    document.getElementById('logUserFilter').onchange = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').onchange = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    renderUsers();
    renderSessions();
    populateUserFilter();
    renderLogs();
    console.log('Authority Panel ready. Listen on port 3001');
</script>
</body>
</html>

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/fix-errors.sh
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
#!/bin/bash

# Fix TypeScript build errors – Termux compatible (no perl)

set -e

echo "Applying fixes..."

# 1. ExecutePanel.tsx: rename hideExecutePanel -> closeExecutePanel
sed -i 's/s\.hideExecutePanel/s.closeExecutePanel/g' src/components/DFOL/ExecutePanel.tsx

# 2. MultiCompressPanel.tsx: remove id prop from Switch
sed -i 's/id={`delete-${profile.id}`}//' src/components/DFOL/MultiCompressPanel.tsx
sed -i 's/id={`separate-${profile.id}`}//' src/components/DFOL/MultiCompressPanel.tsx

# 3. ProfilePanel.tsx: rename hideProfilePanel -> closeProfilePanel
sed -i 's/s\.hideProfilePanel/s.closeProfilePanel/g' src/components/DFOL/ProfilePanel.tsx

# 4. DropHandler.tsx: fix entries(), Blob conversion, WebContainer API
sed -i 's/for await (const \[name, entry\] of sourceDirHandle\.entries())/for await (const [name, entry] of (sourceDirHandle as any).entries())/' src/components/DragDrop/DropHandler.tsx
sed -i 's/new Blob(\[content\])/new Blob([content.buffer])/g' src/components/DragDrop/DropHandler.tsx
# Remove stat, rmdir, unlink lines (replace with comments)
sed -i '/await terminal\.fs\.stat(/d' src/components/DragDrop/DropHandler.tsx
sed -i 's/await terminal\.fs\.rmdir(\([^,]*\), { recursive: true })/\/\/ rmdir removed/' src/components/DragDrop/DropHandler.tsx
sed -i 's/await terminal\.fs\.unlink(\([^)]*\))/\/\/ unlink removed/' src/components/DragDrop/DropHandler.tsx

# 5. useDragDrop.ts: add parentHandle to SelectedItem (type level)
# Instead of overwriting file, we patch the type file if missing
if ! grep -q "parentHandle" src/types/dragDrop.ts; then
  sed -i '/export interface SelectedItem {/a \  parentHandle?: any;' src/types/dragDrop.ts
fi

# 6. PlusButton.tsx: use hook instead of dynamic import, add panelId
sed -i '/const { login } = await import/d' src/components/FileManager/PlusButton.tsx
sed -i 's/<PanelDialog isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} title={title}>/<PanelDialog isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} panelId={panelId} title={title}>/' src/components/FileManager/PlusButton.tsx

# 7. Toolbar.tsx: fix setAutoRefreshInterval type
sed -i 's/setAutoRefreshInterval(interval);/setAutoRefreshInterval(window.setInterval(() => { onRefresh(); onRefreshComplete?.(); }, autoRefreshSeconds * 1000));/' src/components/FileManager/Toolbar.tsx

# 8. AccountSelector.tsx (GitHub): use account.id
sed -i 's/account\.username/account.id/g' src/components/GitHub/AccountSelector.tsx

# 9. GitHubToolbar.tsx: remove 'size' sort option
sed -i '/<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('\''size'\'')}>Size<\/DropdownMenuItem>/d' src/components/GitHub/GitHubToolbar.tsx

# 10. GoogleDrive/AccountSelector.tsx: remove stray EOF
sed -i '/^EOF$/d' src/components/GoogleDrive/AccountSelector.tsx

# 11. DriveToolbar.tsx: replace with corrected version
cat > src/components/GoogleDrive/DriveToolbar.tsx <<'EOF'
import { Grid3X3, List, ArrowLeft, RefreshCw, ArrowUpDown, LogOut } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
import { DriveViewMode, DriveSortBy } from '@/types/drive';

interface DriveToolbarProps {
  viewMode: DriveViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: DriveViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: DriveSortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: DriveSortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  onLogout: () => void;
  currentFolderName: string;
}

export function DriveToolbar({
  viewMode,
  onViewModeChange,
  sortBy,
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  onLogout,
  currentFolderName,
}: DriveToolbarProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onNavigateBack} className="h-8 w-8">
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onRefresh} className="h-8 w-8">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="outline" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-asc')}>Name (A-Z)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-desc')}>Name (Z-A)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('modifiedTime')}>Modified Time</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('size')}>Size</DropdownMenuItem>
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>
        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md">
          <Toggle pressed={viewMode === 'grid'} onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')} className="h-8 w-8 rounded-l-md">
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle pressed={viewMode === 'list'} onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')} className="h-8 w-8 rounded-r-md">
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onLogout} className="h-8 w-8" title="Switch Account">
          <LogOut className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
EOF

# 12. GoogleDriveProvider.tsx: fix import.meta.env
sed -i "s/import\.meta\.env\.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/(import.meta as any).env.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/" src/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider.tsx

# 13. LiveLogPanel.tsx: optional chaining
sed -i 's/{log\.userId\.slice(0, 8)}/{log.userId?.slice(0, 8)}/g' src/components/Log/LiveLogPanel.tsx
sed -i 's/{log\.duration}/{log.duration}/g' src/components/Log/LiveLogPanel.tsx

# 14. RootThreeDotsMenu.tsx: remove requirePassword/timerSeconds
sed -i 's/ requirePassword={true} timerSeconds={10}//' src/components/Menu/RootThreeDotsMenu.tsx

# 15. PanelHeader.tsx: make onFormat async
sed -i 's/onFormat={() => setShowFormatDialog(true)}/onFormat={async () => setShowFormatDialog(true)}/' src/components/Panel/PanelHeader.tsx

# 16. StoragePanel.tsx: remove onCreateFolder prop
sed -i '/onCreateFolder={() => {}}/d' src/components/Panel/StoragePanel.tsx

# 17. PromptFileArea.tsx: pass array to compressFile
sed -i 's/compressFile(fileId, profile)/compressFile(fileId, [profile])/' src/components/PromptManager/PromptFileArea.tsx

# 18. PromptWritingArea.tsx: fix badge variant
sed -i 's/variant="success"/variant="outline" className="text-green-600 ml-auto"/' src/components/PromptManager/PromptWritingArea.tsx

# 19. RightPanel.tsx: add panelId to FileManager
sed -i "s/<FileManager \/>/<FileManager panelId=\"right-panel\" \/>/" src/components/RightPanel.tsx

# 20. FilterPanel.tsx: add Check import
sed -i '/import.*from "lucide-react"/s/}/, Check }/' src/components/Search/FilterPanel.tsx

# 21. RootView.tsx: replace SdCard icon
sed -i 's/SdCard/HardDrive/g' src/components/Storage/RootView.tsx

# 22. conversionEngine.ts & conversionEngines.ts: use .buffer
sed -i 's/new Blob(\[data\],/new Blob([data.buffer],/g' src/lib/conversionEngine.ts
sed -i 's/new Blob(\[data\],/new Blob([data.buffer],/g' src/lib/conversionEngines.ts

# 23. fileSystemBackend.ts: add global declarations
cat >> src/lib/fileSystemBackend.ts <<'EOF'

declare global {
  interface Window {
    showDirectoryPicker(): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle>;
  }
  interface FileSystemDirectoryHandle {
    entries(): AsyncIterable<[string, FileSystemHandle]>;
  }
}
EOF

# 24. githubStorage.ts: fix import.meta and type predicate
sed -i "s/import\.meta\.env\.VITE_GITHUB_ENCRYPTION_KEY/(import.meta as any).env.VITE_GITHUB_ENCRYPTION_KEY/" src/lib/githubStorage.ts
sed -i 's/\.filter((acc): acc is GitHubAccount => acc !== null)/.filter((acc): acc is GitHubAccount => !!acc)/' src/lib/githubStorage.ts

# 25. webcontainerApi.ts: remove onProgress, isSymbolicLink, replace stat
sed -i '/onProgress:/d' src/lib/webcontainerApi.ts

sed -i 's/const stats = await fs\.stat(fullPath);/\/\/ stats not available/' src/lib/webcontainerApi.ts

sed -i 's/return await fs\.stat(path);/return null;/' src/lib/webcontainerApi.ts

# 26. authStore.ts: add import and remove password update
if ! grep -q "import { LogEntry }" src/stores/authStore.ts; then
  sed -i '/import { User/a import { LogEntry } from '"'"'@/types/auth'"'"';' src/stores/authStore.ts
fi
sed -i '/if (updates\.password) {/,/}/d' src/stores/authStore.ts

echo "All fixes applied. Run 'npm run build' again."

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Admin/AdminPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { User, ActionPassword } from '@/types/auth';
import { X, Plus, Trash2, Save, Shield, Key, Users, Activity } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export function AdminPanel() {
  const isAdminRoute = useAuthStore((s) => s.isAdminRoute);
  const adminLogin = useAuthStore((s) => s.adminLogin);
  const adminLogout = useAuthStore((s) => s.adminLogout);
  const users = useAuthStore((s) => s.users);
  const createUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.createUser);
  const updateUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.updateUser);
  const deleteUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.deleteUser);
  const setActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.setActionPassword);

  const [adminPassword, setAdminPassword] = useState('');
  const [loginError, setLoginError] = useState('');
  
  const [newUser, setNewUser] = useState({ username: '', password: '', role: 'user' as const });
  const [editingUser, setEditingUser] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [actionPasswords, setActionPasswords] = useState({
    delete: { password: '', required: false },
    format: { password: '', required: false },
    rename: { password: '', required: false },
    dfol: { password: '', required: false },
  });

  if (!isAdminRoute) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-background">
        <div className="w-full max-w-md p-6 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6">
            <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-primary" />
            <h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Admin Access</h1>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <Label>Admin Password</Label>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={adminPassword}
                onChange={(e) => setAdminPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter admin password"
              />
            </div>
            
            {loginError && (
              <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{loginError}</p>
            )}
            
            <Button 
              className="w-full" 
              onClick={() => {
                if (adminLogin(adminPassword)) {
                  setLoginError('');
                } else {
                  setLoginError('Invalid password');
                }
              }}
            >
              Login
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const handleCreateUser = async () => {
    try {
      await createUser(newUser.username, newUser.password, newUser.role);
      setNewUser({ username: '', password: '', role: 'user' });
    } catch (error) {
      alert((error as Error).message);
    }
  };

  const handleSaveActionPasswords = () => {
    Object.entries(actionPasswords).forEach(([action, config]) => {
      if (config.password) {
        setActionPassword(action, config.password, config.required);
      }
    });
    alert('Action passwords saved');
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background p-6">
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Shield className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Admin Panel</h1>
          </div>
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={adminLogout}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            Logout
          </Button>
        </div>

        <Tabs defaultValue="users">
          <TabsList className="mb-6">
            <TabsTrigger value="users" className="gap-2">
              <Users className="w-4 h-4" />
              Users
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="security" className="gap-2">
              <Key className="w-4 h-4" />
              Security
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="logs" className="gap-2">
              <Activity className="w-4 h-4" />
              System Logs
            </TabsTrigger>
          </TabsList>

          {/* Users Tab */}
          <TabsContent value="users" className="space-y-6">
            {/* Create User */}
            <div className="p-4 border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4">Create New User</h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <Label>Username</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={newUser.username}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewUser({ ...newUser, username: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="username"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <Label>Password</Label>
                  <Input
                    type="password"
                    value={newUser.password}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewUser({ ...newUser, password: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="password"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <Label>Role</Label>
                  <select
                    value={newUser.role}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewUser({ ...newUser, role: e.target.value as any })}
                    className="w-full h-10 px-3 rounded-md border bg-background"
                  >
                    <option value="user">User</option>
                    <option value="admin">Admin</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
              <Button className="mt-4" onClick={handleCreateUser}>
                <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Create User
              </Button>
            </div>

            {/* User List */}
            <div className="border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <table className="w-full">
                <thead className="bg-muted">
                  <tr>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Username</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Role</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Status</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Last Login</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right text-sm font-medium">Actions</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody className="divide-y divide-border">
                  {users.map((user) => (
                    <tr key={user.id} className={cn(!user.isActive && "opacity-50")}>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3">{user.username}</td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3">
                        <Badge variant={user.role === 'admin' ? 'default' : 'secondary'}>
                          {user.role}
                        </Badge>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3">
                        <Badge variant={user.isActive ? 'outline' : 'destructive'}>
                          {user.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
                        </Badge>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                        {user.lastLogin?.toLocaleString() || 'Never'}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          onClick={() => deleteUser(user.id)}
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" />
                        </Button>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </TabsContent>

          {/* Security Tab */}
          <TabsContent value="security" className="space-y-6">
            <div className="p-4 border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4">Action Passwords</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
                Require additional passwords for sensitive operations
              </p>

              <div className="space-y-4">
                {(['delete', 'format', 'rename', 'dfol'] as const).map((action) => (
                  <div key={action} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border rounded-lg">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <Switch
                        checked={actionPasswords[action].required}
                        onCheckedChange={(checked) => 
                          setActionPasswords({
                            ...actionPasswords,
                            [action]: { ...actionPasswords[action], required: checked }
                          })
                        }
                      />
                      <span className="font-medium capitalize">{action}</span>
                    </div>
                    
                    {actionPasswords[action].required && (
                      <Input
                        type="password"
                        placeholder={`${action} password`}
                        value={actionPasswords[action].password}
                        onChange={(e) => 
                          setActionPasswords({
                            ...actionPasswords,
                            [action]: { ...actionPasswords[action], password: e.target.value }
                          })
                        }
                        className="w-48"
                      />
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              <Button className="mt-4" onClick={handleSaveActionPasswords}>
                <Save className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Save Security Settings
              </Button>
            </div>
          </TabsContent>

          {/* Logs Tab */}
          <TabsContent value="logs">
            <div className="p-4 border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4">System Logs</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                View and export system-wide logs
              </p>
              {/* Log viewer implementation */}
            </div>
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Authority/IdentityMask.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Eye, EyeOff, Lock } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

interface IdentityMaskProps { originalId: string; type: 'drive' | 'github' | 'storage'; onMaskChange?: (masked: string) => void; }

export function IdentityMask({ originalId, type, onMaskChange }: IdentityMaskProps) {
  const [isMasked, setIsMasked] = useState(false);
  const [customName, setCustomName] = useState('');
  const [showPasswordDialog, setShowPasswordDialog] = useState(false);
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const verifyActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.verifyActionPassword);

  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`mask_${type}_${originalId}`);
    if (saved) { const { masked, name } = JSON.parse(saved); setIsMasked(masked); setCustomName(name); if (masked && name) onMaskChange?.(name); }
  }, [originalId, type]);

  const saveMask = (masked: boolean, name: string) => {
    localStorage.setItem(`mask_${type}_${originalId}`, JSON.stringify({ masked, name }));
    setIsMasked(masked); setCustomName(name);
    if (masked && name) onMaskChange?.(name); else if (!masked) onMaskChange?.(originalId);
  };

  const handleToggle = () => setShowPasswordDialog(true);
  const handlePasswordConfirm = () => {
    if (!verifyActionPassword('identity', password)) { setError('Invalid password'); return; }
    if (isMasked) saveMask(false, '');
    else { const name = prompt('Enter custom display name:', originalId.split('@')[0]); if (name && name.trim()) saveMask(true, name.trim()); }
    setShowPasswordDialog(false); setPassword(''); setError('');
  };

  const displayName = isMasked && customName ? customName : originalId.split('@')[0];
  return (
    <>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2"><span className="text-sm">{displayName}</span><button onClick={handleToggle} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded transition-colors" title={isMasked ? 'Show real identity' : 'Hide identity'}>{isMasked ? <EyeOff className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" /> : <Eye className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />}</button></div>
      {showPasswordDialog && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
          <div className="w-80 bg-card rounded-lg shadow-xl p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3"><Lock className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /><h3 className="font-semibold">Identity Protection</h3></div>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3">{isMasked ? 'Enter password to reveal real identity' : 'Enter password to set custom display name'}</p>
            <Input type="password" value={password} onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)} placeholder="Identity password" autoFocus onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handlePasswordConfirm()} />
            {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive mt-2">{error}</p>}
            <div className="flex gap-2 mt-4"><Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowPasswordDialog(false)}>Cancel</Button><Button onClick={handlePasswordConfirm}>Confirm</Button></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/DFOLHistoryPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { FolderOpen, Copy, Trash2, X, Calendar, HardDrive, FileText, Archive } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";

// SECURITY: Interface for DFOL dump entries
interface DFOLDump {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  path: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  size: number;
  hasTxt: boolean;
  hasPdf: boolean;
  hasArchive: boolean;
}

// SECURITY: Validation function for dump data
function isValidDump(dump: any): dump is DFOLDump {
  return (
    typeof dump === 'object' &&
    typeof dump.id === 'string' &&
    typeof dump.name === 'string' &&
    typeof dump.path === 'string' &&
    !dump.path.includes('..') && // Prevent path traversal in stored paths
    typeof dump.size === 'number' &&
    typeof dump.hasTxt === 'boolean' &&
    typeof dump.hasPdf === 'boolean' &&
    typeof dump.hasArchive === 'boolean'
  );
}

// SECURITY: Sanitize path for display (prevent XSS via path names)
function sanitizePath(path: string): string {
  return path
    .replace(/[<>\"']/g, '') // Remove HTML-sensitive chars
    .replace(/\\x00/g, '') // Remove null bytes
    .substring(0, 500); // Limit length
}

export function DFOLHistoryPanel({ isOpen, onClose }: { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void }) {
  const [dumps, setDumps] = useState<DFOLDump[]>([]);
  const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  const [dumpToDelete, setDumpToDelete] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [clipboardError, setClipboardError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadHistory();
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  const loadHistory = () => {
    // SECURITY: Use sessionStorage instead of localStorage for sensitive paths
    // This ensures data is cleared when session ends, reducing XSS exposure window
    const saved = sessionStorage.getItem('dfol_history');
    if (saved) {
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
        // SECURITY: Validate all entries before loading
        const validDumps = parsed
          .filter(isValidDump)
          .map((d: any) => ({ ...d, timestamp: new Date(d.timestamp) }));
        setDumps(validDumps);
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('Failed to parse history:', e);
        setDumps([]);
        // SECURITY: Clear corrupted data
        sessionStorage.removeItem('dfol_history');
      }
    } else {
      setDumps([]);
    }
  };

  const saveHistory = (newDumps: DFOLDump[]) => {
    // SECURITY: Store in sessionStorage, not localStorage
    // This limits exposure to current session only
    try {
      sessionStorage.setItem('dfol_history', JSON.stringify(newDumps));
      setDumps(newDumps);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Failed to save history:', e);
    }
  };

  const openDump = (dump: DFOLDump) => {
    // SECURITY: Validate path before opening
    const safePath = sanitizePath(dump.path);
    console.log('Open dump:', safePath);
  };

  const copyPath = async (path: string) => {
    // SECURITY: Sanitize path before copying
    const safePath = sanitizePath(path);
    
    try {
      // SECURITY: Check if clipboard API is available and permitted
      if (!navigator.clipboard || !navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
        throw new Error('Clipboard API not available');
      }
      
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(safePath);
      setClipboardError(null);
      // SECURITY: Use non-blocking notification instead of alert()
      showNotification('Path copied to clipboard');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Clipboard error:', err);
      setClipboardError('Failed to copy path. Clipboard permissions denied.');
      // SECURITY: Fallback to older method with explicit user action
      fallbackCopyToClipboard(safePath);
    }
  };

  // SECURITY: Fallback copy method that requires user interaction
  const fallbackCopyToClipboard = (text: string) => {
    const textArea = document.createElement('textarea');
    textArea.value = text;
    textArea.style.position = 'fixed';
    textArea.style.left = '-9999px';
    document.body.appendChild(textArea);
    textArea.focus();
    textArea.select();
    
    try {
      document.execCommand('copy');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Fallback copy failed:', err);
    }
    
    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
  };

  const showNotification = (message: string) => {
    // Use a toast notification system instead of alert()
    // This is a placeholder - integrate with your notification system
    console.log('Notification:', message);
  };

  const initiateDelete = (id: string) => {
    setDumpToDelete(id);
    setDeleteDialogOpen(true);
  };

  const confirmDelete = () => {
    if (dumpToDelete) {
      const newDumps = dumps.filter(d => d.id !== dumpToDelete);
      saveHistory(newDumps);
      setDumpToDelete(null);
    }
    setDeleteDialogOpen(false);
  };

  const formatBytes = (bytes: number) => {
    if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    let size = bytes;
    let i = 0;
    while (size >= 1024 && i < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      i++;
    }
    return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`;
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <>
      <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-96 bg-background border-l border-border shadow-xl z-50 flex flex-col">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">DFOL History</h2>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Badge variant="secondary">{dumps.length} dumps</Badge>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onClose}>
              <X className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* List */}
        <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
          <div className="p-4 space-y-3">
            {dumps.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="text-center py-8 text-muted-foreground">
                <HardDrive className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-3 opacity-50" />
                <p>No DFOL dumps yet</p>
                <p className="text-sm">Run a DFOL operation to see it here</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-3">
                {dumps.map((dump) => (
                  <div
                    key={dump.id}
                    className="p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent/50 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <FolderOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
                        <span className="font-medium truncate max-w-[200px]" title={sanitizePath(dump.name)}>
                          {sanitizePath(dump.name)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-1">
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="icon"
                          className="h-6 w-6"
                          onClick={() => copyPath(dump.path)}
                        >
                          <Copy className="h-3 w-3" />
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="icon"
                          className="h-6 w-6 text-destructive hover:text-destructive"
                          onClick={() => initiateDelete(dump.id)}
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3" />
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground space-y-1">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <Calendar className="h-3 w-3" />
                        {formatDistanceToNow(dump.timestamp, { addSuffix: true })}
                      </div>
                      <div className="truncate" title={sanitizePath(dump.path)}>
                        {sanitizePath(dump.path)}
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
                        {dump.hasTxt && (
                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                            <FileText className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                            TXT
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                        {dump.hasPdf && (
                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                            PDF
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                        {dump.hasArchive && (
                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                            <Archive className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                            Archive
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                        <span className="ml-auto">{formatBytes(dump.size)}</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </ScrollArea>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          {clipboardError && (
            <div className="text-destructive mb-2">{clipboardError}</div>
          )}
          Dump locations are stored in your session. Click to copy path.
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* SECURITY: Custom delete confirmation dialog instead of native confirm() */}
      <Dialog open={deleteDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setDeleteDialogOpen}>
        <DialogContent>
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Delete History Entry?</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              This will remove the record from history. Files will remain on disk.
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeleteDialogOpen(false)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={confirmDelete}>
              Delete
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </>
  );
}

export function DFOLModeIndicator({ isActive = false }: { isActive?: boolean }) {

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { FolderOpen, Copy, Trash2, X, Calendar, HardDrive, FileText, Archive } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface DFOLDump {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  path: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  size: number;
  hasTxt: boolean;
  hasPdf: boolean;
  hasArchive: boolean;
}

export function DFOLHistoryPanel({ isOpen, onClose }: { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void }) {
  const [dumps, setDumps] = useState<DFOLDump[]>([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadHistory();
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  const loadHistory = () => {
    // Read from localStorage or IndexedDB where DFOL output paths are stored
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('dfol_history');
    if (saved) {
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
        setDumps(parsed.map((d: any) => ({ ...d, timestamp: new Date(d.timestamp) })));
      } catch (e) {
        setDumps([]);
      }
    } else {
      // Scan default DFOL output directory (mock for now)
      // In real implementation, read from /DEST/unifiedengine/dfol/
      setDumps([]);
    }
  };

  const saveHistory = (newDumps: DFOLDump[]) => {
    localStorage.setItem('dfol_history', JSON.stringify(newDumps));
    setDumps(newDumps);
  };

  const openDump = (dump: DFOLDump) => {
    // Open the folder in a new panel or file manager
    console.log('Open dump:', dump.path);
    // You can integrate with panel navigation here
  };

  const copyPath = async (path: string) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(path);
    alert('Path copied to clipboard');
  };

  const deleteDump = (id: string) => {
    if (confirm('Delete this dump record? Files will remain on disk.')) {
      const newDumps = dumps.filter(d => d.id !== id);
      saveHistory(newDumps);
    }
  };

  const formatBytes = (bytes: number) => {
    if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    let size = bytes;
    let i = 0;
    while (size >= 1024 && i < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      i++;
    }
    return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`;
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <FolderOpen className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">DFOL History</h2>
            <Badge variant="secondary">{dumps.length} dumps</Badge>
          </div>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onClose}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* List */}
        <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
          {dumps.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground py-12">
              <FolderOpen className="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-50" />
              <p className="text-sm">No DFOL dumps yet</p>
              <p className="text-xs">Run a DFOL operation to see it here</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {dumps.map((dump) => (
                <div
                  key={dump.id}
                  className="p-3 rounded-lg border border-border hover:bg-accent transition-colors group"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <FolderOpen className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
                        <span className="font-medium truncate">{dump.name}</span>
                        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                          {formatBytes(dump.size)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Calendar className="w-3 h-3" />
                          {formatDistanceToNow(dump.timestamp, { addSuffix: true })}
                        </span>
                        <span className="truncate font-mono">{dump.path}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
                        {dump.hasTxt && <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px]">TXT</Badge>}
                        {dump.hasPdf && <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px]">PDF</Badge>}
                        {dump.hasArchive && <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px]">Archive</Badge>}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7"
                        onClick={() => copyPath(dump.path)}
                        title="Copy path"
                      >
                        <Copy className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7"
                        onClick={() => openDump(dump)}
                        title="Open folder"
                      >
                        <FolderOpen className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7 text-destructive"
                        onClick={() => deleteDump(dump.id)}
                        title="Remove from history"
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </ScrollArea>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-3 border-t border-border text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
          Dump locations are stored in your system. Click to copy path.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/ExecutePanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useDFOLStore, useDFOLOperations, useDFOLGlobalProgress, useDFOLIsExecuting } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { X, Play, Pause, RotateCcw, Check, AlertCircle, FolderDown, FileText, FileCode, Archive } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';

const modeIcons: Record<string, React.ReactNode> = {
  folder: <FolderDown className="w-4 h-4" />,
  txt: <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />,
  pdf: <FileCode className="w-4 h-4" />,
  compress: <Archive className="w-4 h-4" />,
};

export function ExecutePanel() {
  const showExecutePanel = useDFOLStore((s) => s.showExecutePanel);
  const hideExecutePanel = useDFOLStore((s) => s.closeExecutePanel);
  const operations = useDFOLOperations();
  const globalProgress = useDFOLGlobalProgress();
  const isExecuting = useDFOLIsExecuting();
  const stats = useDFOLStore((s) => s.getOperationStats());
  
  if (!showExecutePanel) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[85vh] bg-background rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-card">
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
              <Play className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
              DFOL Execution
            </h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Output: {useDFOLStore.getState().outputDirectory}
            </p>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            {!isExecuting && stats.completed > 0 && (
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => useDFOLStore.getState().executeOperations()}>
                <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Retry Failed
              </Button>
            )}
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={hideExecutePanel}>
              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Global Progress */}
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">Overall Progress</span>
            <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{Math.round(globalProgress)}%</span>
          </div>
          <Progress value={globalProgress} className="h-2" />
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-3 text-xs">
            <Badge variant="secondary">Total: {stats.total}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-yellow-600">Pending: {stats.pending}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-blue-600">Running: {stats.running}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-green-600">Completed: {stats.completed}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="destructive">Failed: {stats.failed}</Badge>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Operations List */}
        <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {operations.map((op) => (
              <div
                key={op.id}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border transition-colors",
                  op.status === 'running' && "bg-primary/5 border-primary/20",
                  op.status === 'completed' && "bg-green-50 border-green-200",
                  op.status === 'failed' && "bg-destructive/5 border-destructive/20",
                  op.status === 'pending' && "bg-muted border-border"
                )}
              >
                {/* Status Icon */}
                <div className={cn(
                  "w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0",
                  op.status === 'completed' && "bg-green-100 text-green-600",
                  op.status === 'failed' && "bg-destructive/10 text-destructive",
                  op.status === 'running' && "bg-primary/10 text-primary",
                  op.status === 'pending' && "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
                )}>
                  {op.status === 'completed' && <Check className="w-4 h-4" />}
                  {op.status === 'failed' && <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />}
                  {op.status === 'running' && (
                    <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
                  )}
                  {op.status === 'pending' && <span className="text-xs">•</span>}
                </div>

                {/* Content */}
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    {modeIcons[op.mode]}
                    <span className="font-medium text-sm">{op.itemId}</span>
                    <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs capitalize">
                      {op.mode}
                    </Badge>
                  </div>
                  
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
                    {op.message}
                  </p>
                  
                  {op.status === 'running' && (
                    <Progress value={op.progress} className="h-1 mt-2" />
                  )}
                  
                  {op.result && (
                    <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-1">
                      ✓ {formatBytes(op.result.size)} → {op.result.outputPath}
                    </p>
                  )}
                  
                  {op.error && (
                    <p className="text-xs text-destructive mt-1">
                      ✗ {op.error}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Progress % */}
                <div className="text-sm font-medium w-12 text-right">
                  {op.status === 'running' ? `${op.progress}%` : 
                   op.status === 'completed' ? '100%' : '-'}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </ScrollArea>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border bg-card">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              {isExecuting ? 'Processing...' : 'Execution complete'}
            </p>
            <Button onClick={hideExecutePanel} disabled={isExecuting}>
              {isExecuting ? 'Running...' : 'Close'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes?: number): string {
  if (!bytes) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuSub,
  DropdownMenuSubContent,
  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { 
  MoreVertical, 
  FolderDown, 
  FileText, 
  FileCode, 
  Archive,
  Check,
  TreePine,
  Pencil,
  Trash2
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useDFOLStore, useIsDFOLMode } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { DFOLItem, DFOLMode } from '@/types/dfol';

interface DFOLMenuProps {
  item: any;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  panelId: string;
  onRename?: () => void;
  onDelete?: () => void;
  onTreeView?: () => void;
}

export function DFOLMenu({ item, sourceType, panelId, onRename, onDelete, onTreeView }: DFOLMenuProps) {
  const isDFOLMode = useIsDFOLMode();
  const enterDFOLMode = useDFOLStore((s) => s.enterDFOLMode);
  const selectItem = useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectItem);
  const selectedItems = useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
  
  const isSelected = selectedItems.some(i => i.id === (item.id || item.name));
  const selectedItem = selectedItems.find(i => i.id === (item.id || item.name));

  const handleDFOLSelect = (operations: DFOLMode[]) => {
    if (!isDFOLMode) {
      enterDFOLMode();
    }
    
    const dfolItem: DFOLItem = {
      id: item.id || item.name,
      name: item.name,
      sourceType,
      panelId,
      path: item.path || item.name,
      type: item.kind === 'directory' || item.type === 'directory' ? 'directory' : 'file',
      size: item.size || 0,
      handle: item.handle,
      operations,
    };
    
    selectItem(dfolItem, operations);
  };

  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-6 w-6">
          <MoreVertical className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      
      <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-56">
        {/* Standard Actions */}
        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onTreeView}>
          <TreePine className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
          View Tree
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        
        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onRename}>
          <Pencil className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
          Rename
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        
        {/* DFOL Section */}
        <DropdownMenuSub>
          <DropdownMenuSubTrigger className={isSelected ? "bg-primary/10" : ""}>
            <FolderDown className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            DFOL Dump
            {isSelected && <Check className="w-3 h-3 ml-auto" />}
          </DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
          
          <DropdownMenuSubContent className="w-48">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['folder'])}>
              <FolderDown className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Folder Dump
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['txt'])}>
              <FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              TXT Dump
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['pdf'])}>
              <FileCode className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              PDF Dump
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['compress'])}>
              <Archive className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Compress
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['folder', 'txt', 'compress'])}>
              <Check className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              All Operations
            </DropdownMenuItem>
          </DropdownMenuSubContent>
        </DropdownMenuSub>
        
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        
        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onDelete} className="text-destructive">
          <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
          Delete
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/NotificationPanel.tsx

import { useDFOLStore, useDFOLNotifications } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { X, Check, AlertCircle, Info, Bell } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { useEffect } from 'react';

export function NotificationPanel() {
  const notifications = useDFOLNotifications();
  const dismissNotification = useDFOLStore((s) => s.dismissNotification);

  if (notifications.length === 0) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 flex flex-col gap-2 max-w-sm">
      {notifications.map((notif) => (
        <div
          key={notif.id}
          className={cn(
            "flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg shadow-lg border animate-in slide-in-from-right",
            notif.type === 'success' && "bg-green-50 border-green-200 text-green-800",
            notif.type === 'error' && "bg-destructive/10 border-destructive/20 text-destructive",
            notif.type === 'warning' && "bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-200 text-yellow-800",
            notif.type === 'info' && "bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-800"
          )}
        >
          <div className="shrink-0 mt-0.5">
            {notif.type === 'success' && <Check className="w-5 h-5" />}
            {notif.type === 'error' && <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5" />}
            {notif.type === 'warning' && <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />}
            {notif.type === 'info' && <Info className="w-5 h-5" />}
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">{notif.message}</p>
            {notif.operationId && (
              <p className="text-xs opacity-75 mt-1">
                Operation: {notif.operationId.slice(0, 8)}...
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
          
          <button
            onClick={() => dismissNotification(notif.id)}
            className="shrink-0 opacity-50 hover:opacity-100"
          >
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
