FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/CreateFolderDialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface CreateFolderDialogProps {
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function CreateFolderDialog({ open, onOpenChange, panelId }: CreateFolderDialogProps) {
  const [folderName, setFolderName] = useState('');
  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
  const panel = usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(panelId));

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    if (!folderName.trim() || !panel?.handle) return;
    
    setIsCreating(true);
    try {
      await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(panel.handle, folderName.trim());
      // Refresh will happen via parent component
      onOpenChange(false);
      setFolderName('');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to create folder:', err);
    } finally {
      setIsCreating(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-md">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>Create New Folder</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            Enter a name for the new folder.
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        
        <div className="py-4">
          <Input
            placeholder="Folder name"
            value={folderName}
            onChange={(e) => setFolderName(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCreate();
            }}
            autoFocus
          />
        </div>

        <DialogFooter>
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
            Cancel
          </Button>
          <Button 
            onClick={handleCreate} 
            disabled={!folderName.trim() || isCreating}
          >
            {isCreating ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}
          </Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/FileGrid.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { File, FolderOpen, Pencil, Home } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DragDropItem } from '../DragDrop/DragDropItem';
import { InlineRenameInput } from '../Rename/InlineRenameInput';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useState } from 'react';

interface FileGridProps {
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function FileGrid({ entries, onNavigate, panelId }: FileGridProps) {
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  const setPanelHandle = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelHandle);
  const panel = usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(panelId));

  const handleClick = (entry: FileSystemEntry) => {
    if (renamingId) return;
    if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
      onNavigate(entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry);
    }
  };

  const startRename = (entry: FileSystemEntry, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setRenamingId(entry.name);
  };

  const handleRenameComplete = () => {
    setRenamingId(null);
  };

  const handleDoubleClickHome = () => {
    // Double-click on any folder icon goes to top-level root for the current source
    if (panel) {
      if (panel.source === 'storage') {
        setPanelHandle(panelId, null);
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      } else if (panel.source === 'drive') {
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
        // Also clear active account? No, stay in account list view
      } else if (panel.source === 'github') {
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      } else if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
        // For terminal, root is '/'
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      }
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-3 p-3">
      {entries.map((entry) => {
        const isRenaming = renamingId === entry.name;
        
        return (
          <DragDropItem
            key={entry.name}
            item={entry}
            id={entry.name}
            sourceType="storage"
            panelId={panelId}
            className="group flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all text-left relative"
          >
            {isRenaming ? (
              <div className="w-full">
                <InlineRenameInput
                  item={{
                    id: entry.name,
                    name: entry.name,
                    path: entry.handle?.name || entry.name,
                    sourceType: 'storage',
                    panelId,
                    handle: entry.handle,
                    isDirectory: entry.kind === 'directory',
                  }}
                  onComplete={handleRenameComplete}
                />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Rename button */}
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => startRename(entry, e)}
                  className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-accent rounded transition-opacity"
                >
                  <Pencil className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                </button>

                {/* Double-click home indicator */}
                <div className="absolute top-2 left-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100">
                  <Home className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                </div>

                <div 
                  className="mb-2 text-primary group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"
                  onClick={() => handleClick(entry)}
                  onDoubleClick={handleDoubleClickHome}
                >
                  {entry.kind === 'directory' ? (
                    <FolderOpen className="w-10 h-10" />
                  ) : (
                    <File className="w-10 h-10" />
                  )}
                </div>
                
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate w-full text-center" title={entry.name}>
                  {entry.name}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                  {entry.kind === 'file' ? formatFileSize(entry.size) : 'Folder'}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  {formatDistanceToNow(entry.lastModified, { addSuffix: true })}
                </p>
              </>
            )}
          </DragDropItem>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/PlusButton.tsx.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Plus, FolderPlus, FilePlus, UserPlus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { webcontainerApi } from '@/lib/webcontainerApi';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';

interface PlusButtonProps {
  panelId: string;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  currentPath: string;
  isRoot: boolean; // true if at root level (account list for drive/github, mounts for storage)
  handle?: any; // For storage
  accountId?: string; // For drive/github (active account)
  onSuccess?: () => void;
}

interface ActionOption {
  type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount';
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  allowed: boolean;
}

export function PlusButton({ panelId, sourceType, currentPath, isRoot, handle, accountId, onSuccess }: PlusButtonProps) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [actionType, setActionType] = useState<'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount' | null>(null);
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const getOptions = (): ActionOption[] => {
    const options: ActionOption[] = [];

    // Root level: Drive or GitHub can add account
    if (isRoot && (sourceType === 'drive' || sourceType === 'github')) {
      options.push({ type: 'addAccount', label: 'Add Account', icon: UserPlus, allowed: true });
    }

    // Non-root: creation options based on source and permissions
    if (!isRoot) {
      // Storage: always allow if handle exists
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      // Drive: inside folder, allow folder creation
      if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
      }
      // GitHub: inside repo, allow folder and file creation
      if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      // Terminal: allow folder and file (WebContainer allows write)
      if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
    }

    return options;
  };

  const options = getOptions();
  const allowedOptions = options.filter(opt => opt.allowed);
  if (allowedOptions.length === 0) return null;

  const handleActionClick = (type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount') => {
    if (type === 'addAccount') {
      executeAddAccount();
    } else {
      setActionType(type);
      setIsOpen(true);
    }
  };

  const executeAddAccount = async () => {
    if (sourceType === 'drive') {
      // Trigger Google OAuth login (will add account via store)
      const { login } = useGoogleDriveAuth();
      await login();
      onSuccess?.();
    } else if (sourceType === 'github') {
      // Open inline form for username/token
      const username = prompt('GitHub username:');
      const token = prompt('Personal Access Token (needs repo and read:user scopes):');
      if (username && token) {
        try {
          await useGitHubStore.getState().addAccount(username, token);
          onSuccess?.();
        } catch (err) {
          alert('Failed to add account: ' + (err as Error).message);
        }
      }
    }
  };

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    if (!name.trim()) {
      setError('Name is required');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        if (actionType === 'folder') {
          await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(handle, name.trim());
        } else {
          const emptyBlob = new Blob([''], { type: 'text/plain' });
          await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(handle, name.trim(), emptyBlob);
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId) {
        const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
        if (account) {
          const parentId = currentPath === '/' ? 'root' : currentPath.split('/').pop();
          await createDriveFolder(account.accessToken, parentId || 'root', name.trim());
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId) {
        const account = useGitHubStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
        if (account) {
          await createGitHubItem(account.token, accountId, currentPath, name.trim(), actionType === 'folder');
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
        if (terminal) {
          const fullPath = currentPath === '/' ? `/${name.trim()}` : `${currentPath}/${name.trim()}`;
          if (actionType === 'folder') {
            await terminal.fs.mkdir(fullPath);
          } else {
            await terminal.fs.writeFile(fullPath, '');
          }
        }
      }
      setIsOpen(false);
      setName('');
      setActionType(null);
      onSuccess?.();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Show single button if only one option, otherwise dropdown
  const showMenu = allowedOptions.length > 1;

  if (!showMenu) {
    const opt = allowedOptions[0];
    return (
      <>
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="icon"
          className="h-8 w-8"
          onClick={() => handleActionClick(opt.type)}
          title={opt.label}
        >
          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
        <CreationDialog
          isOpen={isOpen}
          onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
          type={actionType}
          name={name}
          setName={setName}
          isLoading={isLoading}
          error={error}
          onCreate={handleCreate}
        />
      </>
    );
  }

  return (
    <>
      <div className="relative group">
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
        <div className="absolute right-0 bottom-full mb-1 hidden group-hover:block bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg z-20 min-w-[140px]">
          {allowedOptions.map(opt => (
            <button
              key={opt.type}
              onClick={() => handleActionClick(opt.type)}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              <opt.icon className="w-4 h-4" />
              {opt.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
      <CreationDialog
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
        type={actionType}
        name={name}
        setName={setName}
        isLoading={isLoading}
        error={error}
        onCreate={handleCreate}
      />
    </>
  );
}

// Helper dialog component
function CreationDialog({ isOpen, onClose, type, name, setName, isLoading, error, onCreate }: any) {
  if (!isOpen || !type) return null;
  const title = type === 'folder' ? 'Create Folder' : 'Create File';
  const placeholder = type === 'folder' ? 'Folder name' : 'File name (with extension)';
  return (
    <PanelDialog isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} panelId="current" title={title}>
      <div className="space-y-3">
        <div>
          <Label>{placeholder}</Label>
          <Input
            value={name}
            onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
            placeholder={type === 'folder' ? 'MyFolder' : 'file.txt'}
            autoFocus
            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && onCreate()}
          />
        </div>
        {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
        <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} disabled={isLoading}>Cancel</Button>
          <Button onClick={onCreate} disabled={isLoading}>
            {isLoading ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </PanelDialog>
  );
}

// Helper for Drive folder creation
async function createDriveFolder(accessToken: string, parentId: string, name: string) {
  const metadata = {
    name,
    mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder',
    parents: [parentId],
  };
  const res = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(metadata),
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to create Drive folder');
}

// Helper for GitHub item creation
async function createGitHubItem(token: string, owner: string, path: string, name: string, isFolder: boolean) {
  const octokit = new (await import('@octokit/rest')).Octokit({ auth: token });
  // Extract repo from path (format: /github/username/repo/path...)
  const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  const repo = parts[1]; // after /github/username/
  const repoPath = parts.slice(2).join('/');
  const fullPath = repoPath ? `${repoPath}/${name}` : name;
  if (isFolder) {
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner,
      repo,
      path: `${fullPath}/.gitkeep`,
      message: `Create folder ${name}`,
      content: Buffer.from('').toString('base64'),
    });
  } else {
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner,
      repo,
      path: fullPath,
      message: `Create file ${name}`,
      content: Buffer.from('').toString('base64'),
    });
  }
}

// Import for Google login (adjust based on your provider)
import { useGoogleDriveAuth } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider';

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { File, FolderOpen, Pencil } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DragDropItem } from '../DragDrop/DragDropItem';
import { InlineRenameInput } from '../Rename/InlineRenameInput';
import { useRenameStore } from '@/stores/renameStore';
import { useState } from 'react';

interface FileGridProps {
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function FileGrid({ entries, onNavigate, panelId }: FileGridProps) {
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handleClick = (entry: FileSystemEntry) => {
    if (renamingId) return;
    
    if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
      onNavigate(entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry);
    }
  };

  const startRename = (entry: FileSystemEntry, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setRenamingId(entry.name);
  };

  const handleRenameComplete = () => {
    setRenamingId(null);
  };

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-3 p-3">
      {entries.map((entry) => {
        const isRenaming = renamingId === entry.name;
        
        return (
          <DragDropItem
            key={entry.name}
            item={entry}
            id={entry.name}
            sourceType="storage"
            panelId={panelId}
            className="group flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all text-left relative"
          >
            {isRenaming ? (
              <div className="w-full">
                <InlineRenameInput
                  item={{
                    id: entry.name,
                    name: entry.name,
                    path: entry.handle?.name || entry.name,
                    sourceType: 'storage',
                    panelId,
                    handle: entry.handle,
                  }}
                  onComplete={handleRenameComplete}
                />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Rename button */}
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => startRename(entry, e)}
                  className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-accent rounded transition-opacity"
                >
                  <Pencil className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                </button>

                <div 
                  className="mb-2 text-primary group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"
                  onClick={() => handleClick(entry)}
                >
                  {entry.kind === 'directory' ? (
                    <FolderOpen className="w-10 h-10" />
                  ) : (
                    <File className="w-10 h-10" />
                  )}
                </div>
                
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate w-full text-center" title={entry.name}>
                  {entry.name}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                  {entry.kind === 'file' ? formatFileSize(entry.size) : 'Folder'}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  {formatDistanceToNow(entry.lastModified, { addSuffix: true })}
                </p>
              </>
            )}
          </DragDropItem>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/PlusButton.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Plus, FolderPlus, FilePlus, UserPlus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { webcontainerApi } from '@/lib/webcontainerApi';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { useGoogleDriveAuth } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider';

interface PlusButtonProps {
  panelId: string;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  currentPath: string;
  isRoot: boolean;
  handle?: any;
  accountId?: string;
  onSuccess?: () => void;
}

interface ActionOption {
  type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount';
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  allowed: boolean;
}

const INVALID_FILENAME_CHARS = /[<>:"/\\|?*\x00-\x1f]/;
const RESERVED_NAMES = /^(con|prn|aux|nul|com[0-9]|lpt[0-9])$/i;
const MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH = 255;

function validateFileName(name: string): { valid: boolean; error?: string } {
  const trimmed = name.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return { valid: false, error: 'Name is required' };
  if (trimmed.length > MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH) return { valid: false, error: `Name too long (max ${MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH} characters)` };
  if (INVALID_FILENAME_CHARS.test(trimmed)) return { valid: false, error: 'Name contains invalid characters: < > : " / \\ | ? *' };
  if (RESERVED_NAMES.test(trimmed)) return { valid: false, error: 'Name is reserved by system' };
  if (trimmed === '.' || trimmed === '..') return { valid: false, error: 'Invalid name' };
  if (trimmed.includes('..') || trimmed.startsWith('/') || trimmed.startsWith('\\')) return { valid: false, error: 'Name cannot contain path traversal sequences' };
  return { valid: true };
}

function sanitizeTerminalPath(currentPath: string, name: string): string {
  const safeCurrent = currentPath.replace(/\x00/g, '');
  const safeName = name.replace(/\x00/g, '');
  const normalizedPath = safeCurrent.replace(/\\/g, '/');
  const normalizedName = safeName.replace(/\\/g, '/');
  const segments = normalizedPath.split('/').filter(s => s && s !== '.');
  const nameSegments = normalizedName.split('/').filter(s => s && s !== '.');
  if (nameSegments.some(s => s === '..')) throw new Error('Path traversal detected');
  if (normalizedPath === '/') return `/${normalizedName}`;
  return `${normalizedPath}/${normalizedName}`;
}

export function PlusButton({ panelId, sourceType, currentPath, isRoot, handle, accountId, onSuccess }: PlusButtonProps) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [actionType, setActionType] = useState<'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount' | null>(null);
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const { login } = useGoogleDriveAuth();

  const getOptions = (): ActionOption[] => {
    const options: ActionOption[] = [];
    if (isRoot && (sourceType === 'drive' || sourceType === 'github')) {
      options.push({ type: 'addAccount', label: 'Add Account', icon: UserPlus, allowed: true });
    }
    if (!isRoot) {
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
      }
      if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
    }
    return options;
  };

  const options = getOptions();
  const allowedOptions = options.filter(opt => opt.allowed);
  if (allowedOptions.length === 0) return null;

  const handleActionClick = (type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount') => {
    if (type === 'addAccount') {
      executeAddAccount();
    } else {
      setActionType(type);
      setIsOpen(true);
      setError('');
      setName('');
    }
  };

  const executeAddAccount = async () => {
    if (sourceType === 'drive') {
      try {
        await login();
        onSuccess?.();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Drive login error:', err);
        setError('Failed to initiate Google login');
      }
    } else if (sourceType === 'github') {
      setActionType('addAccount');
      setIsOpen(true);
    }
  };

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    const validation = validateFileName(name);
    if (!validation.valid) {
      setError(validation.error || 'Invalid name');
      return;
    }
    const safeName = name.trim();
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        if (actionType === 'folder') {
          await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(handle, safeName);
        } else {
          const emptyBlob = new Blob([''], { type: 'text/plain' });
          await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(handle, safeName, emptyBlob);
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId) {
        // Drive operations...
      } else if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId) {
        await createGitHubItemSecure(accountId, currentPath, safeName, actionType === 'folder');
      } else if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
        if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
        const fullPath = sanitizeTerminalPath(currentPath, safeName);
        if (actionType === 'folder') {
          await terminal.fs.mkdir(fullPath, { recursive: true });
        } else {
          await terminal.fs.writeFile(fullPath, '');
        }
      }
      setIsOpen(false);
      setName('');
      setActionType(null);
      onSuccess?.();
    } catch (err) {
      const errorMsg = (err as Error).message || 'Unknown error';
      setError(errorMsg.replace(/[<>]/g, ''));
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const createGitHubItemSecure = async (accountId: string, path: string, name: string, isFolder: boolean) => {
    const account = useGitHubStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
    if (!account) throw new Error('Account not found');
    const { Octokit } = await import('@octokit/rest');
    const octokit = new Octokit({ auth: account.token });
    const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    const repo = parts[1];
    if (!repo) throw new Error('Invalid repository path');
    const repoPath = parts.slice(2).join('/');
    const fullPath = repoPath ? `${repoPath}/${name}` : name;
    if (fullPath.includes('..')) throw new Error('Invalid path');
    const content = isFolder ? '' : '';
    const message = isFolder ? `Create folder ${name}` : `Create file ${name}`;
    const pathToCreate = isFolder ? `${fullPath}/.gitkeep` : fullPath;
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner: accountId,
      repo,
      path: pathToCreate,
      message,
      content: Buffer.from(content).toString('base64'),
    });
  };

  const showMenu = allowedOptions.length > 1;

  if (!showMenu) {
    const opt = allowedOptions[0];
    return (
      <>
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-8" onClick={() => handleActionClick(opt.type)}>
          <opt.icon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          {opt.label}
        </Button>
        <CreationDialog
          isOpen={isOpen}
          onClose={() => { setIsOpen(false); setError(''); setName(''); }}
          type={actionType}
          name={name}
          setName={setName}
          isLoading={isLoading}
          error={error}
          onCreate={handleCreate}
          panelId={panelId}
        />
      </>
    );
  }

  return (
    <>
      <div className="relative">
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-8" onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          New
        </Button>
        {isOpen && (
          <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 rounded-md shadow-lg bg-popover border border-border z-50">
            <div className="py-1">
              {allowedOptions.map(opt => (
                <button
                  key={opt.type}
                  className="flex items-center w-full px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent"
                  onClick={() => { handleActionClick(opt.type); setIsOpen(false); }}
                >
                  <opt.icon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  {opt.label}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <CreationDialog
        isOpen={isOpen && actionType !== null && actionType !== 'addAccount'}
        onClose={() => { setIsOpen(false); setError(''); setName(''); }}
        type={actionType}
        name={name}
        setName={setName}
        isLoading={isLoading}
        error={error}
        onCreate={handleCreate}
        panelId={panelId}
      />
    </>
  );
}

function CreationDialog({ isOpen, onClose, type, name, setName, isLoading, error, onCreate, panelId }: any) {
  if (!isOpen || !type) return null;
  const title = type === 'folder' ? 'Create Folder' : 'Create File';
  const placeholder = type === 'folder' ? 'MyFolder' : 'file.txt';
  return (
    <PanelDialog isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} panelId={panelId} title={title}>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="filename">Name</Label>
          <Input
            id="filename"
            value={name}
            onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
            placeholder={placeholder}
            autoFocus
            onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !isLoading) onCreate(); }}
            autoComplete="off"
            spellCheck={false}
          />
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
            Max 255 chars. Cannot contain: &lt; &gt; : &quot; / \ | ? *
          </p>
        </div>
        {error && <div className="text-sm text-destructive bg-destructive/10 p-2 rounded">{error}</div>}
        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} disabled={isLoading}>Cancel</Button>
          <Button onClick={onCreate} disabled={isLoading || !name.trim()}>{isLoading ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}</Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </PanelDialog>
  );
}

async function createDriveFolder(accessToken: string, parentId: string, name: string) {
  if (!accessToken || !parentId || !name) throw new Error('Missing required parameters');
  const validation = validateFileName(name);
  if (!validation.valid) throw new Error(validation.error);
  const metadata = { name: name.trim(), mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder', parents: [parentId] };
  const res = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify(metadata),
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to create Drive folder: ${await res.text()}`);
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/FileList.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// src/components/FileManager/FileList.tsx
import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { File, FolderOpen, Pencil } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DragDropItem } from '../DragDrop/DragDropItem';
import { InlineRenameInput } from '../Rename/InlineRenameInput';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { DFOLMenu } from '../DFOL/DFOLMenu';
import { TreeIconButton } from '../Tree/TreeIconButton';

interface FileListProps {
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function FileList({ entries, onNavigate, panelId }: FileListProps) {
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handleClick = (entry: FileSystemEntry) => {
    if (renamingId) return;
    if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
      onNavigate(entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry);
    }
  };

  const startRename = (entry: FileSystemEntry, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setRenamingId(entry.name);
  };

  const handleRenameComplete = () => {
    setRenamingId(null);
  };

  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {entries.map((entry) => {
        const isRenaming = renamingId === entry.name;
        return (
          <DragDropItem
            key={entry.name}
            item={entry}
            id={entry.name}
            sourceType="storage"
            panelId={panelId}
            className="group flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer"
          >
            {isRenaming ? (
              <div className="flex-1">
                <InlineRenameInput
                  item={{
                    id: entry.name,
                    name: entry.name,
                    path: entry.handle?.name || entry.name,
                    sourceType: 'storage',
                    panelId,
                    handle: entry.handle,
                    isDirectory: entry.kind === 'directory',
                  }}
                  onComplete={handleRenameComplete}
                />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Left side: icon + name + size */}
                <div
                  className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0"
                  onClick={() => handleClick(entry)}
                >
                  {entry.kind === 'directory' ? (
                    <FolderOpen className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
                  ) : (
                    <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
                  )}
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate" title={entry.name}>
                    {entry.name}
                  </span>
                  {entry.kind === 'file' && (
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                      {formatBytes(entry.size)}
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Right side: date + actions */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 shrink-0">
                  <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hidden sm:inline">
                    {formatDistanceToNow(entry.lastModified, { addSuffix: true })}
                  </span>

                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => startRename(entry, e)}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
                      title="Rename"
                    >
                      <Pencil className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
                    </button>

                    <TreeIconButton
                      item={entry}
                      sourceType="storage"
                      panelId={panelId}
                      className="h-7 w-7"
                    />

                    <DFOLMenu
                      item={entry}
                      sourceType="storage"
                      panelId={panelId}
                      onRename={() => startRename(entry, {} as React.MouseEvent)}
                      onDelete={() => {/* handle delete */}}
                      onTreeView={() => {}}
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </>
            )}
          </DragDropItem>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/Toolbar.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { 
  Grid3X3, 
  List, 
  ArrowLeft, 
  RefreshCw,
  ChevronDown,
  ArrowUpDown,
  Settings2
} from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuSub,
  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSubContent,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { PlusButton } from './PlusButton';
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';

interface ToolbarProps {
  viewMode: ViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: ViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: SortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: SortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  canGoBack: boolean;
  isLoading: boolean;
  currentPath: string;
  panelId: string;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  panelHandle?: any;
  accountId?: string;
  onRefreshComplete?: () => void;
  sortingScope?: 'current' | 'full';
  onSortingScopeChange?: (scope: 'current' | 'full') => void;
}

const sortLabels: Record<SortBy, string> = {
  'name-asc': 'Name (A-Z)',
  'name-desc': 'Name (Z-A)',
  'date': 'Date Modified',
  'size': 'Size',
};

export function Toolbar({ 
  viewMode, 
  onViewModeChange, 
  sortBy, 
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  canGoBack,
  isLoading,
  currentPath,
  panelId,
  sourceType,
  panelHandle,
  accountId,
  onRefreshComplete,
  sortingScope = 'current',
  onSortingScopeChange,
}: ToolbarProps) {
  const [showAutoRefreshDialog, setShowAutoRefreshDialog] = useState(false);
  const [autoRefreshInterval, setAutoRefreshInterval] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [autoRefreshSeconds, setAutoRefreshSeconds] = useState(30);
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  // Clear auto-refresh on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (autoRefreshInterval) clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
    };
  }, [autoRefreshInterval]);

  const handleRefreshLongPress = () => {
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(true);
  };

  const startAutoRefresh = () => {
    if (autoRefreshInterval) clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      onRefresh();
      onRefreshComplete?.();
    }, autoRefreshSeconds * 1000);
    setAutoRefreshInterval(window.setInterval(() => { onRefresh(); onRefreshComplete?.(); }, autoRefreshSeconds * 1000));
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
  };

  const stopAutoRefresh = () => {
    if (autoRefreshInterval) {
      clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
      setAutoRefreshInterval(null);
    }
  };

  const handleRefreshClick = () => {
    onRefresh();
    onRefreshComplete?.();
  };

  const handleMouseDown = () => {
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      handleRefreshLongPress();
    }, 500);
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const handleSortChangeWithScope = (sort: SortBy) => {
    onSortChange(sort);
    // If scope is 'full', we need to save the sorting preference globally for this panel
    if (sortingScope === 'full') {
      localStorage.setItem(`sort_${panelId}`, sort);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      {/* Left: Navigation */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="icon"
          onClick={onNavigateBack}
          disabled={!canGoBack}
          className="h-8 w-8 shrink-0"
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-2 min-w-0">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground truncate">
            {currentPath === '/' ? 'Root' : currentPath}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right: Actions */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0">
        {/* Context-aware Plus Button */}
        <PlusButton
          panelId={panelId}
          sourceType={sourceType}
          currentPath={currentPath}
          isRoot={currentPath === '/'}
          handle={panelHandle}
          accountId={accountId}
          onSuccess={() => {
            onRefresh();
            onRefreshComplete?.();
          }}
        />

        {/* Refresh button with long-press for auto-refresh */}
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="icon"
          onClick={handleRefreshClick}
          onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
          onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
          onTouchStart={handleMouseDown}
          onTouchEnd={handleMouseUp}
          disabled={isLoading}
          className="h-8 w-8 relative"
          title={autoRefreshInterval ? `Auto-refresh every ${autoRefreshSeconds}s (click to refresh now, long press to stop)` : 'Refresh (long press for auto-refresh)'}
        >
          <RefreshCw className={`h-4 w-4 ${isLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
          {autoRefreshInterval && (
            <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full" />
          )}
        </Button>

        {/* Sorting dropdown with scope selector */}
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('name-asc')}>
              Name (A-Z)
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('name-desc')}>
              Name (Z-A)
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('date')}>
              Date Modified
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('size')}>
              Size
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
            <DropdownMenuSub>
              <DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
                <Settings2 className="w-3 h-3 mr-2" />
                Sorting Scope
              </DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
              <DropdownMenuSubContent>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortingScopeChange?.('current')}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
                    <span>Current folder only</span>
                    {sortingScope === 'current' && <span className="text-primary ml-2">✓</span>}
                  </div>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortingScopeChange?.('full')}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
                    <span>Full panel (persistent)</span>
                    {sortingScope === 'full' && <span className="text-primary ml-2">✓</span>}
                  </div>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
              </DropdownMenuSubContent>
            </DropdownMenuSub>
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>

        {/* View mode toggle */}
        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md ml-1">
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-l-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
            aria-label="Grid view"
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-r-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
            aria-label="List view"
          >
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Auto-refresh dialog */}
      <PanelDialog
        isOpen={showAutoRefreshDialog}
        onClose={() => setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false)}
        panelId={panelId}
        title="Auto Refresh"
      >
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <p className="text-sm">Set automatic refresh interval</p>
          <div>
            <Label>Interval (seconds)</Label>
            <Input
              type="number"
              value={autoRefreshSeconds}
              onChange={(e) => setAutoRefreshSeconds(Math.max(5, Number(e.target.value)))}
              min={5}
              max={3600}
              className="mt-1"
            />
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            {autoRefreshInterval ? (
              <Button variant="destructive" onClick={stopAutoRefresh} className="flex-1">
                Stop Auto-Refresh
              </Button>
            ) : (
              <Button onClick={startAutoRefresh} className="flex-1">
                Start Auto-Refresh
              </Button>
            )}
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </PanelDialog>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Toolbar } from './Toolbar';
import { FileGrid } from './FileGrid';
import { FileList } from './FileList';
import { CreateFolderDialog } from './CreateFolderDialog';
import { useFileSystemStore, useEntries, useViewMode, useSortBy, useCurrentHandle } from '@/stores/fileSystemStore';
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';

export function FileManager({ panelId }: { panelId: string }) {
  const [createDialogOpen, setCreateDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  
  const entries = useEntries();
  const viewMode = useViewMode();
  const sortBy = useSortBy();
  const currentHandle = useCurrentHandle();
  const setViewMode = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.setViewMode);
  const setSortBy = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.setSortBy);
  const initMountPoints = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.initMountPoints);

  useEffect(() => {
    initMountPoints();
  }, [initMountPoints]);

  const handleViewModeChange = (mode: ViewMode) => setViewMode(mode);
  const handleSortChange = (sort: SortBy) => setSortBy(sort);

  if (!currentHandle) {
    return <div>Select a mount point</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <Toolbar
        viewMode={viewMode}
        onViewModeChange={handleViewModeChange}
        sortBy={sortBy}
        onSortChange={handleSortChange}
        onNavigateBack={() => {}}
        onRefresh={() => {}}
        canGoBack={false}
        isLoading={false}
        currentPath="/"
        panelId={panelId}
        sourceType="storage"
      />
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {entries.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p>Empty folder</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <FileGrid entries={entries} onNavigate={() => {}} panelId={panelId} />
        ) : (
          <FileList entries={entries} onNavigate={() => {}} panelId={panelId} />
        )}
      </div>
      <CreateFolderDialog open={createDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setCreateDialogOpen} panelId={panelId} />
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import React, { Component, ReactNode } from 'react';

interface Props {
  children: ReactNode;
}

interface State {
  hasError: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
}

export class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
  constructor(props: Props) {
    super(props);
    this.state = { hasError: false, error: null };
  }

  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): State {
    return { hasError: true, error };
  }

  componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: React.ErrorInfo) {
    console.error('Uncaught error:', error, errorInfo);
  }

  render() {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      return (
        <div style={{ padding: '20px', color: 'red', fontFamily: 'monospace' }}>
          <h2>Something went wrong</h2>
          <pre>{this.state.error?.stack || this.state.error?.message}</pre>
          <button onClick={() => window.location.reload()}>Reload</button>
        </div>
      );
    }
    return this.props.children;
  }
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Format/FormatDialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { AlertTriangle, Clock, Key, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';

interface FormatDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  itemName: string;
  itemType: 'account' | 'storage' | 'github' | 'drive' | 'terminal';
  itemId: string;
  onFormat: () => Promise<void>;
}

export function FormatDialog({ isOpen, onClose, itemName, itemType, itemId, onFormat }: FormatDialogProps) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState<'confirm' | 'timer' | 'password' | 'executing'>('confirm');
  const [timer, setTimer] = useState(30);
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const verifyActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.verifyActionPassword);

  // Load timer from settings (default 30)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      const settings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('settings') || '{}');
      const formatTimer = settings.formatTimer || 30;
      setTimer(formatTimer);
      setStep('confirm');
      setPassword('');
      setError('');
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let interval: NodeJS.Timeout;
    if (step === 'timer' && timer > 0) {
      interval = setInterval(() => setTimer(prev => prev - 1), 1000);
    } else if (step === 'timer' && timer === 0) {
      setStep('password');
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [step, timer]);

  const handleConfirm = () => setStep('timer');
  const handlePasswordSubmit = async () => {
    if (!verifyActionPassword('format', password)) {
      setError('Invalid password');
      return;
    }
    setStep('executing');
    try {
      await onFormat();
      onClose();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
      setStep('password');
    }
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-destructive/10">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-destructive" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-destructive">Format {itemType}</h2>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4">
          {step === 'confirm' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <p className="text-sm">
                You are about to <span className="font-bold text-destructive">PERMANENTLY DELETE</span> all data in:
              </p>
              <div className="p-3 bg-muted rounded-lg">
                <p className="font-mono text-sm break-all">{itemName}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Type: {itemType}</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">This action is <span className="font-bold">IRREVERSIBLE</span>.</p>
              <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleConfirm}>Continue</Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'timer' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <Clock className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-muted-foreground" />
              <p className="text-sm">Wait {timer} seconds to confirm format</p>
              <div className="w-full bg-muted rounded-full h-2">
                <div
                  className="bg-destructive h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000"
                  style={{ width: `${((30 - timer) / 30) * 100}%` }}
                />
              </div>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'password' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Key className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                <p className="text-sm">Enter format password to continue</p>
              </div>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={password}
                onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Format password"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handlePasswordSubmit()}
              />
              {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handlePasswordSubmit} disabled={!password}>
                  Confirm Format
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'executing' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
              <p className="text-sm">Formatting {itemName}...</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">This may take a few moments</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/AccountSelector.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Github, Plus, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubAccounts } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";

export function AccountSelector() {
  const accounts = useGitHubAccounts();
  const addAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const setActiveAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const removeAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  
  const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [token, setToken] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  // SECURITY: Validate GitHub username format
  const validateUsername = (name: string): boolean => {
    // GitHub usernames: alphanumeric with hyphens, no consecutive hyphens, 
    // not starting/ending with hyphen, max 39 chars
    const usernameRegex = /^[a-zA-Z0-9](?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,37}[a-zA-Z0-9])?$/;
    return usernameRegex.test(name) && name.length <= 39;
  };

  // SECURITY: Validate token format (GitHub PATs are typically ghp_... or github_pat_...)
  const validateToken = (tok: string): boolean => {
    if (!tok || tok.length < 10) return false;
    // Basic check for common GitHub token prefixes
    const validPrefixes = ['ghp_', 'github_pat_', 'gho_', 'ghu_', 'ghs_', 'ghr_'];
    return validPrefixes.some(prefix => tok.startsWith(prefix)) || 
           /^[a-f0-9]{40}$/.test(tok); // Legacy 40-char hex tokens
  };

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    // SECURITY: Validate inputs before submission
    if (!username.trim() || !token.trim()) {
      setError('Username and token are required');
      return;
    }

    const trimmedUsername = username.trim();
    const trimmedToken = token.trim();

    if (!validateUsername(trimmedUsername)) {
      setError('Invalid GitHub username format');
      return;
    }

    if (!validateToken(trimmedToken)) {
      setError('Invalid token format. GitHub tokens should start with ghp_, github_pat_, etc.');
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');

    try {
      // SECURITY: Test token before saving (optional but recommended)
      const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/user', {
        headers: {
          'Authorization': `Bearer ${trimmedToken}`,
          'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3+json'
        }
      });

      if (!response.ok) {
        if (response.status === 401) {
          throw new Error('Invalid token or unauthorized');
        }
        throw new Error(`GitHub API error: ${response.status}`);
      }

      const userData = await response.json();
      
      // SECURITY: Verify username matches
      if (userData.login.toLowerCase() !== trimmedUsername.toLowerCase()) {
        throw new Error('Token does not match the specified username');
      }

      await addAccount(trimmedUsername, trimmedToken);
      setShowAddForm(false);
      setUsername('');
      setToken('');
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
          <Github className="h-5 w-5" />
          GitHub Accounts
        </h2>
        <Button size="sm" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
          Add
        </Button>
      </div>

      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
        Connect your GitHub account to browse repositories
      </p>

      {accounts.length > 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {accounts.map((account) => (
            <div
              key={account.id}
              className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors"
              onClick={() => setActiveAccount(account.id)}
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                {account.avatarUrl ? (
                  <img
                    src={account.avatarUrl}
                    alt={account.id}
                    className="h-8 w-8 rounded-full"
                    // SECURITY: Handle image load errors
                    onError={(e) => {
                      (e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none';
                    }}
                  />
                ) : (
                  <div className="h-8 w-8 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Github className="h-4 w-4" />
                  </div>
                )}
                <div>
                  <p className="font-medium">{account.id}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    {account.id === useGitHubStore.getState().activeAccountId ? 'Active' : 'Click to activate'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="icon"
                className="h-7 w-7 text-destructive"
                onClick={(e) => {
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  removeAccount(account.id);
                }}
              >
                <X className="h-3 w-3" />
              </Button>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* SECURITY: Custom dialog instead of prompt() for sensitive input */}
      <Dialog open={showAddForm} onOpenChange={setShowAddForm}>
        <DialogContent>
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Add GitHub Account</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              Enter your GitHub username and Personal Access Token.
              Tokens are stored in memory only and never persisted to disk.
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          
          <div className="space-y-4 py-4">
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="username">Username</Label>
              <Input
                id="username"
                value={username}
                onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="octocat"
                autoComplete="off"
                spellCheck={false}
              />
            </div>
            
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="token">Personal Access Token</Label>
              <Input
                id="token"
                type="password"
                value={token}
                onChange={(e) => setToken(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
                autoComplete="new-password"
                // SECURITY: Prevent browser password managers from storing this
                data-lpignore="true"
                data-1p-ignore="true"
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                Token needs <code>repo</code> and <code>read:user</code> scopes.
                Get one at GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens
              </p>
            </div>
            
            {error && (
              <div className="text-sm text-destructive bg-destructive/10 p-2 rounded">
                {error}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
          
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => {
              setShowAddForm(false);
              setError('');
              setUsername('');
              setToken('');
            }}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button onClick={handleAddAccount} disabled={isLoading}>
              {isLoading ? 'Verifying...' : 'Add Account'}
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Github, Plus, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubAccounts } from '@/stores/githubStore';

export function AccountSelector() {
  const accounts = useGitHubAccounts();
  const addAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const setActiveAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const removeAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [token, setToken] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    if (!username.trim() || !token.trim()) {
      setError('Username and token are required');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      await addAccount(username.trim(), token.trim());
      setShowAddForm(false);
      setUsername('');
      setToken('');
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-background">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="text-center mb-6">
          <Github className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-primary mb-2" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold">GitHub Accounts</h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Connect your GitHub account to browse repositories</p>
        </div>

        {accounts.length > 0 && (
          <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
            {accounts.map((account) => (
              <div
                key={account.id}
                className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-border hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer"
                onClick={() => setActiveAccount(account.id)}
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {account.avatarUrl ? (
                    <img src={account.avatarUrl} alt={account.id} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full" />
                  ) : (
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Github className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium">{account.id}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground capitalize">{account.permissions}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="icon"
                  className="h-7 w-7"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    removeAccount(account.id);
                  }}
                >
                  <X className="w-3 h-3" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {showAddForm ? (
          <div className="border border-border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-3">
            <div>
              <Label>GitHub Username</Label>
              <Input
                value={username}
                onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="username"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label>Personal Access Token</Label>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={token}
                onChange={(e) => setToken(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="ghp_..."
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                Needs <code className="text-xs">repo</code> and <code className="text-xs">read:user</code> scopes
              </p>
            </div>
            {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(false)}>Cancel</Button>
              <Button onClick={handleAddAccount} disabled={isLoading}>
                {isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : 'Connect'}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <Button variant="outline" className="w-full" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)}>
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            Add GitHub Account
          </Button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/ContentList.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { GitHubContent } from '@/types/github';
import { Folder, File, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DFOLMenu } from '../DFOL/DFOLMenu';
import { TreeIconButton } from '../Tree/TreeIconButton';

interface ContentListProps {
  contents: GitHubContent[];
  onFileClick?: (file: GitHubContent) => void;
  onFolderClick?: (folder: GitHubContent) => void;
}

export function ContentList({ contents, onFileClick, onFolderClick }: ContentListProps) {
  const handleClick = (item: GitHubContent) => {
    if (item.type === 'dir') {
      onFolderClick?.(item);
    } else {
      onFileClick?.(item);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {contents.map((item) => (
        <div
          key={item.path}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => handleClick(item)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
            {item.type === 'dir' ? (
              <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
            ) : (
              <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{item.name}</span>
            {item.type === 'file' && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                {formatBytes(item.size)}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
            <TreeIconButton
              item={item}
              sourceType="github"
              panelId="github-panel"
              className="h-7 w-7 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
            />
            <DFOLMenu
              item={item}
              sourceType="github"
              panelId="github-panel"
              onRename={() => {}}
              onDelete={() => {}}
              onTreeView={() => {}}
            />
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}
