FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/EmptyPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { HardDrive, FolderGit, Github, Terminal } from 'lucide-react';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { SourceType } from '@/stores/appStore';

interface EmptyPanelProps {
  panelId: string;
}

const SOURCES: { type: SourceType; label: string; icon: React.ElementType; color: string }[] = [
  { type: 'storage', label: 'Storage', icon: HardDrive, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { type: 'drive', label: 'Google Drive', icon: FolderGit, color: 'text-green-500' },
  { type: 'github', label: 'GitHub', icon: Github, color: 'text-purple-500' },
  { type: 'terminal', label: 'Terminal', icon: Terminal, color: 'text-orange-500' },
];

export function EmptyPanel({ panelId }: EmptyPanelProps) {
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);

  const handleSourceClick = (source: SourceType) => {
    setPanelSource(panelId, source);
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-background">
      <div className="text-center mb-8">
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Select a Source</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          Choose a storage source to start browsing
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 max-w-md w-full">
        {SOURCES.map((source) => {
          const Icon = source.icon;
          return (
            <button
              key={source.type}
              onClick={() => handleSourceClick(source.type)}
              className="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all group"
            >
              <div className={`p-3 rounded-full bg-primary/10 ${source.color} group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                <Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
              </div>
              <span className="font-medium text-sm">{source.label}</span>
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      <div className="mt-8 text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
        Each panel works independently • Add up to 4 panels total
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PanelContainer.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { usePanelStore, usePanels, useActivePanelId } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { ResizablePanel } from './ResizablePanel';
import { GlobalSearchBar } from '@/components/Search/GlobalSearchBar';
import { FilterPanel } from '@/components/Search/FilterPanel';
import { SearchResultsOverlay } from '@/components/Search/SearchResultsOverlay';
import { Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { MAX_PANELS } from '@/types/panel';
import { RootView } from '@/components/Storage/RootView';
import { StoragePanel } from './StoragePanel';
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

export function PanelContainer() {
  const panels = usePanels();
  const activePanelId = useActivePanelId();
  const { addPanel, removePanel, setActivePanel, setPanelHandle, setPanelPath } = usePanelStore();

  // Left panel is always index 0, fixed as storage root
  const leftPanel = panels[0];
  const rightPanels = panels.slice(1);
  const canAddPanel = rightPanels.length < MAX_PANELS - 1; // Max total 4, so right max 3

  const [leftEntries, setLeftEntries] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [isLeftLoading, setIsLeftLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleMountSelect = (handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => {
    if (leftPanel) {
      setPanelHandle(leftPanel.id, handle);
      setPanelPath(leftPanel.id, `/${name}`);
      refreshLeftPanel();
    }
  };

  const refreshLeftPanel = async () => {
    if (!leftPanel?.handle) {
      setLeftEntries([]);
      return;
    }
    setIsLeftLoading(true);
    try {
      const items = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(leftPanel.handle);
      setLeftEntries(items);
    } finally {
      setIsLeftLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    refreshLeftPanel();
  }, [leftPanel?.handle]);

  // Ensure left panel always exists and is storage root
  if (!leftPanel || leftPanel.source !== 'storage') {
    return <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center">Loading...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-background">
      {/* Top bar with search */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
        <GlobalSearchBar />
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="sm"
          onClick={addPanel}
          disabled={!canAddPanel}
          className="shrink-0 gap-2"
        >
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
          Add Panel
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Global overlays */}
      <FilterPanel />
      <SearchResultsOverlay />

      {/* Panels layout */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden">
        {/* LEFT FIXED PANEL - Always Storage Root */}
        <div className="flex-shrink-0 h-full border-r border-border" style={{ width: leftPanel.width }}>
          <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
            {/* Custom header for left panel - no source switcher, no close button */}
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-border bg-card/50">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-primary" />
                <span className="text-sm font-medium">Storage</span>
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">{leftPanel.path}</span>
              </div>
              {/* Left panel has no close button and no source dropdown */}
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="icon"
                  className="h-6 w-6"
                  onClick={() => usePanelStore.getState().togglePanelMinimize(leftPanel.id)}
                >
                  <span className="text-xs">−</span>
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* Left panel content - always storage */}
            <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
              {!leftPanel.handle ? (
                <RootView panelId={leftPanel.id} onMountSelect={handleMountSelect} />
              ) : (
                <StoragePanel
                  panel={leftPanel}
                  entries={leftEntries}
                  isLoading={isLeftLoading}
                  onRefresh={refreshLeftPanel}
                />
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* RIGHT FLEXIBLE PANELS */}
        {rightPanels.map((panel, index) => (
          <ResizablePanel
            key={panel.id}
            panel={panel}
            isActive={panel.id === activePanelId}
            isLast={index === rightPanels.length - 1}
            onActivate={() => setActivePanel(panel.id)}
            onClose={() => removePanel(panel.id)}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PanelContent.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { StoragePanel } from './StoragePanel';
import { RootView } from '@/components/Storage/RootView';
import { AccountSelector } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/AccountSelector';
import { UsernameList } from '@/components/GitHub/UsernameList';
import { TerminalPanel } from '@/components/Terminal/TerminalPanel';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';

interface PanelContentProps {
  panel: PanelState;
}

export function PanelContent({ panel }: PanelContentProps) {
  const [isRootView, setIsRootView] = useState(false);
  const setPanelHandle = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelHandle);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const setActiveAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const setActiveAccountGitHub = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (panel.source === 'storage') {
      setIsRootView(!panel.handle);
    } else if (panel.source === 'drive') {
      setIsRootView(panel.path === '/' || !panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github') {
      setIsRootView(panel.path === '/' || !panel.accountId);
    } else {
      setIsRootView(false);
    }
  }, [panel.source, panel.handle, panel.path, panel.accountId]);

  const handleStorageMountSelect = (handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => {
    setPanelHandle(panel.id, handle);
    setPanelPath(panel.id, `/${name}`);
    setIsRootView(false);
  };

  const handleDriveAccountSelect = (accountId: string) => {
    setActiveAccount(accountId);
    setPanelSource(panel.id, 'drive');
    setPanelPath(panel.id, `/drive/${accountId}`);
  };

  const handleGitHubUsernameSelect = (username: string) => {
    setActiveAccountGitHub(username);
    setPanelSource(panel.id, 'github');
    setPanelPath(panel.id, `/github/${username}`);
  };

  if (panel.source === 'storage' && isRootView) {
    return <RootView panelId={panel.id} onMountSelect={handleStorageMountSelect} />;
  }

  if (panel.source === 'drive' && isRootView) {
    return <AccountSelector onAccountSelect={handleDriveAccountSelect} />;
  }

  if (panel.source === 'github' && isRootView) {
    return <UsernameList onUsernameSelect={handleGitHubUsernameSelect} />;
  }

  switch (panel.source) {
    case 'storage':
      return <StoragePanel panel={panel} entries={[]} isLoading={false} onRefresh={() => {}} />;
    case 'terminal':
      return <TerminalPanel />;
    default:
      return null;
  }
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PanelHeader.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { SourceType } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { HardDrive, FolderGit, Github, Terminal, Minus, X, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { RootThreeDotsMenu } from '@/components/Menu/RootThreeDotsMenu';
import { FormatDialog } from '@/components/Format/FormatDialog';
import { IdentityMask } from '@/components/Authority/IdentityMask';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';

const sourceIcons: Record<SourceType, React.ElementType> = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

const sourceLabels: Record<SourceType, string> = {
  storage: 'Storage',
  drive: 'Drive',
  github: 'GitHub',
  terminal: 'Terminal',
};

interface PanelHeaderProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  isActive: boolean;
  onActivate: () => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function PanelHeader({ panel, isActive, onActivate, onClose }: PanelHeaderProps) {
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const togglePanelMinimize = usePanelStore((s) => s.togglePanelMinimize);
  const [showFormatDialog, setShowFormatDialog] = useState(false);
  const [showSourceDialog, setShowSourceDialog] = useState(false);
  const [pendingSource, setPendingSource] = useState<SourceType | null>(null);
  const [sourceBehavior, setSourceBehavior] = useState<'root' | 'last' | 'ask'>('ask');
  const Icon = sourceIcons[panel.source];
  const isRoot = panel.path === '/' || (panel.source === 'drive' && !panel.accountId) || (panel.source === 'github' && !panel.accountId);
  
  // Load source change behavior from settings
  useEffect(() => {
    const settings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('settings') || '{}');
    setSourceBehavior(settings.sourceBehavior || 'ask');
  }, []);

  const handleFormat = async () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      console.log('Formatting Drive account:', panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      console.log('Formatting GitHub account:', panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'storage' && panel.handle) {
      console.log('Formatting storage:', panel.path);
    }
    setShowFormatDialog(false);
  };
  
  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      useDriveStore.getState().removeAccount(panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      useGitHubStore.getState().removeAccount(panel.accountId);
    }
    setPanelSource(panel.id, 'storage');
  };
  
  const getRootItemName = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === panel.accountId);
      return account ? account.id.split('@')[0] : panel.accountId;
    }
    if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) return panel.accountId;
    if (panel.source === 'storage' && panel.handle) return panel.path.replace('/', '');
    return panel.source;
  };

  const getDisplayIdentity = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`mask_drive_${panel.accountId}`);
      if (saved) {
        const { masked, name } = JSON.parse(saved);
        if (masked && name) return name;
      }
      return panel.accountId.split('@')[0];
    }
    if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`mask_github_${panel.accountId}`);
      if (saved) {
        const { masked, name } = JSON.parse(saved);
        if (masked && name) return name;
      }
      return panel.accountId;
    }
    return getRootItemName();
  };

  const handleSourceClick = (newSource: SourceType) => {
    if (sourceBehavior === 'ask') {
      setPendingSource(newSource);
      setShowSourceDialog(true);
    } else {
      executeSourceChange(newSource);
    }
  };

  const executeSourceChange = (newSource: SourceType) => {
    setPanelSource(panel.id, newSource);
    setShowSourceDialog(false);
    setPendingSource(null);
  };

  const getLastPath = (source: SourceType): string => {
    const key = `lastPath_${panel.id}_${source}`;
    return localStorage.getItem(key) || '/';
  };

  const saveCurrentPath = () => {
    localStorage.setItem(`lastPath_${panel.id}_${panel.source}`, panel.path);
  };

  // Save current path when changing source or unmounting
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => saveCurrentPath();
  }, [panel.source, panel.path]);

  return (
    <>
      <div
        className={cn('flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-border bg-card/50 cursor-pointer', isActive && 'bg-primary/5')}
        onClick={onActivate}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 min-w-0">
          <Icon className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{sourceLabels[panel.source]}</span>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">{panel.path}</span>
          {isRoot && (panel.source === 'drive' || panel.source === 'github') && (
            <span className="text-xs text-primary/70 ml-1">({getDisplayIdentity()})</span>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
          {/* Source dropdown */}
          <div className="relative group">
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-6 w-6">
              <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" />
            </Button>
            <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-1 hidden group-hover:block bg-card border rounded shadow-lg z-20 min-w-[100px]">
              {(['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'] as SourceType[]).map((src) => (
                <button
                  key={src}
                  onClick={() => handleSourceClick(src)}
                  className="w-full px-3 py-1 text-left text-sm hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2"
                >
                  {React.createElement(sourceIcons[src], { className: 'w-3 h-3' })}
                  {sourceLabels[src]}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Three dots menu for root items */}
          {isRoot && (panel.source === 'drive' || panel.source === 'github' || panel.source === 'storage') && (
            <RootThreeDotsMenu
              itemType={panel.source === 'drive' ? 'drive-account' : panel.source === 'github' ? 'github-username' : 'storage-mount'}
              itemId={panel.accountId || panel.id}
              itemName={getRootItemName()}
              originalIdentity={panel.accountId || undefined}
              onFormat={async () => setShowFormatDialog(true)}
              onDelete={handleDelete}
            />
          )}

          {/* Minimize button */}
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-6 w-6" onClick={() => togglePanelMinimize(panel.id)}>
            <Minus className="w-3 h-3" />
          </Button>

          {/* Close button (only for right panels) */}
          {usePanelStore.getState().panels.length > 1 && (
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-6 w-6" onClick={onClose}>
              <X className="w-3 h-3" />
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Format Dialog */}
      {showFormatDialog && (
        <FormatDialog
          isOpen={showFormatDialog}
          onClose={() => setShowFormatDialog(false)}
          itemName={getRootItemName()}
          itemType={panel.source === 'drive' ? 'drive' : panel.source === 'github' ? 'github' : 'storage'}
          itemId={panel.accountId || panel.id}
          onFormat={handleFormat}
        />
      )}

      {/* Source Change Behavior Dialog */}
      <PanelDialog
        isOpen={showSourceDialog}
        onClose={() => setShowSourceDialog(false)}
        panelId={panel.id}
        title="Change Source"
      >
        <div className="space-y-3">
          <p className="text-sm">How would you like to open {sourceLabels[pendingSource!]}?</p>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <button
              onClick={() => {
                if (pendingSource) {
                  setPanelSource(panel.id, pendingSource);
                  // Reset to root path
                  setPanelSource(panel.id, pendingSource); // Already sets path to '/'
                }
                setShowSourceDialog(false);
                setPendingSource(null);
              }}
              className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 rounded hover:bg-accent text-sm"
            >
              Start from root
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => {
                if (pendingSource) {
                  const lastPath = getLastPath(pendingSource);
                  setPanelSource(panel.id, pendingSource);
                  // Restore last path (handled in panel store via separate action)
                  usePanelStore.getState().setPanelPath(panel.id, lastPath);
                }
                setShowSourceDialog(false);
                setPendingSource(null);
              }}
              className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 rounded hover:bg-accent text-sm"
            >
              Continue from last used path
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="pt-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            You can change this behavior in Settings → Source Change Behavior
          </div>
        </div>
      </PanelDialog>
    </>
  );
}

// Helper for React.createElement
import React from 'react';

import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { SourceType } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { 
  HardDrive, 
  FolderGit, 
  Github, 
  Terminal,
  CheckCircle
} from 'lucide-react';

const sourceIcons: Record<SourceType, React.ElementType> = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

const sourceLabels: Record<SourceType, string> = {
  storage: 'Storage',
  drive: 'Google Drive',
  github: 'GitHub',
  terminal: 'Terminal',
};

interface PlaceholderPanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  source: SourceType;
}

export function PlaceholderPanel({ panel, source }: PlaceholderPanelProps) {
  const Icon = sourceIcons[source];
  const label = sourceLabels[source];

  // Terminal is now fully implemented, shouldn't show placeholder
  if (source === 'terminal') {
    return (
      <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center">
        <CheckCircle className="w-12 h-12 text-green-500 mb-4" />
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Terminal Ready</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          Click the Terminal button in the panel header to initialize WebContainer.
        </p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center">
      <div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 text-primary mb-4">
        <Icon className="w-12 h-12" />
      </div>
      <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-2">{label}</h3>
      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground max-w-xs">
        This {label} panel is independent from other panels.
        <br />
        Source: <span className="font-medium capitalize">{panel.source}</span>
      </p>
      <div className="mt-4 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted text-xs text-muted-foreground">
        Panel ID: {panel.id}
        <br />
        Path: {panel.path}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/ResizablePanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useDrop } from 'react-dnd';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useResizable } from '@/hooks/useResizable';
import { PanelHeader } from './PanelHeader';
import { PanelContent } from './PanelContent';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { MIN_PANEL_WIDTH } from '@/types/panel';
import { useDragDropStore, useIsDragging, usePendingOperation, useTargetPanel } from '@/stores/dragDropStore';

interface ResizablePanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  isActive: boolean;
  isLast: boolean;
  onActivate: () => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function ResizablePanel({ 
  panel, 
  isActive, 
  isLast,
  onActivate, 
  onClose 
}: ResizablePanelProps) {
  const setPanelWidth = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelWidth);
  const isDraggingGlobal = useIsDragging();
  const pendingOperation = usePendingOperation();
  const targetPanel = useTargetPanel();
  const dragDropStore = useDragDropStore();
  
  const { width, isResizing, startResize } = useResizable({
    initialWidth: panel.width,
    minWidth: MIN_PANEL_WIDTH,
    onResize: (newWidth) => setPanelWidth(panel.id, newWidth),
  });

  // Drop target for drag and drop
  const [{ isOver, canDrop }, drop] = useDrop(() => ({
    accept: ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'],
    drop: (item: any, monitor) => {
      if (!monitor.didDrop()) {
        dragDropStore.setTargetPanel(panel.id);
        // Don't complete here - wait for user to select copy/move from floating handle
      }
    },
    collect: (monitor) => ({
      isOver: !!monitor.isOver(),
      canDrop: !!monitor.canDrop(),
    }),
    canDrop: (item: any) => {
      return item.panelId !== panel.id;
    },
  }), [panel.id, dragDropStore]);

  // Handle drop completion when operation is confirmed
  const handleDropComplete = useCallback(() => {
    if (targetPanel === panel.id && pendingOperation) {
      // Execute the copy/move operation
      const selectedItems = dragDropStore.selectedItems;
      
      // TODO: Implement actual copy/move logic based on source and target types
      console.log(`${pendingOperation} ${selectedItems.length} items to panel ${panel.id}`);
      
      // Reset drag state
      dragDropStore.exitDragMode();
    }
  }, [targetPanel, pendingOperation, panel.id, dragDropStore]);

  // Watch for operation confirmation
  useRef(() => {
    if (!dragDropStore.showConfirmDialog && pendingOperation && targetPanel === panel.id) {
      handleDropComplete();
    }
  });

  return (
    <div
      ref={drop}
      className={cn(
        'flex flex-col h-full relative border-r border-border last:border-r-0',
        isActive && 'ring-1 ring-primary/20',
        isResizing && 'select-none',
        isOver && canDrop && 'bg-accent/20 ring-2 ring-accent ring-inset',
        isOver && !canDrop && 'bg-destructive/10'
      )}
      style={{ 
        width: panel.isMinimized ? 60 : width,
        minWidth: panel.isMinimized ? 60 : MIN_PANEL_WIDTH,
        flexShrink: 0,
      }}
    >
      <PanelHeader
        panel={panel}
        isActive={isActive}
        onActivate={onActivate}
        onClose={onClose}
      />
      
      {!panel.isMinimized && (
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
          <PanelContent panel={panel} />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Drop indicator */}
      {isOver && canDrop && (
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none bg-accent/10 z-50">
          <div className="bg-card border border-border shadow-lg rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">Drop here</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Select copy or move from handle</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Resize handle */}
      {!isLast && !panel.isMinimized && !isDraggingGlobal && (
        <div
          className={cn(
            'absolute right-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-1 cursor-col-resize z-10',
            'hover:bg-primary/50 transition-colors',
            isResizing && 'bg-primary'
          )}
          onMouseDown={startResize}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/StoragePanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { FileGrid } from '../FileManager/FileGrid';
import { FileList } from '../FileManager/FileList';
import { Toolbar } from '../FileManager/Toolbar';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';

interface StoragePanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  isLoading: boolean;
  onRefresh: () => void;
}

export function StoragePanel({ panel, entries, isLoading, onRefresh }: StoragePanelProps) {
  const navigatePanelForward = usePanelStore((s) => s.navigatePanelForward);
  const navigatePanelBack = usePanelStore((s) => s.navigatePanelBack);
  const setPanelViewMode = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelViewMode);
  const setPanelSortBy = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSortBy);
  const refreshPanelDirectory = usePanelStore((s) => s.refreshPanelDirectory);

  const handleNavigateTo = async (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => {
    if (entry.kind !== 'directory') return;
    navigatePanelForward(panel.id, entry.handle, entry.name);
    await refreshPanelDirectory(panel.id);
    onRefresh();
  };

  const handleNavigateBack = () => {
    navigatePanelBack(panel.id);
    refreshPanelDirectory(panel.id);
    onRefresh();
  };

  const getSortedEntries = () => {
    const sorted = [...entries];
    switch (panel.sortBy) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      case 'date':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.lastModified.getTime() - a.lastModified.getTime());
      case 'size':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.size - a.size);
      default:
        return sorted;
    }
  };

  const canGoBack = panel.history.length > 0;

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <Toolbar
        viewMode={panel.viewMode}
        onViewModeChange={(mode) => setPanelViewMode(panel.id, mode)}
        sortBy={panel.sortBy}
        onSortChange={(sort) => setPanelSortBy(panel.id, sort)}
        onNavigateBack={handleNavigateBack}
        onRefresh={onRefresh}
        canGoBack={canGoBack}
        isLoading={isLoading}
        currentPath={panel.path}
        panelId={panel.id}
        sourceType="storage"
        panelHandle={panel.handle}
        onRefreshComplete={onRefresh}
      />

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {entries.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p className="text-lg font-medium">Empty folder</p>
            <p className="text-sm">Create a new folder or file using the + button</p>
          </div>
        ) : panel.viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <FileGrid
            entries={getSortedEntries()}
            onNavigate={handleNavigateTo}
            panelId={panel.id}
          />
        ) : (
          <FileList
            entries={getSortedEntries()}
            onNavigate={handleNavigateTo}
            panelId={panel.id}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Permission/PermissionIndicator.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Shield, ShieldCheck, ShieldAlert, ShieldX, ChevronDown, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export type PermissionLevel = 'none' | 'read' | 'write' | 'execute' | 'full';

interface PermissionConfig {
  level: PermissionLevel;
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  color: string;
}

const DRIVE_PERMISSIONS: PermissionConfig[] = [
  { level: 'none', label: 'No Access', icon: ShieldX, color: 'text-destructive' },
  { level: 'read', label: 'Viewer', icon: Shield, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { level: 'write', label: 'Editor', icon: ShieldCheck, color: 'text-green-500' },
  { level: 'full', label: 'Full Control', icon: ShieldAlert, color: 'text-primary' },
];

const GITHUB_PERMISSIONS: PermissionConfig[] = [
  { level: 'none', label: 'No Access', icon: ShieldX, color: 'text-destructive' },
  { level: 'read', label: 'Read', icon: Shield, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { level: 'write', label: 'Triage', icon: ShieldCheck, color: 'text-yellow-500' },
  { level: 'full', label: 'Admin', icon: ShieldAlert, color: 'text-primary' },
];

const TERMINAL_PERMISSIONS: PermissionConfig[] = [
  { level: 'none', label: '---', icon: ShieldX, color: 'text-destructive' },
  { level: 'read', label: 'r--', icon: Shield, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { level: 'write', label: 'rw-', icon: ShieldCheck, color: 'text-green-500' },
  { level: 'execute', label: 'rwx', icon: ShieldAlert, color: 'text-primary' },
];

interface PermissionIndicatorProps {
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  currentLevel: PermissionLevel;
  itemPath: string;
  itemId?: string;
  onChange?: (newLevel: PermissionLevel) => Promise<void>;
  showLabel?: boolean;
}

export function PermissionIndicator({
  sourceType,
  currentLevel,
  itemPath,
  itemId,
  onChange,
  showLabel = false,
}: PermissionIndicatorProps) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [localLevel, setLocalLevel] = useState<PermissionLevel>(currentLevel);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const permissions = sourceType === 'drive' ? DRIVE_PERMISSIONS
    : sourceType === 'github' ? GITHUB_PERMISSIONS
    : sourceType === 'terminal' ? TERMINAL_PERMISSIONS
    : DRIVE_PERMISSIONS;

  const currentConfig = permissions.find(p => p.level === localLevel) || permissions[0];
  const Icon = currentConfig.icon;

  const handleSelect = async (level: PermissionLevel) => {
    if (!onChange) return;
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      await onChange(level);
      setLocalLevel(level);
      setIsOpen(false);
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
      setTimeout(() => setError(null), 3000);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    setLocalLevel(currentLevel);
  }, [currentLevel]);

  return (
    <div className="relative inline-block">
      <button
        onClick={() => onChange && setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className={cn(
          "flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs transition-colors",
          currentConfig.color,
          isLoading && "opacity-50",
          onChange && "hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer"
        )}
        disabled={isLoading || !onChange}
        title={`Current permission: ${currentConfig.label}. Click to change.`}
      >
        {isLoading ? (
          <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" />
        ) : (
          <Icon className="w-3 h-3" />
        )}
        {showLabel && <span>{currentConfig.label}</span>}
        {onChange && !isLoading && <ChevronDown className="w-2.5 h-2.5" />}
      </button>

      {error && (
        <div className="absolute bottom-full left-0 mb-1 px-2 py-1 bg-destructive text-white text-xs rounded whitespace-nowrap z-50">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {isOpen && onChange && (
        <>
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} />
          <div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-1 z-50 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg p-1 min-w-[120px]">
            {permissions.map(perm => (
              <button
                key={perm.level}
                onClick={() => handleSelect(perm.level)}
                className={cn(
                  "w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded hover:bg-accent",
                  localLevel === perm.level && "bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                )}
              >
                <perm.icon className={cn("w-3 h-3", perm.color)} />
                <span>{perm.label}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PanelContainer.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { usePanelStore, usePanels, useActivePanelId } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { ResizablePanel } from './Panel/ResizablePanel';
import { GlobalSearchBar } from './Search/GlobalSearchBar';
import { FilterPanel } from './Search/FilterPanel';
import { SearchResultsOverlay } from './Search/SearchResultsOverlay';
import { Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { MAX_PANELS } from '@/types/panel';

export function PanelContainer() {
  const panels = usePanels();
  const activePanelId = useActivePanelId();
  const { addPanel, removePanel, setActivePanel } = usePanelStore();

  const canAddPanel = panels.length < MAX_PANELS;

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-background">
      {/* Top bar with search */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
        <GlobalSearchBar />
        
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="sm"
          onClick={addPanel}
          disabled={!canAddPanel}
          className="shrink-0 gap-2"
        >
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
          Add Panel
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Filter Panel */}
      <FilterPanel />

      {/* Search Results */}
      <SearchResultsOverlay />

      {/* Panels */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden">
        {panels.map((panel, index) => (
          <ResizablePanel
            key={panel.id}
            panel={panel}
            isActive={panel.id === activePanelId}
            isLast={index === panels.length - 1}
            onActivate={() => setActivePanel(panel.id)}
            onClose={() => removePanel(panel.id)}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/LinkListPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Plus, Copy, Share2, Trash2, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';

interface LinkItem { id: string; name: string; link: string; note: string; }
interface LinkListPanelProps { onClose: () => void; onLinksChange?: (links: LinkItem[]) => void; }

export function LinkListPanel({ onClose, onLinksChange }: LinkListPanelProps) {
  const [links, setLinks] = useState<LinkItem[]>([]);
  const [newLink, setNewLink] = useState({ name: '', link: '', note: '' });
  const addLink = () => {
    if (!newLink.name.trim() || !newLink.link.trim()) return;
    const id = Date.now().toString();
    const updated = [...links, { ...newLink, id }];
    setLinks(updated);
    setNewLink({ name: '', link: '', note: '' });
    onLinksChange?.(updated);
  };
  const deleteLink = (id: string) => { const updated = links.filter(l => l.id !== id); setLinks(updated); onLinksChange?.(updated); };
  const copyAllLinks = async () => { const text = links.map(l => `${l.name}\n${l.link}\n${l.note || 'No note'}\n---`).join('\n\n'); await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); alert('All links copied'); };
  const shareAsText = () => { const text = links.map(l => `Name: ${l.name}\nLink: ${l.link}\nNote: ${l.note}\n`).join('\n---\n'); const blob = new Blob([text], { type: 'text/plain' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); window.open(url); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); };
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border"><h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Link Manager</h2><button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button></div>
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4 space-y-3">
          {links.length === 0 ? <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8"><p>No links added yet</p><p className="text-sm">Use the form below to add links</p></div> : links.map(link => (
            <div key={link.id} className="p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/30">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between"><div className="flex-1"><p className="font-medium">{link.name}</p><a href={link.link} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="text-sm text-primary hover:underline break-all">{link.link}</a>{link.note && <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">{link.note}</p>}</div><div className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-2"><button onClick={() => navigator.clipboard.writeText(`${link.name}\n${link.link}\n${link.note}`)} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded" title="Copy"><Copy className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => deleteLink(link.id)} className="p-1 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded" title="Delete"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" /></button></div></div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border space-y-3">
          <Input placeholder="Link name (e.g., Documentation)" value={newLink.name} onChange={(e) => setNewLink({ ...newLink, name: e.target.value })} />
          <Input placeholder="URL" value={newLink.link} onChange={(e) => setNewLink({ ...newLink, link: e.target.value })} />
          <Textarea placeholder="Note (optional)" value={newLink.note} onChange={(e) => setNewLink({ ...newLink, note: e.target.value })} rows={2} />
          <Button onClick={addLink} disabled={!newLink.name || !newLink.link} className="w-full"><Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Add Link</Button>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2 p-4 border-t border-border bg-muted/30"><Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={copyAllLinks}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Copy All</Button><Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={shareAsText}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Share as TXT</Button></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Folder, File, Plus, Pencil, Trash2, Archive, X, Check, Grid3X3, List } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { usePromptStore } from '@/stores/promptStore';

interface PromptFileAreaProps { panelId: string; }

export function PromptFileArea({ panelId }: PromptFileAreaProps) {
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid'|'list'>('list');
  const [newFolderName, setNewFolderName] = useState('');
  const [showNewFolderInput, setShowNewFolderInput] = useState(false);
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string|null>(null);
  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('');
  const currentSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.currentSession);
  const addFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.addFile);
  const deleteFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFile);
  const renameFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFile);
  const createFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.createFolder);
  const deleteFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFolder);
  const renameFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFolder);
  const compressFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.compressFile);
  const files = currentSession?.files || [];

  const handleCreateFolder = () => { if (newFolderName.trim()) { createFolder(newFolderName.trim(), '/'); setNewFolderName(''); setShowNewFolderInput(false); } };
  const handleRename = (id: string, isFolder: boolean, currentName: string) => { if (renameValue.trim() && renameValue !== currentName) { if (isFolder) renameFolder(id, renameValue.trim()); else renameFile(id, renameValue.trim()); } setRenamingId(null); setRenameValue(''); };
  const handleCompress = (fileId: string) => { const profile = prompt('Select compression profile: zip, 7z, tar.gz', 'zip'); if (profile) compressFile(fileId, [profile]); };
  const renderFileItem = (file: any) => {
    const isRenaming = renamingId === file.id;
    return (
      <div key={file.id} className={cn("flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent group", viewMode === 'grid' ? "flex-col text-center" : "")}>
        <div className={cn("flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0", viewMode === 'grid' && "flex-col")}>
          {file.type === 'folder' ? <Folder className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" /> : <File className="w-8 h-8 text-muted-foreground" />}
          {isRenaming ? (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1"><Input value={renameValue} onChange={(e) => setRenameValue(e.target.value)} className="h-8 text-sm" autoFocus onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRename(file.id, file.type === 'folder', file.name); if (e.key === 'Escape') setRenamingId(null); }} /><button onClick={() => handleRename(file.id, file.type === 'folder', file.name)} className="p-1 text-green-500"><Check className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => setRenamingId(null)} className="p-1 text-destructive"><X className="w-4 h-4" /></button></div>
          ) : ( <><span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{file.name}</span>{file.size && <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{formatBytes(file.size)}</span>}</> )}
        </div>
        {!isRenaming && (<div className={cn("flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100", viewMode === 'grid' && "mt-2")}><button onClick={() => { setRenamingId(file.id); setRenameValue(file.name); }} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><Pencil className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => handleCompress(file.id)} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><Archive className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => { if (confirm('Delete?')) deleteFile(file.id); }} className="p-1 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" /></button></div>)}
      </div>
    );
  };
  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border"><div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(true)}><Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> New Folder</Button></div><div className="flex items-center border rounded-md"><button onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')} className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-l-md", viewMode === 'grid' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}><Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-r-md", viewMode === 'list' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}><List className="w-4 h-4" /></button></div></div>
      {showNewFolderInput && (<div className="p-3 border-b border-border"><div className="flex gap-2"><Input placeholder="Folder name" value={newFolderName} onChange={(e) => setNewFolderName(e.target.value)} autoFocus onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleCreateFolder()} /><Button size="sm" onClick={handleCreateFolder}>Create</Button><Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(false)}>Cancel</Button></div></div>)}
      <div className={cn("flex-1 overflow-auto p-3", viewMode === 'grid' ? "grid grid-cols-2 gap-3" : "space-y-2")}>
        {files.length === 0 ? (<div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground"><Folder className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" /><p className="text-sm">No files or folders</p><p className="text-xs">Drag & drop from main panels or create a folder</p></div>) : files.map(renderFileItem)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
function formatBytes(bytes: number): string { if (bytes === 0) return '0 B'; const units = ['B','KB','MB','GB']; let size=bytes; let i=0; while(size>=1024 && i<units.length-1) { size/=1024; i++; } return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`; }
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptFileManager.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { useDragDrop } from '@/components/DragDrop/useDragDrop';
import { Folder, File, Plus, Pencil, Trash2, Archive, X, Check, Grid3X3, List, ChevronRight, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { MultiCompressPanel, CompressionProfile } from '@/components/DFOL/MultiCompressPanel';

export function PromptFileManager() {
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const addFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.addFile);
  const deleteFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFile);
  const renameFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFile);
  const createFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.createFolder);
  const deleteFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFolder);
  const renameFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFolder);
  const compressFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.compressFile);
  
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('list');
  const [newFolderName, setNewFolderName] = useState('');
  const [showNewFolderInput, setShowNewFolderInput] = useState(false);
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('');
  const [showCompressPanel, setShowCompressPanel] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [expandedFolders, setExpandedFolders] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set(['root']));

  const folderStructure = currentSession?.folderStructure;
  const files = currentSession?.files || [];

  if (!currentSession) return null;

  const handleCreateFolder = () => {
    if (newFolderName.trim()) {
      createFolder(newFolderName.trim(), '/');
      setNewFolderName('');
      setShowNewFolderInput(false);
    }
  };

  const handleRename = (id: string, isFolder: boolean, currentName: string) => {
    if (renameValue.trim() && renameValue !== currentName) {
      if (isFolder) renameFolder(id, renameValue.trim());
      else renameFile(id, renameValue.trim());
    }
    setRenamingId(null);
    setRenameValue('');
  };

  const handleCompress = (fileId: string, profiles: CompressionProfile[]) => {
    // Store compression profiles in the file
    compressFile(fileId, profiles);
    setShowCompressPanel(null);
  };

  const toggleFolder = (folderId: string) => {
    setExpandedFolders(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(folderId)) next.delete(folderId);
      else next.add(folderId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const renderTreeItem = (item: any, depth: number = 0) => {
    const isFolder = 'children' in item;
    const isExpanded = expandedFolders.has(item.id);
    const isRenaming = renamingId === item.id;
    const fileObj = !isFolder ? files.find(f => f.id === item.id) : null;

    return (
      <div key={item.id}>
        <div
          className={cn(
            "flex items-center gap-1 py-1 px-2 rounded hover:bg-accent group",
            depth > 0 && "ml-4"
          )}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
        >
          {isFolder && (
            <button
              onClick={() => toggleFolder(item.id)}
              className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded shrink-0"
            >
              {isExpanded ? (
                <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" />
              ) : (
                <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />
              )}
            </button>
          )}
          {!isFolder && <span className="w-4 shrink-0" />}
          
          {isFolder ? (
            <Folder className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
          )}
          
          {isRenaming ? (
            <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-1">
              <Input
                value={renameValue}
                onChange={(e) => setRenameValue(e.target.value)}
                className="h-7 text-sm flex-1"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRename(item.id, isFolder, item.name);
                  if (e.key === 'Escape') setRenamingId(null);
                }}
              />
              <button onClick={() => handleRename(item.id, isFolder, item.name)} className="p-1 text-green-500">
                <Check className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>
              <button onClick={() => setRenamingId(null)} className="p-1 text-destructive">
                <X className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              <span className="flex-1 text-sm truncate">{item.name}</span>
              {fileObj && fileObj.isCompressed && (
                <Archive className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
              )}
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 shrink-0">
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    setRenamingId(item.id);
                    setRenameValue(item.name);
                  }}
                  className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
                >
                  <Pencil className="w-3 h-3" />
                </button>
                {!isFolder && (
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setShowCompressPanel(item.id)}
                    className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
                  >
                    <Archive className="w-3 h-3" />
                  </button>
                )}
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    if (confirm(`Delete ${isFolder ? 'folder' : 'file'} "${item.name}"?`)) {
                      if (isFolder) deleteFolder(item.id);
                      else deleteFile(item.id);
                    }
                  }}
                  className="p-1 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded"
                >
                  <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-destructive" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
        {isFolder && isExpanded && item.children && (
          <div>
            {item.children.map((child: any) => renderTreeItem(child, depth + 1))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };

  // Drop zone for drag-drop from main panels
  const handleDrop = useCallback(async (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const dragData = JSON.parse(e.dataTransfer.getData('application/json'));
    if (dragData && dragData.item) {
      addFile({
        name: dragData.item.name,
        size: dragData.item.size || 0,
        type: dragData.item.type || 'application/octet-stream',
        source: 'drag-drop',
        sourcePath: dragData.item.path,
        sourcePanelId: dragData.panelId,
        folderPath: '/',
        isCompressed: false,
      });
    }
  }, [addFile]);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      {/* Toolbar */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(true)}>
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> New Folder
          </Button>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md">
          <button
            onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
            className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-l-md", viewMode === 'grid' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setViewMode('list')}
            className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-r-md", viewMode === 'list' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}
          >
            <List className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* New Folder Input */}
      {showNewFolderInput && (
        <div className="p-2 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Input
              placeholder="Folder name"
              value={newFolderName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewFolderName(e.target.value)}
              autoFocus
              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleCreateFolder()}
              className="h-8 text-sm"
            />
            <Button size="sm" onClick={handleCreateFolder}>Create</Button>
            <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(false)}>Cancel</Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* File Tree / Grid */}
      <div
        className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-2"
        onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
        onDrop={handleDrop}
      >
        {folderStructure && folderStructure.children.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <Folder className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-sm">No files or folders</p>
            <p className="text-xs">Drag & drop from main panels or create a folder</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
            {folderStructure?.children.map((item: any) => {
              const isFolder = 'children' in item;
              const fileObj = !isFolder ? files.find(f => f.id === item.id) : null;
              return (
                <div key={item.id} className="p-2 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-center group">
                  {isFolder ? <Folder className="w-8 h-8 mx-auto text-primary" /> : <File className="w-8 h-8 mx-auto text-muted-foreground" />}
                  <p className="text-xs truncate mt-1">{item.name}</p>
                  {fileObj?.isCompressed && <Archive className="w-3 h-3 mx-auto mt-1" />}
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1 mt-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100">
                    <button onClick={() => { setRenamingId(item.id); setRenameValue(item.name); }}><Pencil className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
                    {!isFolder && <button onClick={() => setShowCompressPanel(item.id)}><Archive className="w-3 h-3" /></button>}
                    <button onClick={() => { if (confirm('Delete?')) isFolder ? deleteFolder(item.id) : deleteFile(item.id); }}><Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-destructive" /></button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-0.5">
            {folderStructure?.children.map((item: any) => renderTreeItem(item))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Multi-Compress Panel */}
      {showCompressPanel && (
        <MultiCompressPanel
          isOpen={true}
          onClose={() => setShowCompressPanel(null)}
          itemName={files.find(f => f.id === showCompressPanel)?.name || 'file'}
          onSave={(profiles) => handleCompress(showCompressPanel, profiles)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptFileManager.tsx.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptFolderStructure, usePromptSessionFiles } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { Folder, File, Plus, Trash2, Edit2, Archive, MoreVertical, ChevronRight, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { PromptFile, PromptFolder } from '@/types/prompt';

export function PromptFileManager() {
  const folderStructure = usePromptFolderStructure();
  const files = usePromptSessionFiles();
  const createFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.createFolder);
  const renameFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFolder);
  const deleteFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFolder);
  const addFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.addFile);
  const renameFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFile);
  const deleteFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFile);
  const compressFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.compressFile);

  const [expandedFolders, setExpandedFolders] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set(['root']));
  const [selectedItem, setSelectedItem] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [newName, setNewName] = useState('');

  const toggleFolder = (folderId: string) => {
    const newExpanded = new Set(expandedFolders);
    if (newExpanded.has(folderId)) {
      newExpanded.delete(folderId);
    } else {
      newExpanded.add(folderId);
    }
    setExpandedFolders(newExpanded);
  };

  const handleCreateFolder = () => {
    const name = prompt('Folder name:');
    if (name) {
      createFolder(name, '/');
    }
  };

  const handleUpload = () => {
    const input = document.createElement('input');
    input.type = 'file';
    input.multiple = true;
    input.onchange = (e) => {
      const files = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files;
      if (files) {
        Array.from(files).forEach(file => {
          addFile({
            name: file.name,
            size: file.size,
            type: file.type,
            source: 'upload',
            folderPath: '/',
            isCompressed: false,
            content: file,
          });
        });
      }
    };
    input.click();
  };

  const startRename = (item: PromptFile | PromptFolder) => {
    setRenamingId(item.id);
    setNewName(item.name);
  };

  const confirmRename = () => {
    if (renamingId && newName) {
      const isFolder = 'children' in (files.find(f => f.id === renamingId) || {});
      if (isFolder) {
        renameFolder(renamingId, newName);
      } else {
        renameFile(renamingId, newName);
      }
    }
    setRenamingId(null);
    setNewName('');
  };

  const renderItem = (item: PromptFile | PromptFolder, depth = 0) => {
    const isFolder = 'children' in item;
    const isExpanded = expandedFolders.has(item.id);
    const isSelected = selectedItem === item.id;
    const isRenaming = renamingId === item.id;

    return (
      <div key={item.id}>
        <div
          className={cn(
            "flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group",
            isSelected && "bg-accent",
            depth > 0 && "border-l border-border ml-3"
          )}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${12 + depth * 16}px` }}
          onClick={() => setSelectedItem(item.id)}
        >
          {isFolder && (
            <button
              onClick={(e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                toggleFolder(item.id);
              }}
              className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"
            >
              {isExpanded ? (
                <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
              ) : (
                <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
              )}
            </button>
          )}
          
          {!isFolder && <span className="w-5" />}
          
          {isFolder ? (
            <Folder className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
          )}
          
          {isRenaming ? (
            <input
              type="text"
              value={newName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
              onBlur={confirmRename}
              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && confirmRename()}
              className="flex-1 px-2 py-0.5 text-sm border rounded bg-background"
              autoFocus
            />
          ) : (
            <span className="flex-1 text-sm truncate">{item.name}</span>
          )}
          
          {!isFolder && (item as PromptFile).isCompressed && (
            <Archive className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
          )}
          
          {/* Actions */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="icon"
              className="h-6 w-6"
              onClick={(e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                startRename(item);
              }}
            >
              <Edit2 className="w-3 h-3" />
            </Button>
            
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="icon"
              className="h-6 w-6"
              onClick
Kimi: ={(e) => {
e.stopPropagation();
if (isFolder) {
deleteFolder(item.id);
} else {
deleteFile(item.id);
}
}}
>

        {isFolder && isExpanded && (
          <div>
            {(item as PromptFolder).children.map(child => 
              renderItem(child, depth + 1)
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    );

};

return (

{/ Toolbar /}

Folder

Upload

      {/* File Tree */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {renderItem(folderStructure)}
      </div>

      {/* Status */}
      <div className="p-2 border-t border-border text-xs text-muted-foreground">
        {files.length} files • {formatBytes(files.reduce((sum, f) => sum + f.size, 0))}
      </div>
    </div>

);
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
let size = bytes;
let unitIndex = 0;
while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
size /= 1024;
unitIndex++;
}
return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession, usePromptSessions, usePromptIsOpen } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { PromptFileManager } from './PromptFileManager';
import { PromptWritingArea } from './PromptWritingArea';
import { PromptSessionList } from './PromptSessionList';
import { PromptNotesPanel } from './PromptNotesPanel';
import { PromptUploadPanel } from './PromptUploadPanel';
import { X, Save, FolderPlus, Check, Cloud, Settings, List, Files } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { Resizable } from 're-resizable';

export function PromptManagerPage() {
  const isOpen = usePromptIsOpen();
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const sessions = usePromptSessions();
  const closePromptManager = usePromptStore((s) => s.closePromptManager);
  const saveSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.saveSession);
  const createSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.createSession);
  const [showNotes, setShowNotes] = useState(false);
  const [showUpload, setShowUpload] = useState(false);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'files' | 'sessions'>('files');

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && !currentSession) {
      createSession('Untitled Session');
    }
  }, [isOpen, currentSession, createSession]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Prompt Manager</h1>
          {currentSession && (
            <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              {currentSession.name}
              {currentSession.isCompleted && (
                <span className="ml-2 text-green-600">✓ Completed</span>
              )}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowNotes(!showNotes)}>
            <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            Notes
          </Button>
          
          <Button 
            variant={currentSession?.isCompleted ? 'secondary' : 'default'}
            size="sm"
            onClick={() => setShowUpload(true)}
          >
            <Cloud className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            {currentSession?.isCompleted ? 'Uploaded' : 'Complete'}
          </Button>
          
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={closePromptManager}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-hidden">
        {/* Left Side - File Manager & Sessions */}
        <Resizable
          defaultSize={{ width: '40%', height: '100%' }}
          minWidth="20%"
          maxWidth="60%"
          enable={{ right: true }}
          className="flex flex-col border-r border-border"
        >
          {/* Tabs */}
          <div className="flex border-b border-border">
            <button
              className={cn(
                "flex-1 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2",
                activeTab === 'files' ? "bg-accent text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent/50"
              )}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('files')}
            >
              <Files className="w-4 h-4" />
              Files
            </button>
            <button
              className={cn(
                "flex-1 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2",
                activeTab === 'sessions' ? "bg-accent text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent/50"
              )}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('sessions')}
            >
              <List className="w-4 h-4" />
              Sessions ({sessions.length})
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Content */}
          <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
            {activeTab === 'files' ? (
              <PromptFileManager />
            ) : (
              <PromptSessionList />
            )}
          </div>
        </Resizable>

        {/* Right Side - Writing Area */}
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <PromptWritingArea />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Overlays */}
      {showNotes && (
        <PromptNotesPanel onClose={() => setShowNotes(false)} />
      )}
      
      {showUpload && (
        <PromptUploadPanel onClose={() => setShowUpload(false)} />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
