import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

export function KeepReplaceDialog({ isOpen = false, onClose, fileName = 'file', onKeep, onReplace }: any) {
  return (
    <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>
      <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>File already exists</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>File "{fileName}" already exists.</DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <DialogFooter className="flex gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onKeep}>Keep Both</Button>
          <Button variant="destructive" onClick={onReplace}>Replace</Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Rename/InlineRenameInput.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Loader2, Check, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { conversionEngine } from '@/lib/conversionEngine';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';

interface InlineRenameInputProps {
  item: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    path: string;
    sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
    panelId: string;
    handle?: any;
    isDirectory?: boolean;
  };
  onComplete?: () => void;
}

export function InlineRenameInput({ item, onComplete }: InlineRenameInputProps) {
  const [value, setValue] = useState(item.name);
  const [isConverting, setIsConverting] = useState(false);
  const [conversionProgress, setConversionProgress] = useState(0);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const panelStore = usePanelStore();

  useEffect(() => {
    inputRef.current?.focus();
    inputRef.current?.select();
  }, []);

  const getExtension = (filename: string): string => {
    const lastDot = filename.lastIndexOf('.');
    return lastDot > 0 ? filename.slice(lastDot).toLowerCase() : '';
  };

  const getBaseName = (filename: string): string => {
    const lastDot = filename.lastIndexOf('.');
    return lastDot > 0 ? filename.slice(0, lastDot) : filename;
  };

  const handleConfirm = async () => {
    if (value === item.name) {
      onComplete?.();
      return;
    }

    const oldExt = getExtension(item.name);
    const newExt = getExtension(value);
    const isFolderToArchive = item.isDirectory && newExt !== '';

    // Case 1: Folder to archive (e.g., foldername → foldername.zip)
    if (isFolderToArchive && conversionEngine.canConvert('folder', newExt)) {
      setIsConverting(true);
      try {
        // Gather folder contents (simplified: we assume we can zip the folder)
        // In real implementation, you'd read all files recursively.
        // Here we show a mock conversion:
        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
        // After conversion, we would save the archive and delete original if needed
        setConversionProgress(100);
        // Rename operation completed
        onComplete?.();
      } catch (err) {
        setError((err as Error).message);
        setIsConverting(false);
      }
      return;
    }

    // Case 2: File extension change → conversion
    if (!item.isDirectory && oldExt !== newExt && conversionEngine.canConvert(oldExt, newExt)) {
      setIsConverting(true);
      try {
        // Read original file as Blob
        let originalBlob: Blob;
        if (item.sourceType === 'storage' && item.handle) {
          const file = await item.handle.getFile();
          originalBlob = file;
        } else {
          throw new Error('Unsupported source for conversion');
        }

        const result = await conversionEngine.convert(
          originalBlob,
          oldExt,
          newExt,
          (progress) => setConversionProgress(progress)
        );

        if (result.success && result.blob) {
          // Show keep/replace dialog (simplified: replace original)
          // For production, implement a proper dialog.
          const replace = confirm(`Converted to ${newExt}. Replace original?`);
          if (replace) {
            // Save converted file, delete original
            if (item.sourceType === 'storage' && item.handle) {
              const parentHandle = await item.handle.getParent(); // Need proper parent retrieval
              // Write new file, delete old
            }
          } else {
            // Keep both: save as new file with new name
          }
        } else {
          throw new Error(result.error || 'Conversion failed');
        }
        onComplete?.();
      } catch (err) {
        setError((err as Error).message);
        setIsConverting(false);
      }
      return;
    }

    // Case 3: Simple rename (no conversion)
    try {
      // Perform rename via panel store or direct API
      if (item.sourceType === 'storage' && item.handle) {
        const parentHandle = await item.handle.getParent();
        if (parentHandle) {
          await parentHandle.moveEntry(item.handle, value);
        }
      }
      onComplete?.();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    }
  };

  const handleCancel = () => {
    onComplete?.();
  };

  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') handleConfirm();
    if (e.key === 'Escape') handleCancel();
  };

  if (isConverting) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-muted rounded">
        <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-primary" />
        <span className="text-sm">Converting... {conversionProgress}%</span>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-destructive/10 rounded">
        <span className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</span>
        <button onClick={handleCancel} className="ml-auto">
          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
        </button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
      <Input
        ref={inputRef}
        value={value}
        onChange={(e) => setValue(e.target.value)}
        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
        className="h-8 text-sm flex-1"
      />
      <button onClick={handleConfirm} className="p-1 text-green-500 hover:bg-accent rounded">
        <Check className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
      <button onClick={handleCancel} className="p-1 text-destructive hover:bg-accent rounded">
        <X className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Rename/WebWorkerConverter.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// Web Worker for running conversions off main thread

const workerCode = `
self.onmessage = async (e) => {
  const { type, fileData, fromExt, toExt } = e.data;
  
  try {
    switch (type) {
      case 'ffmpeg':
        // FFmpeg operations would go here
        // Note: FFmpeg WASM can't easily run in worker due to SharedArrayBuffer
        self.postMessage({ type: 'progress', progress: 50 });
        break;
        
      case 'image':
        // Canvas-based image conversion
        const result = await convertImage(fileData, fromExt, toExt);
        self.postMessage({ type: 'complete', result });
        break;
        
      default:
        throw new Error('Unknown conversion type');
    }
  } catch (error) {
    self.postMessage({ type: 'error', error: error.message });
  }
};

async function convertImage(fileData: ArrayBuffer, fromExt: string, toExt: string): Promise<ArrayBuffer> {
  // Create blob from array buffer
  const blob = new Blob([fileData]);
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  
  try {
    const img = await loadImage(url);
    const canvas = new OffscreenCanvas(img.width, img.height);
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    
    if (!ctx) throw new Error('Canvas context not available');
    
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    
    const mimeType = toExt === '.jpg' || toExt === '.jpeg' 
      ? 'image/jpeg' 
      : toExt === '.webp' 
        ? 'image/webp' 
        : 'image/png';
    
    const outputBlob = await canvas.convertToBlob({ type: mimeType, quality: 0.9 });
    return await outputBlob.arrayBuffer();
  } catch (error) {
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    throw error;
  }
}

function loadImage(url: string): Promise<ImageBitmap> {
  return fetch(url)
    .then(r => r.blob())
    .then(b => createImageBitmap(b));
}
`;

// Create worker from code string
export function createConverterWorker(): Worker {
  const blob = new Blob([workerCode], { type: 'application/javascript' });
  const workerUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  return new Worker(workerUrl);
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Search/FilterPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useSearchStore, useSearchFilters, useAvailableExtensions, useAvailableAccounts, useIsFilterPanelOpen } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { X, HardDrive, Github, FolderGit, Terminal, File, Folder, Eye, EyeOff, Calendar, HardDriveIcon, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';

const sourceIcons = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

export function FilterPanel() {
  const isOpen = useIsFilterPanelOpen();
  const filters = useSearchFilters();
  const extensions = useAvailableExtensions();
  const accounts = useAvailableAccounts();
  const setFilters = useSearchStore((s) => s.setFilters);
  const resetFilters = useSearchStore((s) => s.resetFilters);
  const toggleFilterPanel = useSearchStore((s) => s.toggleFilterPanel);
  const [extensionSearch, setExtensionSearch] = useState('');

  const filteredExtensions = useMemo(() => {
    if (!extensionSearch) return extensions.slice(0, 50);
    return extensions.filter(e => e.extension.toLowerCase().includes(extensionSearch.toLowerCase())).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
  }, [extensions, extensionSearch]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const toggleSource = (source: string) => {
    const newSources = filters.sources.includes(source as any) ? filters.sources.filter(s => s !== source) : [...filters.sources, source as any];
    setFilters({ sources: newSources });
  };

  const toggleAccount = (accountId: string) => {
    const newAccounts = filters.accounts.includes(accountId) ? filters.accounts.filter(a => a !== accountId) : [...filters.accounts, accountId];
    setFilters({ accounts: newAccounts });
  };

  const toggleExtension = (ext: string) => {
    const newExtensions = filters.extensions.includes(ext) ? filters.extensions.filter(e => e !== ext) : [...filters.extensions, ext];
    setFilters({ extensions: newExtensions });
  };

  const activeFilterCount = (filters.sources.length < 4 ? 1 : 0) + (filters.accounts.length > 0 ? 1 : 0) + (filters.extensions.length > 0 ? 1 : 0) + (filters.type !== 'all' ? 1 : 0) + (filters.includeHidden ? 1 : 0);

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-20 bg-black/30 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-4xl max-h-[80vh] bg-background rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Search Filters</h2>
            {activeFilterCount > 0 && <Badge variant="secondary">{activeFilterCount} active</Badge>}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={resetFilters}>Reset All</Button>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={toggleFilterPanel}><X className="w-4 h-4" /></Button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden flex">
          <div className="w-1/3 border-r border-border p-4 space-y-6">
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium mb-3 flex items-center gap-2"><HardDriveIcon className="w-4 h-4" />Sources</h3>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {(Object.keys(sourceIcons) as Array<keyof typeof sourceIcons>).map(source => {
                  const Icon = sourceIcons[source];
                  const isActive = filters.sources.includes(source);
                  return (
                    <button key={source} onClick={() => toggleSource(source)} className={cn("w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors", isActive ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "hover:bg-accent text-muted-foreground")}>
                      <Icon className="w-4 h-4" /><span className="capitalize">{source}</span>{isActive && <Badge variant="outline" className="ml-auto text-xs">On</Badge>}
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
            <Separator />
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium mb-3">Accounts</h3>
              <ScrollArea className="h-48">
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {accounts.map(account => {
                    const isActive = filters.accounts.includes(account.id);
                    return (
                      <button key={account.id} onClick={() => toggleAccount(account.id)} className={cn("w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors", isActive ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "hover:bg-accent")}>
                        <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center text-xs">{account.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}</div>
                        <span className="truncate">{account.name}</span>{isActive && <Check className="w-3 h-3 ml-auto" />}
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                  {accounts.length === 0 && <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground text-center py-4">No accounts connected</p>}
                </div>
              </ScrollArea>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="w-1/3 border-r border-border p-4">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-medium mb-3 flex items-center gap-2"><File className="w-4 h-4" />Extensions <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">{extensions.length}</Badge></h3>
            <input type="text" placeholder="Search extensions..." value={extensionSearch} onChange={(e) => setExtensionSearch(e.target.value)} className="w-full px-3 py-2 mb-3 text-sm border rounded-md bg-background" />
            <ScrollArea className="h-96">
              <div className="space-y-1">
                {filteredExtensions.map(ext => {
                  const isActive = filters.extensions.includes(ext.extension);
                  return (
                    <button key={ext.extension} onClick={() => toggleExtension(ext.extension)} className={cn("w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors", isActive ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "hover:bg-accent")}>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2"><span className="font-mono text-xs bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{ext.extension}</span><span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{ext.count.toLocaleString()}</span></div>{isActive && <Check className="w-3 h-3" />}
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </ScrollArea>
          </div>
          <div className="w-1/3 p-4 space-y-6">
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium mb-3 flex items-center gap-2"><Folder className="w-4 h-4" />Type</h3>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {(['all', 'file', 'directory'] as const).map(type => (
                  <button key={type} onClick={() => setFilters({ type })} className={cn("w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors capitalize", filters.type === type ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "hover:bg-accent")}>
                    {type === 'all' && <Eye className="w-4 h-4" />}{type === 'file' && <File className="w-4 h-4" />}{type === 'directory' && <Folder className="w-4 h-4" />}{type}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
            <Separator />
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium mb-3">Options</h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <Checkbox id="includeHidden" checked={filters.includeHidden} onCheckedChange={(checked) => setFilters({ includeHidden: checked as boolean })} />
                  <Label htmlFor="includeHidden" className="flex items-center gap-2">{filters.includeHidden ? <Eye className="w-3 h-3" /> : <EyeOff className="w-3 h-3" />}Include hidden files</Label>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <Separator />
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-sm font-medium mb-2">Active Filters</h3>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                {filters.sources.length < 4 && filters.sources.map(s => <Badge key={s} variant="secondary" className="capitalize">{s}</Badge>)}
                {filters.accounts.map(a => <Badge key={a} variant="secondary">{a.split('@')[0]}</Badge>)}
                {filters.extensions.map(e => <Badge key={e} variant="secondary">{e}</Badge>)}
                {filters.type !== 'all' && <Badge variant="secondary" className="capitalize">{filters.type}s only</Badge>}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Search/GlobalSearchBar.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { Search, Filter, Globe, X, Clock, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { useSearchStore, useSearchQuery, useIsSearching, useIsGlobalMode, useRecentSearches, useIndexedCount } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export function GlobalSearchBar() {
  const query = useSearchQuery();
  const isSearching = useIsSearching();
  const isGlobalMode = useIsGlobalMode();
  const recentSearches = useRecentSearches();
  const indexedCount = useIndexedCount();
  const setQuery = useSearchStore((s) => s.setQuery);
  const toggleFilterPanel = useSearchStore((s) => s.toggleFilterPanel);
  const toggleGlobalMode = useSearchStore((s) => s.toggleGlobalMode);
  const addRecentSearch = useSearchStore((s) => s.addRecentSearch);
  const initializeSearch = useSearchStore((s) => s.initializeSearch);
  
  const [showRecent, setShowRecent] = useState(false);
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    initializeSearch();
  }, [initializeSearch]);

  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    addRecentSearch(query);
    setShowRecent(false);
  };

  const handleRecentClick = (search: string) => {
    setQuery(search);
    setShowRecent(false);
    inputRef.current?.focus();
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-2xl">
      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="relative flex items-center gap-2">
        <div className="relative flex-1">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          
          <Input
            ref={inputRef}
            type="text"
            placeholder={`Search ${indexedCount.toLocaleString()} indexed files...`}
            value={query}
            onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
            onFocus={() => setShowRecent(true)}
            onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setShowRecent(false), 200)}
            className="pl-10 pr-20 h-10"
          />
          
          {/* Clear button */}
          {query && (
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setQuery('')}
              className="absolute right-24 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
            >
              <X className="w-3 h-3" />
            </button>
          )}

          {/* Global mode toggle */}
          <Button
            type="button"
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            onClick={toggleGlobalMode}
            className={cn(
              "absolute right-12 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-6 px-2",
              isGlobalMode && "text-primary bg-primary/10"
            )}
          >
            <Globe className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>

          {/* Filter button */}
          <Button
            type="button"
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            onClick={toggleFilterPanel}
            className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-6 px-2"
          >
            <Filter className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>

          {/* Searching indicator */}
          {isSearching && (
            <Loader2 className="absolute right-32 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-primary" />
          )}
        </div>
      </form>

      {/* Recent searches dropdown */}
      {showRecent && recentSearches.length > 0 && !query && (
        <div className="absolute top-full left-0 right-0 mt-1 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg z-50 py-2">
          <p className="px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
            <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
            Recent Searches
          </p>
          {recentSearches.map((search, index) => (
            <button
              key={index}
              onClick={() => handleRecentClick(search)}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              <Search className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
              {search}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Global mode badge */}
      {isGlobalMode && (
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="absolute -bottom-6 left-0 text-xs">
          <Globe className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />
          Global Search Active
        </Badge>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Search/GlobalSearchOverlay.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { useSearchStore, useSearchResults, useSearchQuery } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useDragDropStore } from '@/stores/dragDropStore';
import { SearchResultItem } from './SearchResultItem';
import { Globe, Link, Unlink, Filter, X, ChevronDown, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface BoundPanel {
  panelId: string;
  source: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  accountId: string | null;
  extensions: string[];
}

export function GlobalSearchOverlay() {
  const [isActive, setIsActive] = useState(false);
  const [boundPanels, setBoundPanels] = useState<BoundPanel[]>([]);
  const [activeFilterPanel, setActiveFilterPanel] = useState<string | null>(null);
  
  const query = useSearchQuery();
  const results = useSearchResults();
  const setQuery = useSearchStore((s) => s.setQuery);
  const panels = usePanelStore((s) => s.panels);
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const dragDropStore = useDragDropStore();

  // Available accounts per source (dynamically loaded from stores)
  const driveAccounts = useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const githubAccounts = useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const storageMounts = ['Internal Storage', 'SD Card', 'USB/OTG', 'PC/Others'];

  const toggleGlobalSearch = () => {
    setIsActive(!isActive);
    if (!isActive) setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);
    else setBoundPanels([]);
  };

  const togglePanelBinding = (panelId: string) => {
    setBoundPanels(prev => {
      const existing = prev.find(b => b.panelId === panelId);
      if (existing) return prev.filter(b => b.panelId !== panelId);
      const panel = panels.find(p => p.id === panelId);
      return [...prev, {
        panelId,
        source: panel?.source || 'storage',
        accountId: null,
        extensions: [],
      }];
    });
  };

  const updateBoundPanel = (panelId: string, updates: Partial<BoundPanel>) => {
    setBoundPanels(prev => prev.map(p => 
      p.panelId === panelId ? { ...p, ...updates } : p
    ));
  };

  const isPanelBound = (panelId: string) => boundPanels.some(b => b.panelId === panelId);

  // When search executes, apply bound panel filters to results
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isActive || boundPanels.length === 0) return;
    // The actual filtering is handled in searchStore, but we need to pass bound panels
    useSearchStore.getState().setBoundPanels(boundPanels);
  }, [boundPanels, query, isActive]);

  if (!isActive) {
    return (
      <button
        onClick={toggleGlobalSearch}
        className="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 p-3 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-full shadow-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all"
      >
        <Globe className="w-6 h-6" />
      </button>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-card border-b border-border shadow-lg">
        <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto p-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="flex-1 relative">
              <input
                ref={inputRef}
                type="text"
                value={query}
                onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Global search across all bound panels..."
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary"
                autoFocus
              />
              {query && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => setQuery('')}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
                >
                  <X className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              )}
            </div>
            <button onClick={toggleGlobalSearch} className="p-2 hover:bg-accent rounded-lg">
              <X className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Panel Binding Row */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">Bind panels:</span>
            {panels.map((panel) => (
              <button
                key={panel.id}
                onClick={() => togglePanelBinding(panel.id)}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs transition-all shrink-0",
                  isPanelBound(panel.id)
                    ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground"
                    : "bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent"
                )}
              >
                {isPanelBound(panel.id) ? <Link className="w-3 h-3" /> : <Unlink className="w-3 h-3" />}
                Panel {panel.id.slice(-1)} ({panel.source})
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Per‑Panel Configuration (only if bound) */}
          {boundPanels.length > 0 && (
            <div className="mt-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
              {boundPanels.map((bp) => (
                <div key={bp.panelId} className="relative bg-muted/30 rounded-lg p-2 text-xs">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                    <span className="font-medium">Panel {bp.panelId.slice(-1)}</span>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => updateBoundPanel(bp.panelId, { source: 'storage', accountId: null })}
                      className="text-primary hover:underline"
                    >
                      Reset
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  
                  {/* Source Selector */}
                  <select
                    value={bp.source}
                    onChange={(e) => updateBoundPanel(bp.panelId, { source: e.target.value as any, accountId: null })}
                    className="w-full text-xs p-1 rounded border bg-background mb-1"
                  >
                    <option value="storage">Storage</option>
                    <option value="drive">Google Drive</option>
                    <option value="github">GitHub</option>
                    <option value="terminal">Terminal</option>
                  </select>

                  {/* Account Selector (dynamic) */}
                  {bp.source === 'drive' && (
                    <select
                      value={bp.accountId || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => updateBoundPanel(bp.panelId, { accountId: e.target.value || null })}
                      className="w-full text-xs p-1 rounded border bg-background"
                    >
                      <option value="">All Drive Accounts</option>
                      {driveAccounts.map(acc => (
                        <option key={acc.id} value={acc.id}>{acc.id.split('@')[0]}</option>
                      ))}
                    </select>
                  )}
                  {bp.source === 'github' && (
                    <select
                      value={bp.accountId || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => updateBoundPanel(bp.panelId, { accountId: e.target.value || null })}
                      className="w-full text-xs p-1 rounded border bg-background"
                    >
                      <option value="">All GitHub Accounts</option>
                      {githubAccounts.map(acc => (
                        <option key={acc.id} value={acc.id}>{acc.id}</option>
                      ))}
                    </select>
                  )}
                  {bp.source === 'storage' && (
                    <select
                      value={bp.accountId || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => updateBoundPanel(bp.panelId, { accountId: e.target.value || null })}
                      className="w-full text-xs p-1 rounded border bg-background"
                    >
                      <option value="">All Storage</option>
                      {storageMounts.map(mount => (
                        <option key={mount} value={mount}>{mount}</option>
                      ))}
                    </select>
                  )}
                  {bp.source === 'terminal' && (
                    <div className="text-muted-foreground text-center text-[10px] mt-1">Terminal root</div>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Search Results */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto max-w-6xl mx-auto w-full p-4">
        {query.trim() === '' ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <Globe className="w-16 h-16 mb-4 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-lg">Global Search</p>
            <p className="text-sm">Bind panels above to search across multiple sources</p>
          </div>
        ) : results.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p className="text-lg">No results found</p>
            <p className="text-sm">Try different keywords or adjust filters</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-2">{results.length} results</p>
            {results.map((result) => (
              <SearchResultItem key={result.item.id} result={result} />
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// Helper imports (add to top)
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Search/SearchResultItem.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { SearchResult } from '@/types/search';
import { File, Folder, HardDrive, Github, FolderGit, Terminal } from 'lucide-react';
import { useDrag } from 'react-dnd';

const sourceIcons = { storage: HardDrive, drive: FolderGit, github: Github, terminal: Terminal };

interface SearchResultItemProps { result: SearchResult; }

export function SearchResultItem({ result }: SearchResultItemProps) {
  const item = result.item;
  const Icon = sourceIcons[item.sourceType];
  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(() => ({
    type: item.sourceType,
    item: { id: item.id, name: item.name, path: item.path, sourceType: item.sourceType, accountId: item.accountId, type: item.type, size: item.size },
    collect: (monitor) => ({ isDragging: !!monitor.isDragging() }),
  }));

  const openItem = () => console.log('Open:', item.path);

  return (
    <div ref={drag} className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-all ${isDragging ? 'opacity-50' : ''}`} onClick={openItem}>
      <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-muted">{item.type === 'directory' ? <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /> : <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />}</div>
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Icon className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" /><span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase">{item.sourceType}</span><span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">•</span><span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">{item.accountId}</span></div>
        <p className="font-medium truncate">{item.name}</p>
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">{item.path}</p>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground"><span>{formatBytes(item.size)}</span><span>•</span><span>{new Date(item.lastModified).toLocaleDateString()}</span>{item.extension && <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-muted rounded text-[10px]">{item.extension}</span>}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string { if (bytes === 0) return '-'; const units = ['B','KB','MB','GB']; let size = bytes; let i=0; while(size>=1024 && i<units.length-1) { size/=1024; i++; } return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`; }
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Search/SearchResultsOverlay.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useSearchStore, useSearchResults, useSearchQuery } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { HardDrive, Github, FolderGit, Terminal, File, Folder, X, ExternalLink, Pencil, Move, MoreVertical } from 'lucide-react';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { DFOLMenu } from '../DFOL/DFOLMenu';
import { TreeIconButton } from '../Tree/TreeIconButton';

const sourceIcons = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

export function SearchResultsOverlay() {
  const results = useSearchResults();
  const query = useSearchQuery();
  const setQuery = useSearchStore((s) => s.setQuery);
  
  const [selectedResult, setSelectedResult] = useState<string | null>(null);

  if (!query.trim() || results.length === 0) return null;

  const handleOpen = (result: any) => {
    // Open in appropriate panel
    console.log('Opening:', result.item.path);
  };

  const handleRename = (result: any) => {
    // Trigger rename
    console.log('Renaming:', result.item.name);
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed top-16 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[70vh] bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl z-40 flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Badge variant="secondary">{results.length} results</Badge>
          <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            for "{query}"
          </span>
        </div>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={() => setQuery('')}>
          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Results */}
      <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
        <div className="divide-y divide-border">
          {results.map((result, index) => {
            const Icon = sourceIcons[result.item.sourceType];
            const isSelected = selectedResult === result.item.id;
            
            return (
              <div
                key={result.item.id}
                className={cn(
                  "group p-3 hover:bg-accent transition-colors cursor-pointer",
                  isSelected && "bg-accent"
                )}
                onClick={() => setSelectedResult(result.item.id)}
                onDoubleClick={() => handleOpen(result)}
              >
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  {/* Icon */}
                  <div className={cn(
                    "w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center shrink-0",
                    result.item.type === 'directory' ? "bg-primary/10" : "bg-muted"
                  )}>
                    {result.item.type === 'directory' ? (
                      <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
                    ) : (
                      <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {/* Content */}
                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Icon className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase">
                        {result.item.sourceType}
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">•</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
                        {result.item.accountId}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    
                    <p className="font-medium truncate" title={result.item.path}>
                      <HighlightMatches text={result.item.name} matches={result.matches} />
                    </p>
                    
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
                      {result.item.path}
                    </p>

                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      <span>{formatBytes(result.item.size)}</span>
                      <span>•</span>
                      <span>{new Date(result.item.lastModified).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
                      {result.item.extension && (
                        <>
                          <span>•</span>
                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1">
                            {result.item.extension}
                          </Badge>
                        </>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Actions */}
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-7 w-7"
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        handleOpen(result);
                      }}
                    >
                      <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </Button>
                    
                    <TreeIconButton
                      item={result.item}
                      sourceType={result.item.sourceType}
                      panelId="search"
                      className="h-7 w-7"
                    />
                    
                    <DFOLMenu
                      item={result.item}
                      sourceType={result.item.sourceType}
                      panelId="search"
                      onRename={() => handleRename(result)}
                      onDelete={() => {}}
                      onTreeView={() => {}}
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Match highlights */}
                {result.matches.length > 0 && result.matches[0].key !== 'name' && (
                  <div className="mt-2 pl-13 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    <HighlightMatches 
                      text={result.matches[0].value} 
                      matches={[result.matches[0]]}
                      maxLength={100}
                    />
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </ScrollArea>

      {/* Footer */}
      <div className="p-2 border-t border-border bg-muted/50 text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
        Double-click to open • Use DFOL menu for batch operations
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function HighlightMatches({ 
  text, 
  matches, 
  maxLength = 50 
}: { 
  text: string; 
  matches: Array<{ key: string; value: string; indices: number[][] }>;
  maxLength?: number;
}) {
  if (!matches || matches.length === 0) {
    return <span>{text.length > maxLength ? text.slice(0, maxLength) + '...' : text}</span>;
  }

  // Get all indices from all matches
  const allIndices = matches.flatMap(m => m.indices);
  allIndices.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);

  // Merge overlapping indices
  const mergedIndices: number[][] = [];
  let current: number[] | null = null;
  
  for (const [start, end] of allIndices) {
    if (!current || start > current[1] + 1) {
      if (current) mergedIndices.push(current);
      current = [start, end];
    } else {
      current[1] = Math.max(current[1], end);
    }
  }
  if (current) mergedIndices.push(current);

  // Build highlighted text
  const parts: React.ReactNode[] = [];
  let lastEnd = 0;
  
  for (const [start, end] of mergedIndices) {
    if (start > lastEnd) {
      parts.push(
        <span key={`text-${lastEnd}`}>
          {text.slice(lastEnd, start)}
        </span>
      );
    }
    parts.push(
      <mark key={`mark-${start}`} className="bg-yellow-200 dark:bg-yellow-900 px-0.5 rounded">
        {text.slice(start, end + 1)}
      </mark>
    );
    lastEnd = end + 1;
  }
  
  if (lastEnd < text.length) {
    parts.push(
      <span key={`text-${lastEnd}`}>
        {text.slice(lastEnd, maxLength)}
      </span>
    );
  }

  return <>{parts}{text.length > maxLength && '...'}</>;
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

import { 
  HardDrive, 
  FolderGit, 
  Github, 
  Terminal,
  FileText,
  Database
} from 'lucide-react';

const placeholderContent: Record<string, { title: string; icon: React.ElementType; component?: React.ReactNode }> = {
  storage: {
    title: 'File Manager',
    icon: Database,
    component: <FileManager panelId="right-panel" />,
  },
  drive: {
    title: 'Drive Files',
    icon: FolderGit,
  },
  github: {
    title: 'GitHub Repositories',
    icon: Github,
  },
  terminal: {
    title: 'Terminal Sessions',
    icon: Terminal,
  },
};

function PlaceholderContent({ source }: { source: string }) {
  const content = placeholderContent[source];
  const Icon = content.icon;

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 bg-background p-6 overflow-auto">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
          <div className="p-3 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 text-primary">
            <Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{content.title}</h2>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">Placeholder for {source} content</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="p-8 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card">
          <p className="text-muted-foreground text-center">
            This feature is not yet implemented.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function RightPanel() {
  const activeSource = useAppStore((state) => state.activeSource);
  const content = placeholderContent[activeSource];

  // If storage is selected, show FileManager
  if (activeSource === 'storage' && content.component) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 h-screen overflow-hidden">
        {content.component}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return <PlaceholderContent source={activeSource} />;
}

export type LanguageMode = 'native' | 'simplified';
interface SourceLanguage { source: 'drive'|'github'|'terminal'; mode: LanguageMode; }
const NATIVE_TERMS = { drive: { folder:'Folder', file:'File', share:'Share', permission:'Permission' }, github: { repository:'Repository', commit:'Commit', branch:'Branch', pull:'Pull Request', fork:'Fork' }, terminal: { directory:'Directory', file:'File', link:'Symbolic Link', execute:'Execute' } };
const SIMPLIFIED_TERMS = { drive: { folder:'Folder', file:'File', share:'Share', permission:'Access' }, github: { repository:'Project', commit:'Save', branch:'Version', pull:'Update', fork:'Copy' }, terminal: { directory:'Folder', file:'File', link:'Shortcut', execute:'Run' } };
interface LanguageSettingsProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; onLanguageChange?: (source: string, mode: LanguageMode) => void; }
export function LanguageSettings({ isOpen, onClose, onLanguageChange }: LanguageSettingsProps) {
  const [driveMode, setDriveMode] = useState<LanguageMode>('native');
  const [githubMode, setGithubMode] = useState<LanguageMode>('native');
  const [terminalMode, setTerminalMode] = useState<LanguageMode>('native');
  useEffect(() => { const saved = localStorage.getItem('languageSettings'); if (saved) { const parsed = JSON.parse(saved); setDriveMode(parsed.drive || 'native'); setGithubMode(parsed.github || 'native'); setTerminalMode(parsed.terminal || 'native'); } }, []);
  const saveSettings = () => { const settings = { drive: driveMode, github: githubMode, terminal: terminalMode }; localStorage.setItem('languageSettings', JSON.stringify(settings)); onLanguageChange?.('drive', driveMode); onLanguageChange?.('github', githubMode); onLanguageChange?.('terminal', terminalMode); onClose(); };
  const getPreview = (source: string, mode: LanguageMode) => { const terms = mode === 'native' ? NATIVE_TERMS[source as keyof typeof NATIVE_TERMS] : SIMPLIFIED_TERMS[source as keyof typeof SIMPLIFIED_TERMS]; if (!terms) return ''; return Object.values(terms).join(' · '); };
  if (!isOpen) return null;
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border"><div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Globe className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /><h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Language Settings</h2></div><button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">✕</button></div>
        <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
          <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-sm font-medium">Google Drive</label><Select value={driveMode} onValueChange={(v) => setDriveMode(v as LanguageMode)}><SelectTrigger><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="native">Native terms (Folder, File, Share)</SelectItem><SelectItem value="simplified">Simplified terms (Folder, File, Share)</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Preview: {getPreview('drive', driveMode)}</p></div>
          <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-sm font-medium">GitHub</label><Select value={githubMode} onValueChange={(v) => setGithubMode(v as LanguageMode)}><SelectTrigger><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="native">Native terms (Repository, Commit, Branch, Pull Request)</SelectItem><SelectItem value="simplified">Simplified terms (Project, Save, Version, Update)</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Preview: {getPreview('github', githubMode)}</p></div>
          <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-sm font-medium">Terminal</label><Select value={terminalMode} onValueChange={(v) => setTerminalMode(v as LanguageMode)}><SelectTrigger><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="native">Native terms (Directory, File, Symbolic Link, Execute)</SelectItem><SelectItem value="simplified">Simplified terms (Folder, File, Shortcut, Run)</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Preview: {getPreview('terminal', terminalMode)}</p></div>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border flex gap-2"><Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} className="flex-1">Cancel</Button><Button onClick={saveSettings} className="flex-1">Save</Button></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

NATIVE_TERMS[source] : SIMPLIFIED_TERMS[source]; return dict[key as string] || String(key); }; return { t, mode }; }

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Settings, ChevronRight, Clock, Globe, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';

interface SettingsPanelProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; }
type SourceChangeBehavior = 'root' | 'last' | 'ask';

export function SettingsPanel({ isOpen, onClose }: SettingsPanelProps) {
  const [sourceBehavior, setSourceBehavior] = useState<SourceChangeBehavior>('ask');
  const [timeFormat, setTimeFormat] = useState<'12h'|'24h'>('24h');
  const [dateFormat, setDateFormat] = useState<'MM/DD/YYYY'|'DD/MM/YYYY'|'YYYY-MM-DD'>('YYYY-MM-DD');
  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false);
  const [deleteTimer, setDeleteTimer] = useState(10);
  const [formatTimer, setFormatTimer] = useState(30);
  const [requireDeletePassword, setRequireDeletePassword] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('settings');
    if (saved) { const s = JSON.parse(saved); setSourceBehavior(s.sourceBehavior || 'ask'); setTimeFormat(s.timeFormat || '24h'); setDateFormat(s.dateFormat || 'YYYY-MM-DD'); setDarkMode(s.darkMode || false); setDeleteTimer(s.deleteTimer || 10); setFormatTimer(s.formatTimer || 30); setRequireDeletePassword(s.requireDeletePassword || false); }
  }, []);

  const saveSettings = () => {
    const settings = { sourceBehavior, timeFormat, dateFormat, darkMode, deleteTimer, formatTimer, requireDeletePassword };
    localStorage.setItem('settings', JSON.stringify(settings));
    if (darkMode) document.documentElement.classList.add('dark'); else document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('settingsChanged', { detail: settings }));
    onClose();
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border"><div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Settings className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /><h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Settings</h2></div><button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" /></button></div>
        <div className="p-4 space-y-4 max-h-[70vh] overflow-auto">
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Source Change Behavior</label><Select value={sourceBehavior} onValueChange={(v) => setSourceBehavior(v as any)}><SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="root">Always start from root</SelectItem><SelectItem value="last">Continue from last used path</SelectItem><SelectItem value="ask">Ask every time</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">When switching sources in a panel</p></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Time Format</label><Select value={timeFormat} onValueChange={(v) => setTimeFormat(v as any)}><SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="12h">12-hour (hh:mm AM/PM)</SelectItem><SelectItem value="24h">24-hour (HH:mm)</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Date Format</label><Select value={dateFormat} onValueChange={(v) => setDateFormat(v as any)}><SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="MM/DD/YYYY">MM/DD/YYYY</SelectItem><SelectItem value="DD/MM/YYYY">DD/MM/YYYY</SelectItem><SelectItem value="YYYY-MM-DD">YYYY-MM-DD</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select></div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between"><div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Dark Mode</label><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Dark theme for the interface</p></div><Switch checked={darkMode} onCheckedChange={setDarkMode} /></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Delete Timer (seconds)</label><input type="number" value={deleteTimer} onChange={(e) => setDeleteTimer(Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 border rounded-md bg-background" min={0} max={60} /></div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between"><div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Require Delete Password</label><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Ask for password before delete</p></div><Switch checked={requireDeletePassword} onCheckedChange={setRequireDeletePassword} /></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Format Timer (seconds)</label><input type="number" value={formatTimer} onChange={(e) => setFormatTimer(Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 border rounded-md bg-background" min={0} max={120} /></div>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border flex gap-2"><Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} className="flex-1">Cancel</Button><Button onClick={saveSettings} className="flex-1">Save</Button></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { HardDrive, Usb, Network, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface MountPoint {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  path: string;
  type: 'internal' | 'sdcard' | 'usb' | 'pc';
}

const DEFAULT_MOUNTS: MountPoint[] = [
  { id: 'internal', name: 'Internal Storage', icon: HardDrive, path: '/storage/emulated/0', type: 'internal' },
  { id: 'sdcard', name: 'SD Card', icon: HardDrive, path: '/storage/emulated/1', type: 'sdcard' },
  { id: 'usb', name: 'USB OTG', icon: Usb, path: '/storage/usb', type: 'usb' },
  { id: 'pc', name: 'PC / Others', icon: Network, path: '/storage/pc', type: 'pc' },
];

interface RootViewProps {
  panelId: string;
  onMountSelect: (handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => void;
}

export function RootView({ panelId, onMountSelect }: RootViewProps) {
  const [mounts, setMounts] = useState<MountPoint[]>(DEFAULT_MOUNTS);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handleMountClick = async (mount: MountPoint) => {
    setLoading(mount.id);
    try {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        onMountSelect(handle, mount.name);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to access mount:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(null);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-border">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Storage Sources</h2>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Select a storage location to browse</p>
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          {mounts.map((mount) => {
            const Icon = mount.icon;
            const isLoading = loading === mount.id;
            return (
              <button key={mount.id} onClick={() => handleMountClick(mount)} disabled={isLoading} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all group">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 text-primary"><Icon className="w-6 h-6" /></div>
                  <div className="text-left"><p className="font-medium">{mount.name}</p><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{isLoading ? 'Accessing...' : 'Tap to browse'}</p></div>
                </div>
                <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/BootScreen.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Terminal } from 'lucide-react';

export function BootScreen({ onBootComplete }: { onBootComplete?: () => void }) {
  const [bootText, setBootText] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const bootLines = ['Initializing kernel...', 'Loading drivers...', 'Mounting file systems...', 'Starting system services...', 'Ready.'];

  useEffect(() => {
    let lineIndex = 0;
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (lineIndex < bootLines.length) {
        setBootText(prev => [...prev, bootLines[lineIndex]]);
        lineIndex++;
      } else {
        clearInterval(interval);
        setTimeout(onBootComplete, 500);
      }
    }, 400);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [onBootComplete]);

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full bg-black text-green-400 font-mono p-8">
      <Terminal className="w-16 h-16 mb-4 animate-pulse" />
      <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-1">
        {bootText.map((line, i) => <div key={i} className="text-sm">{`> ${line}`}</div>)}
        <div className="animate-pulse">_</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { TerminalFileSystemEntry } from '@/types/terminal';
import { FolderOpen, File } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface TerminalFileGridProps {
  entries: TerminalFileSystemEntry[];
  onEntryClick: (entry: TerminalFileSystemEntry) => void;
}

export function FileGrid({ entries, onEntryClick }: TerminalFileGridProps) {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 p-4">
      {entries.map((entry) => (
        <div
          key={entry.path}
          className="flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-colors"
          onClick={() => onEntryClick(entry)}
        >
          {entry.type === 'directory' ? (
            <FolderOpen className="w-12 h-12 text-primary mb-2" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-2" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center truncate w-full" title={entry.name}>
            {entry.name}
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
            {entry.type === 'directory' ? 'Folder' : formatBytes(entry.size)}
          </span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { TerminalFileSystemEntry } from '@/types/terminal';
import { Folder, File, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface TerminalFileListProps {
  entries: TerminalFileSystemEntry[];
  onEntryClick: (entry: TerminalFileSystemEntry) => void;
}

export function FileList({ entries, onEntryClick }: TerminalFileListProps) {
  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {entries.map((entry) => (
        <div
          key={entry.path}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => onEntryClick(entry)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
            {entry.type === 'directory' ? (
              <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
            ) : (
              <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{entry.name}</span>
            {entry.type === 'file' && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                {formatBytes(entry.size)}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
            <span>{formatDistanceToNow(entry.lastModified, { addSuffix: true })}</span>
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/FileViewer.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useTerminalStore, useTerminalSelectedFile } from '@/stores/terminalStore';
import { X, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';

export function FileViewer() {
  const selectedFile = useTerminalSelectedFile();
  const selectFile = useTerminalStore((s) => s.selectFile);

  if (!selectedFile) return null;

  const isText = selectedFile.name.match(/\.(txt|js|ts|jsx|tsx|json|md|css|html|xml|sh|py|rb|go|java|c|cpp|h|hpp)$/i);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col border-l border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{selectedFile.name}</span>
        </div>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={() => selectFile(null)}>
          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
        {isText ? (
          <pre className="text-sm font-mono whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">
            {selectedFile.content || 'No content preview available'}
          </pre>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <FileText className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-sm">Preview not available for binary files</p>
            <p className="text-xs">Size: {formatBytes(selectedFile.size)}</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/TerminalPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { BootScreen } from './BootScreen';
import { TerminalToolbar } from './TerminalToolbar';
import { FileList } from './FileList';
import { FileGrid } from './FileGrid';
import { FileViewer } from './FileViewer';
import { useTerminalStore, useTerminalInitialized, useTerminalEntries, useTerminalViewMode, useTerminalSortBy, useTerminalSelectedFile, useTerminalError } from '@/stores/terminalStore';
import { TerminalFileSystemEntry, TerminalFile } from '@/types/terminal';

function TerminalPanelContent() {
  const isInitialized = useTerminalInitialized();
  const entries = useTerminalEntries();
  const viewMode = useTerminalViewMode();
  const sortBy = useTerminalSortBy();
  const selectedFile = useTerminalSelectedFile();
  const error = useTerminalError();
  
  const {
    setViewMode,
    setSortBy,
    navigateBack,
    navigateToRoot,
    refreshCurrent,
    selectFile,
    shutdown,
  } = useTerminalStore();

  // Initialize on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    // Auto-initialize if not already done
    // This can be disabled if manual init is preferred
  }, []);

  const handleEntryClick = (entry: TerminalFileSystemEntry) => {
    selectFile(entry as TerminalFile);
  };

  if (!isInitialized) {
    return <BootScreen />;
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <TerminalToolbar
        viewMode={viewMode}
        onViewModeChange={setViewMode}
        sortBy={sortBy}
        onSortChange={setSortBy}
        onNavigateBack={navigateBack}
        onRefresh={refreshCurrent}
        onShutdown={shutdown}
      />

      {error && (
        <div className="p-3 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive text-sm text-center">
          {error}
          <button 
            onClick={refreshCurrent}
            className="ml-2 underline hover:no-underline"
          >
            Retry
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto flex">
        <div className={`flex-1 ${selectedFile ? 'hidden md:block md:w-1/2' : 'w-full'}`}>
          {entries.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
              <p className="text-sm">Empty directory</p>
            </div>
          ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
            <FileGrid entries={entries} onEntryClick={handleEntryClick} />
          ) : (
            <FileList entries={entries} onEntryClick={handleEntryClick} />
          )}
        </div>

        {/* File Viewer */}
        {selectedFile && (
          <div className="w-full md:w-1/2 h-full">
            <FileViewer />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function TerminalPanel() {
  return <TerminalPanelContent />;
}
