import { Grid3X3, List, ArrowLeft, RefreshCw, ArrowUpDown, Power } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { TerminalViewMode, TerminalSortBy } from '@/types/terminal';

interface TerminalToolbarProps {
  viewMode: TerminalViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: TerminalViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: TerminalSortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: TerminalSortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  onShutdown: () => void;
}

export function TerminalToolbar({
  viewMode,
  onViewModeChange,
  sortBy,
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  onShutdown,
}: TerminalToolbarProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onNavigateBack} className="h-8 w-8">
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onRefresh} className="h-8 w-8">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="outline" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-asc')}>Name (A-Z)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-desc')}>Name (Z-A)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('date')}>Date Modified</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('size')}>Size</DropdownMenuItem>
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>

        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md">
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-l-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-r-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>

        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onShutdown} className="h-8 w-8 text-destructive">
          <Power className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Tree/TreeIconButton.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { TreePine } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useTreeStore } from '@/stores/treeStore';
import { TreeNode, NodeProperties } from '@/types/tree';

interface TreeIconButtonProps {
  item: any;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  panelId: string;
  className?: string;
}

export function TreeIconButton({ item, sourceType, panelId, className }: TreeIconButtonProps) {
  const openTree = useTreeStore((s) => s.openTree);

  const handleClick = async () => {
    // Build tree node from item
    const treeNode = await buildTreeNode(item, sourceType, panelId);
    openTree(treeNode);
  };

  return (
    <Button
      variant="ghost"
      size="icon"
      className={className}
      onClick={handleClick}
      title="View Tree Structure"
    >
      <TreePine className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
    </Button>
  );
}

async function buildTreeNode(
  item: any, 
  sourceType: string, 
  panelId: string
): Promise<TreeNode> {
  const baseNode: TreeNode = {
    id: item.id || item.name || String(Date.now()),
    name: item.name || 'Unknown',
    type: getNodeType(item, sourceType),
    path: item.path || item.name || '/',
    size: item.size || 0,
    lastModified: item.lastModified ? new Date(item.lastModified) : new Date(),
    depth: 0,
    properties: await buildProperties(item, sourceType),
  };

  // Build children if it's a directory
  if (baseNode.type === 'directory' && item.children) {
    baseNode.children = item.children.map((child: any, index: number) => ({
      ...buildTreeNode(child, sourceType, panelId),
      parent: baseNode,
      depth: 1,
    }));
  }

  return baseNode;
}

function getNodeType(item: any, sourceType: string): 'file' | 'directory' | 'symlink' | 'root' {
  if (sourceType === 'storage' || sourceType === 'terminal') {
    return item.kind === 'directory' ? 'directory' : 
           item.type === 'symlink' ? 'symlink' : 'file';
  }
  if (sourceType === 'drive') {
    return item.mimeType === 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' ? 'directory' : 'file';
  }
  if (sourceType === 'github') {
    return item.type === 'dir' ? 'directory' : 
           item.type === 'symlink' ? 'symlink' : 'file';
  }
  return 'file';
}

async function buildProperties(item: any, sourceType: string): Promise<NodeProperties> {
  const props: NodeProperties = {
    createdAt: item.createdAt ? new Date(item.createdAt) : undefined,
    modifiedAt: item.lastModified ? new Date(item.lastModified) : undefined,
    mimeType: item.mimeType,
    isHidden: item.name?.startsWith('.'),
    isReadOnly: item.permissions && !item.permissions.includes('w'),
  };

  // Add source-specific properties
  switch (sourceType) {
    case 'storage':
      props.permissions = item.permissions;
      props.mountPath = item.path;
      break;
    case 'drive':
      props.fileSystemType = 'Google Drive';
      props.label = 'Cloud Storage';
      break;
    case 'github':
      props.fileSystemType = 'Git Repository';
      props.owner = item.owner;
      props.version = item.sha;
      break;
    case 'terminal':
      props.fileSystemType = 'WebContainer FS';
      props.permissions = item.permissions;
      props.owner = 'root';
      props.group = 'root';
      break;
  }

  return props;
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Tree/TreeViewModal.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { X, Copy, Share2, FileText, Folder, ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Search, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
import autoTable from 'jspdf-autotable';

interface TreeNode {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  type: 'file' | 'directory' | 'root';
  path: string;
  size: number;
  lastModified: Date;
  children?: TreeNode[];
  parent?: TreeNode; // added for parent navigation
  properties?: Record<string, any>;
}

interface TreeViewModalProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  rootNode: TreeNode | null;
  title?: string;
}

export function TreeViewModal({ isOpen, onClose, rootNode, title = 'Structure Viewer' }: TreeViewModalProps) {
  const [expandedNodes, setExpandedNodes] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<TreeNode | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'tree' | 'properties'>('tree');
  const [filteredNodes, setFilteredNodes] = useState<TreeNode[]>([]);
  const [searchIndex, setSearchIndex] = useState(0);
  const [copiedField, setCopiedField] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (rootNode && isOpen) {
      setExpandedNodes(new Set([rootNode.id]));
      setSelectedNode(rootNode);
      setSearchQuery('');
      setSearchIndex(0);
    }
  }, [rootNode, isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (searchQuery.trim() && rootNode) {
      const results: TreeNode[] = [];
      const search = (node: TreeNode) => {
        if (node.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) results.push(node);
        node.children?.forEach(search);
      };
      search(rootNode);
      setFilteredNodes(results);
      setSearchIndex(0);
      if (results.length > 0) expandToNode(results[0]);
    } else {
      setFilteredNodes([]);
    }
  }, [searchQuery, rootNode]);

  const expandToNode = (node: TreeNode) => {
    const newExpanded = new Set(expandedNodes);
    // Expand all parents using the parent reference
    let current = node;
    while (current.parent) {
      newExpanded.add(current.parent.id);
      current = current.parent;
    }
    newExpanded.add(node.id);
    setExpandedNodes(newExpanded);
    setSelectedNode(node);
  };

  const toggleNode = (nodeId: string) => {
    setExpandedNodes(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(nodeId)) next.delete(nodeId);
      else next.add(nodeId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const copyToClipboard = async (text: string, fieldName: string) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    setCopiedField(fieldName);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedField(null), 1500);
  };

  const copyProperties = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const text = `Path: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n${props.mountPath ? `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}` : ''}\n${props.fileSystemType ? `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}` : ''}\n${props.permissions ? `Permissions: ${props.permissions}` : ''}\n${props.usedSpace !== undefined ? `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.freeSpace !== undefined ? `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.label ? `Label: ${props.label}` : ''}`.trim();
    await copyToClipboard(text, 'all-props');
  };

  const copyTreeStructure = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    copyToClipboard(output, 'tree');
  };

  const copyBoth = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    let propsText = `PROPERTIES\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n`;
    if (props.mountPath) propsText += `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}\n`;
    if (props.fileSystemType) propsText += `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}\n`;
    if (props.usedSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.freeSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.label) propsText += `Label: ${props.label}\n`;
    propsText += `\nTREE STRUCTURE\n`;
    let treeText = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      treeText += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    await copyToClipboard(propsText + treeText, 'both');
  };

  const exportToTxt = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = `TREE STRUCTURE REPORT\nGenerated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}\nRoot: ${selectedNode.name}\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\n\n`;
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    const blob = new Blob([output], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.txt`;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  const exportToPdf = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const doc = new jsPDF();
    doc.setFontSize(20);
    doc.text('Tree Structure Report', 14, 20);
    doc.setFontSize(10);
    doc.text(`Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 14, 30);
    doc.text(`Root: ${selectedNode.name}`, 14, 36);
    doc.text(`Path: ${selectedNode.path}`, 14, 42);
    const tableData: string[][] = [];
    const buildTableData = (node: TreeNode, depth: number) => {
      const indent = '  '.repeat(depth);
      tableData.push([indent + node.name, node.type, formatBytes(node.size), node.lastModified.toLocaleDateString()]);
      node.children?.forEach(child => buildTableData(child, depth + 1));
    };
    buildTableData(selectedNode, 0);
    autoTable(doc, {
      startY: 50,
      head: [['Name', 'Type', 'Size', 'Modified']],
      body: tableData,
      styles: { fontSize: 8, cellPadding: 2 },
      headStyles: { fillColor: [66, 139, 202] },
    });
    const finalY = (doc as any).lastAutoTable?.finalY || 50;
    doc.setFontSize(12);
    doc.text('Properties', 14, finalY + 10);
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const propRows = Object.entries(props).map(([key, val]) => [key, String(val)]);
    if (propRows.length) {
      autoTable(doc, {
        startY: finalY + 15,
        body: propRows,
        styles: { fontSize: 8 },
        headStyles: { fillColor: [100, 100, 100] },
      });
    }
    doc.save(`tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.pdf`);
  };

  const navigateSearch = (direction: 'next' | 'prev') => {
    if (filteredNodes.length === 0) return;
    let newIndex = searchIndex;
    if (direction === 'next') newIndex = (searchIndex + 1) % filteredNodes.length;
    else newIndex = (searchIndex - 1 + filteredNodes.length) % filteredNodes.length;
    setSearchIndex(newIndex);
    expandToNode(filteredNodes[newIndex]);
  };

  const renderTreeNode = (node: TreeNode, depth: number = 0) => {
    const isExpanded = expandedNodes.has(node.id);
    const isSelected = selectedNode?.id === node.id;
    const hasChildren = node.children && node.children.length > 0;
    return (
      <div key={node.id}>
        <div
          className={cn("flex items-center gap-1 py-1 px-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", isSelected && "bg-primary/10")}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
          onClick={() => setSelectedNode(node)}
        >
          {hasChildren ? (
            <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleNode(node.id); }} className="p-0.5">
              {isExpanded ? <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" /> : <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />}
            </button>
          ) : <span className="w-4" />}
          {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? (
            <Folder className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
          ) : (
            <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm truncate">{node.name}</span>
          {node.type === 'file' && <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{formatBytes(node.size)}</span>}
        </div>
        {isExpanded && hasChildren && (
          <div>{node.children!.map(child => renderTreeNode(child, depth + 1))}</div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (!isOpen || !rootNode) return null;

  return (
    <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>
      <DialogContent className="max-w-4xl h-[80vh] flex flex-col">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span>{title}</span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToTxt}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> TXT</Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToPdf}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> PDF</Button>
            </div>
          </DialogTitle>
        </DialogHeader>

        {/* Search Bar */}
        <div className="relative mb-2">
          <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <Input
            placeholder="Search files/folders..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="pl-8 pr-24"
          />
          {searchQuery && filteredNodes.length > 0 && (
            <div className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex items-center gap-1">
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{searchIndex + 1}/{filteredNodes.length}</span>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('prev')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowLeft className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('next')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={(v) => setActiveTab(v as any)} className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <TabsList className="w-full"><TabsTrigger value="tree" className="flex-1">Tree Structure</TabsTrigger><TabsTrigger value="properties" className="flex-1">Properties</TabsTrigger></TabsList>
          <TabsContent value="tree" className="flex-1 overflow-hidden mt-2">
            <ScrollArea className="h-full">
              {searchQuery ? (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {filteredNodes.map((node, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={node.id}
                      className={cn("flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", selectedNode?.id === node.id && "bg-primary/10", idx === searchIndex && "ring-2 ring-primary")}
                      onClick={() => { setSelectedNode(node); setSearchIndex(idx); expandToNode(node); }}
                    >
                      {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? <Folder className="w-4 h-4" /> : <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />}
                      <span className="text-sm">{node.name}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{node.path}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              ) : renderTreeNode(rootNode)}
            </ScrollArea>
          </TabsContent>
          <TabsContent value="properties" className="flex-1 overflow-auto mt-2">
            {selectedNode ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {/* Properties grid with one-tap copy */}
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                  <PropertyRow label="Name" value={selectedNode.name} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.name, 'name')} copied={copiedField === 'name'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Path" value={selectedNode.path} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.path, 'path')} copied={copiedField === 'path'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Type" value={selectedNode.type} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.type, 'type')} copied={copiedField === 'type'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Size" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.size)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.size), 'size')} copied={copiedField === 'size'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Modified" value={selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString(), 'modified')} copied={copiedField === 'modified'} />
                  {selectedNode.properties?.mountPath && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Mount Path" value={selectedNode.properties.mountPath} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.mountPath, 'mountPath')} copied={copiedField === 'mountPath'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.fileSystemType && (
                    <PropertyRow label="File System" value={selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType, 'fsType')} copied={copiedField === 'fsType'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.permissions && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Permissions" value={selectedNode.properties.permissions} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.permissions, 'perms')} copied={copiedField === 'perms'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.usedSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Used Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace), 'used')} copied={copiedField === 'used'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.freeSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Free Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace), 'free')} copied={copiedField === 'free'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.label && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Label" value={selectedNode.properties.label} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.label, 'label')} copied={copiedField === 'label'} />
                  )}
                </div>
                {/* Action buttons */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 pt-3 border-t border-border flex-wrap">
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyProperties}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Properties</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyTreeStructure}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Tree</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyBoth}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Both</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToTxt}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export TXT</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToPdf}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export PDF</Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8">Select a node to view properties</div>
            )}
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

// Helper component for property row with copy button
function PropertyRow({ label, value, onCopy, copied }: { label: string; value: string; onCopy: () => void; copied: boolean }) {
  return (
    <>
      <div className="text-muted-foreground">{label}:</div>
      <div className="font-mono text-xs break-all flex items-center gap-1 group">
        <span className="truncate">{value}</span>
        <button onClick={onCopy} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded shrink-0">
          {copied ? <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-green-500" /> : <Copy className="w-3 h-3" />}
        </button>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) { size /= 1024; unitIndex++; }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Tree/TreeViewModal.tsx.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { X, Copy, Share2, FileText, Folder, ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Search, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
import autoTable from "jspdf-autotable";

interface TreeNode {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  type: 'file' | 'directory' | 'root';
  path: string;
  size: number;
  lastModified: Date;
  children?: TreeNode[];
  properties?: Record<string, any>;
}

interface TreeViewModalProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  rootNode: TreeNode | null;
  title?: string;
}

export function TreeViewModal({ isOpen, onClose, rootNode, title = 'Structure Viewer' }: TreeViewModalProps) {
  const [expandedNodes, setExpandedNodes] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<TreeNode | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'tree' | 'properties'>('tree');
  const [filteredNodes, setFilteredNodes] = useState<TreeNode[]>([]);
  const [searchIndex, setSearchIndex] = useState(0);
  const [copiedField, setCopiedField] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (rootNode && isOpen) {
      setExpandedNodes(new Set([rootNode.id]));
      setSelectedNode(rootNode);
      setSearchQuery('');
      setSearchIndex(0);
    }
  }, [rootNode, isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (searchQuery.trim() && rootNode) {
      const results: TreeNode[] = [];
      const search = (node: TreeNode) => {
        if (node.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) results.push(node);
        node.children?.forEach(search);
      };
      search(rootNode);
      setFilteredNodes(results);
      setSearchIndex(0);
      if (results.length > 0) expandToNode(results[0]);
    } else {
      setFilteredNodes([]);
    }
  }, [searchQuery, rootNode]);

  const expandToNode = (node: TreeNode) => {
    const newExpanded = new Set(expandedNodes);
    // Expand all parents
    let current = node;
    while (current.parent) {
      newExpanded.add(current.parent.id);
      current = current.parent;
    }
    newExpanded.add(node.id);
    setExpandedNodes(newExpanded);
    setSelectedNode(node);
  };

  const toggleNode = (nodeId: string) => {
    setExpandedNodes(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(nodeId)) next.delete(nodeId);
      else next.add(nodeId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const copyToClipboard = async (text: string, fieldName: string) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    setCopiedField(fieldName);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedField(null), 1500);
  };

  const copyProperties = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const text = `Path: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n${props.mountPath ? `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}` : ''}\n${props.fileSystemType ? `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}` : ''}\n${props.permissions ? `Permissions: ${props.permissions}` : ''}\n${props.usedSpace !== undefined ? `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.freeSpace !== undefined ? `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.label ? `Label: ${props.label}` : ''}`.trim();
    await copyToClipboard(text, 'all-props');
  };

  const copyTreeStructure = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    copyToClipboard(output, 'tree');
  };

  const copyBoth = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    let propsText = `PROPERTIES\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n`;
    if (props.mountPath) propsText += `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}\n`;
    if (props.fileSystemType) propsText += `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}\n`;
    if (props.usedSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.freeSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.label) propsText += `Label: ${props.label}\n`;
    propsText += `\nTREE STRUCTURE\n`;
    let treeText = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      treeText += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    await copyToClipboard(propsText + treeText, 'both');
  };

  const exportToTxt = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = `TREE STRUCTURE REPORT\nGenerated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}\nRoot: ${selectedNode.name}\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\n\n`;
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    const blob = new Blob([output], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.txt`;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  const exportToPdf = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const doc = new jsPDF();
    doc.setFontSize(20);
    doc.text('Tree Structure Report', 14, 20);
    doc.setFontSize(10);
    doc.text(`Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 14, 30);
    doc.text(`Root: ${selectedNode.name}`, 14, 36);
    doc.text(`Path: ${selectedNode.path}`, 14, 42);
    const tableData: string[][] = [];
    const buildTableData = (node: TreeNode, depth: number) => {
      const indent = '  '.repeat(depth);
      tableData.push([indent + node.name, node.type, formatBytes(node.size), node.lastModified.toLocaleDateString()]);
      node.children?.forEach(child => buildTableData(child, depth + 1));
    };
    buildTableData(selectedNode, 0);
    (doc as any).autoTable({
      startY: 50,
      head: [['Name', 'Type', 'Size', 'Modified']],
      body: tableData,
      styles: { fontSize: 8, cellPadding: 2 },
      headStyles: { fillColor: [66, 139, 202] },
    });
    const finalY = (doc as any).lastAutoTable?.finalY || 50;
    doc.setFontSize(12);
    doc.text('Properties', 14, finalY + 10);
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const propRows = Object.entries(props).map(([key, val]) => [key, String(val)]);
    if (propRows.length) {
      (doc as any).autoTable({
        startY: finalY + 15,
        body: propRows,
        styles: { fontSize: 8 },
        headStyles: { fillColor: [100, 100, 100] },
      });
    }
    doc.save(`tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.pdf`);
  };

  const navigateSearch = (direction: 'next' | 'prev') => {
    if (filteredNodes.length === 0) return;
    let newIndex = searchIndex;
    if (direction === 'next') newIndex = (searchIndex + 1) % filteredNodes.length;
    else newIndex = (searchIndex - 1 + filteredNodes.length) % filteredNodes.length;
    setSearchIndex(newIndex);
    expandToNode(filteredNodes[newIndex]);
  };

  const renderTreeNode = (node: TreeNode, depth: number = 0) => {
    const isExpanded = expandedNodes.has(node.id);
    const isSelected = selectedNode?.id === node.id;
    const hasChildren = node.children && node.children.length > 0;
    return (
      <div key={node.id}>
        <div
          className={cn("flex items-center gap-1 py-1 px-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", isSelected && "bg-primary/10")}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
          onClick={() => setSelectedNode(node)}
        >
          {hasChildren ? (
            <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleNode(node.id); }} className="p-0.5">
              {isExpanded ? <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" /> : <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />}
            </button>
          ) : <span className="w-4" />}
          {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? (
            <Folder className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
          ) : (
            <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm truncate">{node.name}</span>
          {node.type === 'file' && <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{formatBytes(node.size)}</span>}
        </div>
        {isExpanded && hasChildren && (
          <div>{node.children!.map(child => renderTreeNode(child, depth + 1))}</div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (!isOpen || !rootNode) return null;

  return (
    <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>
      <DialogContent className="max-w-4xl h-[80vh] flex flex-col">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span>{title}</span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToTxt}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> TXT</Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToPdf}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> PDF</Button>
            </div>
          </DialogTitle>
        </DialogHeader>

        {/* Search Bar */}
        <div className="relative mb-2">
          <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <Input
            placeholder="Search files/folders..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="pl-8 pr-24"
          />
          {searchQuery && filteredNodes.length > 0 && (
            <div className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex items-center gap-1">
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{searchIndex + 1}/{filteredNodes.length}</span>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('prev')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowLeft className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('next')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={(v) => setActiveTab(v as any)} className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <TabsList className="w-full"><TabsTrigger value="tree" className="flex-1">Tree Structure</TabsTrigger><TabsTrigger value="properties" className="flex-1">Properties</TabsTrigger></TabsList>
          <TabsContent value="tree" className="flex-1 overflow-hidden mt-2">
            <ScrollArea className="h-full">
              {searchQuery ? (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {filteredNodes.map((node, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={node.id}
                      className={cn("flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", selectedNode?.id === node.id && "bg-primary/10", idx === searchIndex && "ring-2 ring-primary")}
                      onClick={() => { setSelectedNode(node); setSearchIndex(idx); expandToNode(node); }}
                    >
                      {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? <Folder className="w-4 h-4" /> : <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />}
                      <span className="text-sm">{node.name}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{node.path}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              ) : renderTreeNode(rootNode)}
            </ScrollArea>
          </TabsContent>
          <TabsContent value="properties" className="flex-1 overflow-auto mt-2">
            {selectedNode ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {/* Properties grid with one-tap copy */}
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                  <PropertyRow label="Name" value={selectedNode.name} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.name, 'name')} copied={copiedField === 'name'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Path" value={selectedNode.path} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.path, 'path')} copied={copiedField === 'path'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Type" value={selectedNode.type} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.type, 'type')} copied={copiedField === 'type'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Size" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.size)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.size), 'size')} copied={copiedField === 'size'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Modified" value={selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString(), 'modified')} copied={copiedField === 'modified'} />
                  {selectedNode.properties?.mountPath && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Mount Path" value={selectedNode.properties.mountPath} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.mountPath, 'mountPath')} copied={copiedField === 'mountPath'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.fileSystemType && (
                    <PropertyRow label="File System" value={selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType, 'fsType')} copied={copiedField === 'fsType'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.permissions && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Permissions" value={selectedNode.properties.permissions} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.permissions, 'perms')} copied={copiedField === 'perms'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.usedSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Used Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace), 'used')} copied={copiedField === 'used'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.freeSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Free Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace), 'free')} copied={copiedField === 'free'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.label && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Label" value={selectedNode.properties.label} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.label, 'label')} copied={copiedField === 'label'} />
                  )}
                </div>
                {/* Action buttons */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 pt-3 border-t border-border flex-wrap">
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyProperties}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Properties</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyTreeStructure}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Tree</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyBoth}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Both</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToTxt}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export TXT</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToPdf}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export PDF</Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8">Select a node to view properties</div>
            )}
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

// Helper component for property row with copy button
function PropertyRow({ label, value, onCopy, copied }: { label: string; value: string; onCopy: () => void; copied: boolean }) {
  return (
    <>
      <div className="text-muted-foreground">{label}:</div>
      <div className="font-mono text-xs break-all flex items-center gap-1 group">
        <span className="truncate">{value}</span>
        <button onClick={onCopy} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded shrink-0">
          {copied ? <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-green-500" /> : <Copy className="w-3 h-3" />}
        </button>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) { size /= 1024; unitIndex++; }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/badge.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react";

export function Badge({
  children,
  className = "",
  variant = "default",
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  variant?: "default" | "secondary" | "outline" | "destructive";
}) {
  const base =
    "inline-flex items-center rounded-md px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium";

  const variants: Record<string, string> = {
    default: "bg-primary text-white",
    secondary: "bg-gray-200 text-gray-800",
    outline: "border border-gray-300 text-gray-800",
    destructive: "bg-red-500 text-white",
  };

  return (
    <span className={`${base} ${variants[variant]} ${className}`}>
      {children}
    </span>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/PanelDialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { X } from 'lucide-react';
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';

interface PanelDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  panelId: string;
  title: string;
  children: React.ReactNode;
  width?: string;
}

export function PanelDialog({ isOpen, onClose, panelId, title, children, width = '90%' }: PanelDialogProps) {
  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && dialogRef.current) {
      const panelElement = document.querySelector(`[data-panel-id="${panelId}"]`);
      if (panelElement) {
        const rect = panelElement.getBoundingClientRect();
        dialogRef.current.style.top = `${rect.top + rect.height / 2}px`;
        dialogRef.current.style.left = `${rect.left + rect.width / 2}px`;
        dialogRef.current.style.transform = 'translate(-50%, -50%)';
      }
    }
  }, [isOpen, panelId]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return createPortal(
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 pointer-events-none">
      <div
        ref={dialogRef}
        className="absolute pointer-events-auto bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden"
        style={{ width, maxWidth: 'min(90%, 400px)' }}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
          <h3 className="font-medium text-sm">{title}</h3>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4">{children}</div>
      </div>
    </div>,
    document.body
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/button.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react"
import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const buttonVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 shrink-0 [&_svg]:shrink-0 outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px] aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
        destructive:
          "bg-destructive text-white hover:bg-destructive/90 focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40 dark:bg-destructive/60",
        outline:
          "border bg-background shadow-xs hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:bg-input/30 dark:border-input dark:hover:bg-input/50",
        secondary:
          "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
        ghost:
          "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:hover:bg-accent/50",
        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
      },
      size: {
        default: "h-9 px-4 py-2 has-[>svg]:px-3",
        sm: "h-8 rounded-md gap-1.5 px-3 has-[>svg]:px-2.5",
        lg: "h-10 rounded-md px-6 has-[>svg]:px-4",
        icon: "size-9",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    },
  }
)

function Button({
  className,
  variant,
  size,
  asChild = false,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
  VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
    asChild?: boolean
  }) {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button"

  return (
    <Comp
      data-slot="button"
      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Button, buttonVariants }

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

interface RadioGroupContextValue {
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}

const RadioGroupContext = React.createContext<RadioGroupContextValue>({});

interface RadioGroupProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}

export const RadioGroup = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, RadioGroupProps>(
  ({ className, value, onValueChange, disabled, name, children, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <RadioGroupContext.Provider value={{ value, onValueChange, disabled, name }}>
        <div ref={ref} className={cn("flex flex-wrap gap-4", className)} role="radiogroup" {...props}>
          {children}
        </div>
      </RadioGroupContext.Provider>
    );
  }
);
RadioGroup.displayName = "RadioGroup";

interface RadioGroupItemProps extends React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement> {
  value: string;
  id?: string;
}

export const RadioGroupItem = React.forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, RadioGroupItemProps>(
  ({ className, value, id, disabled: itemDisabled, ...props }, ref) => {
    const context = React.useContext(RadioGroupContext);
    const isChecked = context.value === value;
    const isDisabled = itemDisabled ?? context.disabled;

    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      if (!isDisabled && e.target.checked) {
        context.onValueChange?.(value);
      }
    };

    const inputId = id || `radio-${value}`;

    return (
      <input
        ref={ref}
        type="radio"
        id={inputId}
        name={context.name}
        value={value}
        checked={isChecked}
        onChange={handleChange}
        disabled={isDisabled}
        className={cn(
          "h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded-full border border-primary text-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
          className
        )}
        {...props}
      />
    );
  }
);
RadioGroupItem.displayName = "RadioGroupItem";
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

interface RadioGroupProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}

const RadioGroupContext = React.createContext<{
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}>({});

export const RadioGroup = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, RadioGroupProps>(
  ({ className, value, onValueChange, disabled, name, children, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <RadioGroupContext.Provider value={{ value, onValueChange, disabled, name }}>
        <div ref={ref} className={cn("flex flex-wrap gap-4", className)} role="radiogroup" {...props}>
          {children}
        </div>
      </RadioGroupContext.Provider>
    );
  }
);
RadioGroup.displayName = "RadioGroup";

interface RadioGroupItemProps extends React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement> {
  value: string;
  id?: string;
}

export const RadioGroupItem = React.forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, RadioGroupItemProps>(
  ({ className, value, id, disabled: itemDisabled, ...props }, ref) => {
    const context = React.useContext(RadioGroupContext);
    const isChecked = context.value === value;
    const isDisabled = itemDisabled ?? context.disabled;

    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      if (!isDisabled && e.target.checked) {
        context.onValueChange?.(value);
      }
    };

    const inputId = id || `radio-${value}`;

    return (
      <input
        ref={ref}
        type="radio"
        id={inputId}
        name={context.name}
        value={value}
        checked={isChecked}
        onChange={handleChange}
        disabled={isDisabled}
        className={cn(
          "h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded-full border border-primary text-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
          className
        )}
        {...props}
      />
    );
  }
);
RadioGroupItem.displayName = "RadioGroupItem";

import * as React from "react";

export function ScrollArea({ 
  children, 
  className = "" 
}: { 
  children: React.ReactNode;
  className?: string;
}) {
  return (
    <div className={`overflow-auto ${className}`}>
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react";

export function Switch({
  checked,
  onCheckedChange,
}: {
  checked?: boolean;
  onCheckedChange?: (checked: boolean) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={() => onCheckedChange?.(!checked)}
      className={`w-10 h-5 flex items-center rounded-full transition ${
        checked ? "bg-primary" : "bg-gray-300"
      }`}
    >
      <div
        className={`w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full shadow transform transition ${
          checked ? "translate-x-5" : "translate-x-1"
        }`}
      />
    </button>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/toggle.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react"
import * as TogglePrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-toggle"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const toggleVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium hover:bg-muted hover:text-muted-foreground disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=on]:bg-accent data-[state=on]:text-accent-foreground [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 shrink-0 [&_svg]:shrink-0 transition-all outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-transparent",
        outline:
          "border border-input bg-transparent shadow-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
      },
      size: {
        default: "h-9 px-3 min-w-9",
        sm: "h-8 px-2 min-w-8",
        lg: "h-10 px-3 min-w-10",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    },
  }
)

function Toggle({
  className,
  variant,
  size,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof TogglePrimitive.Root> &
  VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) {
  return (
    <TogglePrimitive.Root
      data-slot="toggle"
      className={cn(toggleVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Toggle, toggleVariants }

import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { DndProvider } from 'react-dnd';
import { HTML5Backend } from 'react-dnd-html5-backend';
import { GoogleOAuthProvider } from '@react-oauth/google';
import { MainApp } from './MainApp';
import { AdminPanel } from './components/Admin/AdminPanel';
import { NotificationBell } from './components/Notification/NotificationBell';
import { LiveLogPanel } from './components/Log/LiveLogPanel';
import { DragDropProvider } from './components/DragDrop/DragDropProvider';

// Use a dummy client ID if real one is not available – will show error but not crash
const GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID = (import.meta as any).env?.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || 'dummy-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com';

function App() {
  return (
    <GoogleOAuthProvider clientId={GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID}>
      <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
        <BrowserRouter>
          <DragDropProvider>
            <Routes>
              <Route path="/" element={<MainApp />} />
              <Route path="/admin" element={<AdminPanel />} />
              <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
            </Routes>
            <NotificationBell />
            <LiveLogPanel />
          </DragDropProvider>
        </BrowserRouter>
      </DndProvider>
    </GoogleOAuthProvider>
  );
}

export default App;

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/App.tsx.backup
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { MainApp } from './MainApp';
import { AdminPanel } from './components/Admin/AdminPanel';
import { NotificationBell } from './components/Notification/NotificationBell';
import { LiveLogPanel } from './components/Log/LiveLogPanel';
import { useLogStore } from './stores/logStore';

function App() {
  // Initialize logging
  useEffect(() => {
    const { logAction } = useLogStore.getState();
    
    // Log app start
    logAction('app_start', {
      userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
      platform: navigator.platform,
    }, 'system');

    // Setup global error handler
    window.onerror = (message, source, lineno, colno, error) => {
      logAction('uncaught_error', {
        message,
        source,
        lineno,
        colno,
        stack: error?.stack,
      }, 'system');
      return false;
    };

    // Setup unhandled promise rejection handler
    window.onunhandledrejection = (event) => {
      logAction('unhandled_rejection', {
        reason: event.reason?.toString(),
      }, 'system');
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<MainApp />} />
        <Route path="/admin" element={<AdminPanel />} />
        <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
      </Routes>
      
      {/* Global overlays */}
      <NotificationBell />
      <LiveLogPanel />
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

export default App;

function App() {

      <h1>Hello World – React is working!</h1>
      <p>If you see this, the problem is in one of your components.</p>
    </div>
  )
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { LeftPanel } from '@/components/LeftPanel';
import { PanelContainer } from '@/components/PanelContainer';
import { DragDropProvider } from '@/components/DragDrop/DragDropProvider';
import { DragModeIndicator } from '@/components/DragDrop/DragModeIndicator';
import { KeepReplaceDialog } from '@/components/Rename/KeepReplaceDialog';
import { TreeViewModal } from '@/components/Tree/TreeViewModal';
import { DFOLModeIndicator } from '@/components/DFOL/DFOLModeIndicator';
import { ProfilePanel } from '@/components/DFOL/ProfilePanel';
import { ExecutePanel } from '@/components/DFOL/ExecutePanel';
import { NotificationPanel } from '@/components/DFOL/NotificationPanel';
import { GlobalSearchOverlay } from '@/components/Search/GlobalSearchOverlay';
import { NotificationCenter } from '@/components/Notification/NotificationCenter';
import { SettingsPanel } from '@/components/Settings/SettingsPanel';
import { LanguageSettings } from '@/components/Settings/LanguageSettings';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Settings, LogOut, Languages, Bell } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogStore } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { useLiveLogout } from '@/hooks/useLiveLogout';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

export function MainApp() {
  const toggleLiveLog = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleLiveLog);
  const { currentUser } = useAuthStore();
  const { forceLogout } = useLiveLogout();
  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
  const [showLanguageSettings, setShowLanguageSettings] = useState(false);

  return (
    <DragDropProvider>
      <div className="h-screen w-screen bg-background flex overflow-hidden">
        <LeftPanel />
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {currentUser && (
                <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                  Logged in as <span className="font-medium">{currentUser.username}</span>
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowLanguageSettings(true)}>
                <Languages className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Language
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}>
                <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Settings
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={toggleLiveLog}>
                <Bell className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Live Log
              </Button>
              <Link to="/admin">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Admin
                </Button>
              </Link>
              {currentUser && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={forceLogout}>
                  <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Logout
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          <PanelContainer />
        </div>
      </div>
      <DragModeIndicator />
      <DFOLModeIndicator />
      <NotificationPanel />
      <GlobalSearchOverlay />
      <NotificationCenter />
      <KeepReplaceDialog />
      <TreeViewModal isOpen={false} onClose={() => {}} rootNode={null} />
      <ProfilePanel />
      <ExecutePanel />
      <SettingsPanel isOpen={showSettings} onClose={() => setShowSettings(false)} />
      <LanguageSettings isOpen={showLanguageSettings} onClose={() => setShowLanguageSettings(false)} onLanguageChange={() => {}} />
    </DragDropProvider>
  );
}

import { DragModeIndicator } from '@/components/DragDrop/DragModeIndicator';

export function MainApp() {

  const { currentUser } = useAuthStore();

          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">

              {currentUser && (
                <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                  Logged in as <span className="font-medium">{currentUser.username}</span>
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={openPromptManager}>
                <FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Prompt Manager
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowLanguageSettings(true)}>
                <Languages className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Language
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}>
                <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Settings
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={toggleLiveLog}>
                <Bell className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Live Log
              </Button>
              <Link to="/admin">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Admin
                </Button>
              </Link>
              {currentUser && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={forceLogout}>
                  <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Logout
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          <PanelContainer />
        </div>
      </div>
      <DragModeIndicator />

      <NotificationPanel />
      <GlobalSearchOverlay />
      <NotificationCenter />
      <KeepReplaceDialog />
      <TreeViewModal isOpen={false} onClose={() => {}} rootNode={null} />
      <ProfilePanel />
      <ExecutePanel />
      <SettingsPanel isOpen={showSettings} onClose={() => setShowSettings(false)} />
      <LanguageSettings isOpen={showLanguageSettings} onClose={() => setShowLanguageSettings(false)} onLanguageChange={() => {}} />
      <PromptManagerPage />
    </DragDropProvider>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useLastVisited.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';

interface LastVisitedItem {
  panelId: string;
  itemId: string;
  itemPath: string;
  timestamp: number;
}

export function useLastVisited(panelId: string, itemId: string, itemPath: string) {
  const [shouldBlink, setShouldBlink] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const stored = localStorage.getItem(`lastVisited_${panelId}`);
    if (stored) {
      const last: LastVisitedItem = JSON.parse(stored);
      // Blink if same item and visited within last 30 seconds
      if (last.itemId === itemId && Date.now() - last.timestamp < 30000) {
        setShouldBlink(true);
        const timer = setTimeout(() => setShouldBlink(false), 2000);
        return () => clearTimeout(timer);
      }
    }
  }, [panelId, itemId]);

  const markAsVisited = () => {
    const last: LastVisitedItem = {
      panelId,
      itemId,
      itemPath,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    };
    localStorage.setItem(`lastVisited_${panelId}`, JSON.stringify(last));
  };

  return { shouldBlink, markAsVisited };
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useLiveLogout.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { useLogStore } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { saveAs } from 'file-saver';

export function useLiveLogout() {
  const logout = useAuthStore((s) => s.logout);
  const currentUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.currentUser);
  const currentSession = useAuthStore((s) => s.currentSession);
  const getSessionLogs = useAuthStore((s) => s.getSessionLogs);
  const logs = useLogStore((s) => s.logs);

  const forceLogout = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!currentUser || !currentSession) { await logout(); return; }
    const sessionLogs = getSessionLogs();
    const allLogs = [...sessionLogs, ...logs];
    const logData = { sessionId: currentSession.id, userId: currentUser.id, username: currentUser.username, startTime: currentSession.startTime, endTime: new Date(), logs: allLogs, summary: { totalActions: allLogs.length, categories: allLogs.reduce((acc,log) => { acc[log.category] = (acc[log.category]||0)+1; return acc; }, {} as Record<string,number>) } };
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(logData,null,2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    saveAs(blob, `session_${currentSession.id}_${Date.now()}.log.json`);
    try { await fetch('/api/authority/logs', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(logData) }); } catch(err) { console.warn('Failed to send logs to authority:', err); }
    await logout();
    window.location.href = '/';
  }, [currentUser, currentSession, getSessionLogs, logs, logout]);
  return { forceLogout };
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useTokenExpiry.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { useDFOLStore } from '@/stores/dfolStore';

export function useTokenExpiry() {
  const driveAccounts = useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const githubAccounts = useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const addNotification = useDFOLStore((s) => s.addNotification);
  const notifiedRef = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkExpiry = () => {
      const now = Date.now();
      const tenDaysMs = 10 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;

      // Check Drive accounts
      driveAccounts.forEach(account => {
        const expiresAt = account.expiresAt;
        if (!expiresAt) return;
        const timeLeft = expiresAt - now;
        const key = `drive_${account.id}`;
        if (timeLeft > 0 && timeLeft <= tenDaysMs && !notifiedRef.current.has(key)) {
          addNotification({
            type: 'warning',
            message: `Google Drive token for ${account.id} will expire in ${Math.ceil(timeLeft / (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000))} days. Please re-authenticate.`,
            autoDismiss: false,
          });
          notifiedRef.current.add(key);
        } else if (timeLeft > tenDaysMs && notifiedRef.current.has(key)) {
          notifiedRef.current.delete(key);
        }
      });

      // GitHub tokens don't have expiry from API, but we can warn if token is old (optional)
      githubAccounts.forEach(account => {
        const addedAt = account.addedAt;
        if (!addedAt) return;
        const age = now - addedAt;
        const thirtyDaysMs = 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
        const key = `github_${account.id}`;
        if (age >= thirtyDaysMs && !notifiedRef.current.has(key)) {
          addNotification({
            type: 'info',
            message: `GitHub token for ${account.id} is ${Math.floor(age / (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000))} days old. Consider rotating for security.`,
            autoDismiss: true,
          });
          notifiedRef.current.add(key);
        }
      });
    };

    checkExpiry();
    const interval = setInterval(checkExpiry, 60 * 60 * 1000); // every hour
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [driveAccounts, githubAccounts, addNotification]);
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useResizable.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';

interface UseResizableOptions {
  initialWidth: number;
  minWidth: number;
  onResize: (width: number) => void;
}

export function useResizable({ initialWidth, minWidth, onResize }: UseResizableOptions) {
  const [isResizing, setIsResizing] = useState(false);
  const [currentWidth, setCurrentWidth] = useState(initialWidth);
  const startXRef = useRef(0);
  const startWidthRef = useRef(initialWidth);

  const startResize = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsResizing(true);
    startXRef.current = e.clientX;
    startWidthRef.current = currentWidth;
  }, [currentWidth]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (!isResizing) return;
      
      const delta = e.clientX - startXRef.current;
      const newWidth = Math.max(minWidth, startWidthRef.current + delta);
      setCurrentWidth(newWidth);
      onResize(newWidth);
    };

    const handleMouseUp = () => {
      setIsResizing(false);
    };

    if (isResizing) {
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
      document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
      document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
    }

    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
      document.body.style.cursor = '';
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
    };
  }, [isResizing, minWidth, onResize]);

  return {
    width: currentWidth,
    isResizing,
    startResize,
  };
}
