━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/conversionEngine.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { FFmpeg } from '@ffmpeg/ffmpeg';
import { fetchFile, toBlobURL } from '@ffmpeg/util';
import JSZip from 'jszip';
import mammoth from 'mammoth';

export type ConversionFormat = 'txt' | 'md' | 'json' | 'xml' | 'pdf' | 'docx' | 'zip' | 'tar' | '7z' | 'tar.gz' | 'png' | 'jpg' | 'webp' | 'py' | 'js' | 'html';
export interface ConversionResult { success: boolean; blob?: Blob; error?: string; outputName: string; }

// Helper to convert Uint8Array to Blob safely (avoids SharedArrayBuffer issues)
function uint8ToBlob(uint8: Uint8Array): Blob {
  const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(uint8.byteLength);
  const view = new Uint8Array(buffer);
  view.set(uint8);
  return new Blob([buffer]);
}

class ConversionEngine {
  private ffmpeg: FFmpeg | null = null;
  private ffmpegReady = false;
  private ffmpegLoading = false;

  async initFFmpeg(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.ffmpegReady || this.ffmpegLoading) return;
    this.ffmpegLoading = true;
    try {
      this.ffmpeg = new FFmpeg();
      const baseURL = 'https://unpkg.com/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/umd';
      await this.ffmpeg.load({
        coreURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.js`, 'text/javascript'),
        wasmURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.wasm`, 'application/wasm'),
      });
      this.ffmpegReady = true;
    } catch (err) { console.error('FFmpeg init failed:', err); }
    finally { this.ffmpegLoading = false; }
  }

  async convert(file: Blob, fromExt: string, toExt: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    const from = fromExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    const to = toExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    const originalName = `input.${from}`;
    const outputName = `output.${to}`;

    if (this.isImageFormat(from) && this.isImageFormat(to)) return this.convertImage(file, from, to, onProgress);
    if (from === 'docx' && (to === 'txt' || to === 'html')) return this.convertDocx(file, to);
    if (from === 'folder' && to === 'zip') return this.convertFolderToZip(file, onProgress);
    if ((from === 'zip' || from === 'tar') && to === 'tar.gz') return this.convertArchive(file, from, to, onProgress);
    if ((this.isVideoFormat(from) || this.isAudioFormat(from)) && (this.isVideoFormat(to) || this.isAudioFormat(to))) return this.convertWithFFmpeg(file, from, to, outputName, onProgress);
    if (this.isTextFormat(from) && this.isTextFormat(to)) return this.convertText(file, from, to);
    return { success: false, error: `Conversion from .${from} to .${to} not supported`, outputName };
  }

  private isImageFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['jpg','jpeg','png','webp','gif','bmp'].includes(ext); }
  private isVideoFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['mp4','avi','mov','mkv','webm'].includes(ext); }
  private isAudioFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['mp3','wav','aac','ogg','flac'].includes(ext); }
  private isTextFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['txt','md','json','xml','html','css','js','py'].includes(ext); }

  private async convertImage(file: Blob, from: string, to: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const img = new Image();
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
      img.onload = () => {
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = img.width;
        canvas.height = img.height;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        if (!ctx) { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); resolve({ success: false, error: 'Canvas not supported', outputName: `output.${to}` }); return; }
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        const mimeType = to === 'jpg' || to === 'jpeg' ? 'image/jpeg' : to === 'webp' ? 'image/webp' : 'image/png';
        const quality = to === 'jpg' || to === 'jpeg' ? 0.9 : undefined;
        canvas.toBlob((blob) => { if (blob) { onProgress?.(100); resolve({ success: true, blob, outputName: `output.${to}` }); } else resolve({ success: false, error: 'Canvas conversion failed', outputName: `output.${to}` }); }, mimeType, quality);
      };
      img.onerror = () => { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); resolve({ success: false, error: 'Image load failed', outputName: `output.${to}` }); };
      img.src = url;
    });
  }

  private async convertDocx(file: Blob, to: string): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    try {
      const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
      const result = to === 'html' ? await mammoth.convertToHtml({ arrayBuffer }) : await mammoth.extractRawText({ arrayBuffer });
      const mimeType = to === 'html' ? 'text/html' : 'text/plain';
      return { success: true, blob: new Blob([result.value], { type: mimeType }), outputName: `output.${to}` };
    } catch (err) { return { success: false, error: (err as Error).message, outputName: `output.${to}` }; }
  }

  private async convertFolderToZip(file: Blob, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    const zip = new JSZip();
    const content = await zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob' }, (meta) => onProgress?.(meta.percent));
    return { success: true, blob: content, outputName: 'output.zip' };
  }

  private async convertArchive(file: Blob, from: string, to: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    onProgress?.(100);
    return { success: true, blob: file, outputName: `output.${to}` };
  }

  private async convertWithFFmpeg(file: Blob, from: string, to: string, outputName: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    await this.initFFmpeg();
    if (!this.ffmpeg || !this.ffmpegReady) return { success: false, error: 'FFmpeg not ready', outputName };
    try {
      const inputName = `input.${from}`;
      await this.ffmpeg.writeFile(inputName, await fetchFile(file));
      this.ffmpeg.on('progress', ({ progress }) => onProgress?.(Math.round(progress * 100)));
      let args: string[];
      if (this.isVideoFormat(to)) args = ['-i', inputName, '-c:v', 'libx264', '-c:a', 'aac', outputName];
      else if (this.isAudioFormat(to)) args = ['-i', inputName, '-c:a', 'libmp3lame', '-q:a', '2', outputName];
      else args = ['-i', inputName, outputName];
      await this.ffmpeg.exec(args);
      const data = await this.ffmpeg.readFile(outputName);
      // Ensure data is Uint8Array
      let uint8Data: Uint8Array;
      if (data instanceof Uint8Array) {
        uint8Data = data;
      } else if (typeof data === 'string') {
        // Convert string to Uint8Array
        uint8Data = new TextEncoder().encode(data);
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unexpected data type from FFmpeg');
      }
      const blob = uint8ToBlob(uint8Data);
      await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(inputName);
      await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(outputName);
      return { success: true, blob, outputName };
    } catch (err) { return { success: false, error: (err as Error).message, outputName }; }
  }

  private async convertText(file: Blob, from: string, to: string): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    try {
      let text = await file.text();
      if (from === 'json' && to === 'txt') text = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2);
      else if (from === 'txt' && to === 'json') text = JSON.stringify({ content: text });
      else if (from === 'md' && to === 'html') text = `<pre>${text}</pre>`;
      const mimeType = to === 'html' ? 'text/html' : 'text/plain';
      return { success: true, blob: new Blob([text], { type: mimeType }), outputName: `output.${to}` };
    } catch (err) { return { success: false, error: (err as Error).message, outputName: `output.${to}` }; }
  }

  private getMimeType(ext: string): string {
    const mimes: Record<string, string> = { mp4:'video/mp4', webm:'video/webm', mp3:'audio/mpeg', wav:'audio/wav', jpg:'image/jpeg', jpeg:'image/jpeg', png:'image/png', webp:'image/webp', pdf:'application/pdf', zip:'application/zip', txt:'text/plain', html:'text/html', json:'application/json' };
    return mimes[ext] || 'application/octet-stream';
  }

  canConvert(fromExt: string, toExt: string): boolean {
    const from = fromExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    const to = toExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    if (from === to) return true;
    if (this.isImageFormat(from) && this.isImageFormat(to)) return true;
    if ((this.isVideoFormat(from) || this.isAudioFormat(from)) && (this.isVideoFormat(to) || this.isAudioFormat(to))) return true;
    if (from === 'docx' && (to === 'txt' || to === 'html')) return true;
    if (this.isTextFormat(from) && this.isTextFormat(to)) return true;
    if (from === 'folder' && to === 'zip') return true;
    return false;
  }
}

export const conversionEngine = new ConversionEngine();

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/fileSystemBackend.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// src/lib/fileSystemBackend.ts

import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry, FileSystemFileEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';

export interface IFileSystemBackend {
  pickDirectory(): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null>;
  readDirectory(handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle): Promise<FileSystemEntry[]>;
  createDirectory(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle>;
  deleteEntry(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string, isDirectory?: boolean): Promise<void>;
  renameEntry(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, oldName: string, newName: string): Promise<void>;
  copyEntry(
    sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle,
    targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    newName?: string
  ): Promise<void>;
  moveEntry(
    sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle,
    sourceParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    newName?: string
  ): Promise<void>;
  getFileSize(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<number>;
  getFileDate(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Date>;
  writeFile(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string, data: Blob | string): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle>;
  readFileAsText(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<string>;
  readFileAsBlob(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Blob>;
  getFileHandle(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle | null>;
  getDirectoryHandle(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null>;
  exists(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<boolean>;
}

class FileSystemBackend implements IFileSystemBackend {
  /**
   * Opens a directory picker and returns the selected directory handle.
   */
  async pickDirectory(): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null> {
    try {
      const dirHandle = await window.showDirectoryPicker();
      return dirHandle;
    } catch (err) {
      if ((err as Error).name === 'AbortError') {
        // User cancelled
        return null;
      }
      console.error('Failed to pick directory:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to pick directory: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Reads the contents of a directory and returns an array of FileSystemEntry objects.
   */
  async readDirectory(handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle): Promise<FileSystemEntry[]> {
    const entries: FileSystemEntry[] = [];

    try {
      for await (const [name, entryHandle] of handle.entries()) {
        const isDirectory = entryHandle.kind === 'directory';
        let size = 0;
        let lastModified = new Date();

        if (!isDirectory) {
          const fileHandle = entryHandle as FileSystemFileHandle;
          try {
            const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
            size = file.size;
            lastModified = new Date(file.lastModified);
          } catch (err) {
            console.warn(`Could not get file stats for ${name}:`, err);
          }
        } else {
          lastModified = new Date();
        }

        entries.push({
          name,
          kind: isDirectory ? 'directory' : 'file',
          size,
          lastModified,
          handle: entryHandle as FileSystemFileHandle | FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
        });
      }

      entries.sort((a, b) => {
        if (a.kind === 'directory' && b.kind !== 'directory') return -1;
        if (a.kind !== 'directory' && b.kind === 'directory') return 1;
        return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
      });

      return entries;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to read directory:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to read directory: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Creates a new directory inside the given parent directory.
   */
  async createDirectory(
    parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    name: string
  ): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle> {
    try {
      const newDirHandle = await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name, { create: true });
      return newDirHandle;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to create directory:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to create directory "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Deletes a file or directory from the given parent directory.
   */
  async deleteEntry(
    parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    name: string,
    isDirectory: boolean = false
  ): Promise<void> {
    try {
      await parentHandle.removeEntry(name, { recursive: isDirectory });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to delete entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to delete "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Renames a file or directory within the same parent directory.
   */
  async renameEntry(
    parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    oldName: string,
    newName: string
  ): Promise<void> {
    try {
      let sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle;
      let isDirectory = false;
      try {
        sourceHandle = await parentHandle.getFileHandle(oldName);
      } catch {
        sourceHandle = await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(oldName);
        isDirectory = true;
      }

      if (isDirectory) {
        const newDirHandle = await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(newName, { create: true });
        await this.copyDirectoryContents(sourceHandle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle, newDirHandle);
        await parentHandle.removeEntry(oldName, { recursive: true });
      } else {
        const fileHandle = sourceHandle as FileSystemFileHandle;
        const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
        const newFileHandle = await parentHandle.getFileHandle(newName, { create: true });
        const writable = await newFileHandle.createWritable();
        await writable.write(file);
        await writable.close();
        await parentHandle.removeEntry(oldName);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to rename entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to rename "${oldName}" to "${newName}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Copies a file or directory to a target directory.
   */
  async copyEntry(
    sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle,
    targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    newName?: string
  ): Promise<void> {
    const name = newName || sourceHandle.name;
    try {
      if (sourceHandle.kind === 'file') {
        const fileHandle = sourceHandle as FileSystemFileHandle;
        const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
        const newFileHandle = await targetParentHandle.getFileHandle(name, { create: true });
        const writable = await newFileHandle.createWritable();
        await writable.write(file);
        await writable.close();
      } else {
        const sourceDirHandle = sourceHandle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
        const targetDirHandle = await targetParentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name, { create: true });
        await this.copyDirectoryContents(sourceDirHandle, targetDirHandle);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to copy entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to copy "${sourceHandle.name}" to "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Moves a file or directory to a target directory.
   * Requires the source parent handle to delete the original.
   */
  async moveEntry(
    sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle,
    sourceParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    newName?: string
  ): Promise<void> {
    const name = newName || sourceHandle.name;
    try {
      await this.copyEntry(sourceHandle, targetParentHandle, name);
      await sourceParentHandle.removeEntry(sourceHandle.name, { recursive: sourceHandle.kind === 'directory' });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to move entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to move "${sourceHandle.name}" to "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Helper: recursively copy all contents of a source directory to a target directory.
   */
  private async copyDirectoryContents(
    sourceDir: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    targetDir: FileSystemDirectoryHandle
  ): Promise<void> {
    for await (const [name, entry] of sourceDir.entries()) {
      if (entry.kind === 'file') {
        const fileHandle = entry as FileSystemFileHandle;
        const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
        const newFileHandle = await targetDir.getFileHandle(name, { create: true });
        const writable = await newFileHandle.createWritable();
        await writable.write(file);
        await writable.close();
      } else {
        const subDirHandle = entry as FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
        const newSubDirHandle = await targetDir.getDirectoryHandle(name, { create: true });
        await this.copyDirectoryContents(subDirHandle, newSubDirHandle);
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * Gets the size of a file.
   */
  async getFileSize(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<number> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return file.size;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to get file size:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to get file size: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Gets the last modified date of a file.
   */
  async getFileDate(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Date> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return new Date(file.lastModified);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to get file date:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to get file date: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Writes data to a file in the specified directory.
   */
  async writeFile(
    parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    name: string,
    data: Blob | string
  ): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle> {
    try {
      const fileHandle = await parentHandle.getFileHandle(name, { create: true });
      const writable = await fileHandle.createWritable();
      await writable.write(data);
      await writable.close();
      return fileHandle;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to write file:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to write file "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Reads a file as text.
   */
  async readFileAsText(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<string> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return await file.text();
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to read file as text:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to read file: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Reads a file as a Blob.
   */
  async readFileAsBlob(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Blob> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return file;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to read file as blob:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to read file: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Gets a file handle by name, returns null if not found.
   */
  async getFileHandle(
    parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    name: string
  ): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle | null> {
    try {
      return await parentHandle.getFileHandle(name);
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Gets a directory handle by name, returns null if not found.
   */
  async getDirectoryHandle(
    parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    name: string
  ): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null> {
    try {
      return await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name);
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Checks if a file or directory exists.
   */
  async exists(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<boolean> {
    try {
      await parentHandle.getFileHandle(name);
      return true;
    } catch {
      try {
        await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name);
        return true;
      } catch {
        return false;
      }
    }
  }
}

export const fileSystemBackend = new FileSystemBackend();
declare global {
  interface Window {
    showDirectoryPicker(): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle>;
  }
  interface FileSystemDirectoryHandle {
    entries(): AsyncIterable<[string, FileSystemHandle]>;
  }
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/conversionEngines.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { ConversionEngine, CONVERSION_RULES } from '@/types/rename';
import { FFmpeg } from '@ffmpeg/ffmpeg';
import { fetchFile, toBlobURL } from '@ffmpeg/util';
import JSZip from 'jszip';
import mammoth from 'mammoth';
import { saveAs } from 'file-saver';

// Helper to convert Uint8Array to Blob safely (avoids SharedArrayBuffer issues)
function uint8ToBlob(uint8: Uint8Array): Blob {
  const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(uint8.byteLength);
  const view = new Uint8Array(buffer);
  view.set(uint8);
  return new Blob([buffer]);
}

// FFmpeg WASM Engine
class FFmpegEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'ffmpeg';
  isReady = false;
  private ffmpeg: FFmpeg | null = null;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.isReady) return;
    
    this.ffmpeg = new FFmpeg();
    const baseURL = 'https://unpkg.com/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/umd';
    
    await this.ffmpeg.load({
      coreURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.js`, 'text/javascript'),
      wasmURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.wasm`, 'application/wasm'),
    });
    
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    if (!this.ffmpeg) throw new Error('FFmpeg not initialized');
    
    const inputName = `input${fromExt}`;
    const outputName = `output${toExt}`;
    
    // Write file to FFmpeg FS
    const fileData = await fetchFile(file);
    await this.ffmpeg.writeFile(inputName, fileData);
    
    // Run conversion
    const args = this.getConversionArgs(fromExt, toExt, inputName, outputName);
    
    this.ffmpeg.on('progress', ({ progress }) => {
      onProgress?.(Math.round(progress * 100));
    });
    
    await this.ffmpeg.exec(args);
    
    // Read output
    const data = await this.ffmpeg.readFile(outputName);
    // Ensure data is Uint8Array
    let uint8Data: Uint8Array;
    if (data instanceof Uint8Array) {
      uint8Data = data;
    } else if (typeof data === 'string') {
      uint8Data = new TextEncoder().encode(data);
    } else {
      throw new Error('Unexpected data type from FFmpeg');
    }
    const outputBlob = uint8ToBlob(uint8Data);
    
    // Cleanup
    await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(inputName);
    await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(outputName);
    
    return outputBlob;
  }

  private getConversionArgs(fromExt: string, toExt: string, input: string, output: string): string[] {
    // Video to video
    if (['.mp4', '.avi', '.mov', '.mkv', '.webm'].includes(fromExt)) {
      if (toExt === '.webm') return ['-i', input, '-c:v', 'libvpx-vp9', '-c:a', 'libopus', output];
      return ['-i', input, '-c:v', 'libx264', '-c:a', 'aac', output];
    }
    
    // Audio to audio
    if (['.mp3', '.wav', '.aac', '.ogg', '.flac'].includes(fromExt)) {
      if (toExt === '.mp3') return ['-i', input, '-c:a', 'libmp3lame', '-q:a', '2', output];
      return ['-i', input, output];
    }
    
    return ['-i', input, output];
  }

  private getMimeType(ext: string): string {
    const mimeTypes: Record<string, string> = {
      '.mp4': 'video/mp4',
      '.webm': 'video/webm',
      '.mp3': 'audio/mpeg',
      '.wav': 'audio/wav',
    };
    return mimeTypes[ext] || 'application/octet-stream';
  }
}

// Sharp-like Image Engine (using Canvas API for browser)
class CanvasImageEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'sharp';
  isReady = true;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const img = new Image();
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
      
      img.onload = () => {
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = img.width;
        canvas.height = img.height;
        
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        if (!ctx) {
          reject(new Error('Canvas not supported'));
          return;
        }
        
        // Handle transparency for PNG/WebP
        if (toExt === '.png' || toExt === '.webp') {
          ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        }
        
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        
        const mimeType = toExt === '.jpg' || toExt === '.jpeg' 
          ? 'image/jpeg' 
          : toExt === '.webp' 
            ? 'image/webp' 
            : 'image/png';
        
        canvas.toBlob((blob) => {
          if (blob) {
            resolve(blob);
          } else {
            reject(new Error('Canvas to Blob failed'));
          }
        }, mimeType, 0.9);
      };
      
      img.onerror = () => {
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        reject(new Error('Image load failed'));
      };
      
      img.src = url;
    });
  }
}

// Mammoth Document Engine
class MammothEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'mammoth';
  isReady = true;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
    
    let result: { value: string };
    
    if (toExt === '.html') {
      result = await mammoth.convertToHtml({ arrayBuffer });
    } else {
      result = await mammoth.extractRawText({ arrayBuffer });
    }
    
    const mimeType = toExt === '.html' ? 'text/html' : 'text/plain';
    return new Blob([result.value], { type: mimeType });
  }
}

// JSZip Archive Engine
class JSZipEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'jszip';
  isReady = true;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    // For folder to zip conversion
    // This requires the folder contents to be passed separately
    // For now, return empty zip as placeholder
    const zip = new JSZip();
    const content = await zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob' });
    return content;
  }

  async compressFolder(
    files: { name: string; content: Blob | string }[],
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    const zip = new JSZip();
    
    files.forEach((file, index) => {
      zip.file(file.name, file.content);
      onProgress?.(Math.round((index / files.length) * 50));
    });
    
    const content = await zip.generateAsync(
      { type: 'blob' },
      (metadata) => {
        onProgress?.(50 + Math.round(metadata.percent / 2));
      }
    );
    
    return content;
  }
}

// Export engines
export const ffmpegEngine = new FFmpegEngine();
export const imageEngine = new CanvasImageEngine();
export const mammothEngine = new MammothEngine();
export const zipEngine = new JSZipEngine();

export function getEngineForConversion(fromExt: string, toExt: string): ConversionEngine | null {
  const rule = CONVERSION_RULES.find(r => 
    r.from.includes(fromExt.toLowerCase()) && r.to === toExt.toLowerCase()
  );
  
  if (!rule) return null;
  
  switch (rule.engine) {
    case 'ffmpeg': return ffmpegEngine;
    case 'sharp': return imageEngine;
    case 'mammoth': return mammothEngine;
    case 'jszip': return zipEngine;
    default: return null;
  }
}

export function needsConversion(oldName: string, newName: string): boolean {
  const oldExt = getExtension(oldName);
  const newExt = getExtension(newName);
  return oldExt !== newExt && getEngineForConversion(oldExt, newExt) !== null;
}

export function getExtension(filename: string): string {
  const ext = filename.slice(filename.lastIndexOf('.')).toLowerCase();
  return ext.includes('.') ? ext : '';
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/githubApi.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { Octokit } from '@octokit/rest';
import { 
  GitHubAccount, 
  GitHubRepository, 
  GitHubContent,
  GitHubPermission 
} from '@/types/github';

class GitHubApi {
  private octokit: Octokit | null = null;
  private currentToken: string | null = null;

  async authenticate(token: string): Promise<{ username: string; avatarUrl?: string }> {
    this.octokit = new Octokit({ auth: token });
    this.currentToken = token;

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.users.getAuthenticated();
      return {
        username: data.login,
        avatarUrl: data.avatar_url,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Invalid token or authentication failed');
    }
  }

  setToken(token: string): void {
    this.octokit = new Octokit({ auth: token });
    this.currentToken = token;
  }

  async listRepositories(username: string): Promise<GitHubRepository[]> {
    if (!this.octokit) throw new Error('Not authenticated');

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.repos.listForUser({
        username,
        sort: 'updated',
        per_page: 100,
      });
      return data as GitHubRepository[];
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Failed to fetch repositories');
    }
  }

  async getRepositoryContents(
    owner: string,
    repo: string,
    path: string = ''
  ): Promise<GitHubContent[]> {
    if (!this.octokit) throw new Error('Not authenticated');

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.repos.getContent({
        owner,
        repo,
        path,
      });

      // Handle single file vs directory
      if (!Array.isArray(data)) {
        return [data as GitHubContent];
      }

      return data as GitHubContent[];
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Failed to fetch repository contents');
    }
  }

  async getFileContent(
    owner: string,
    repo: string,
    path: string
  ): Promise<{ content: string; name: string; downloadUrl: string | null }> {
    if (!this.octokit) throw new Error('Not authenticated');

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.repos.getContent({
        owner,
        repo,
        path,
      });

      if (Array.isArray(data)) {
        throw new Error('Path is a directory, not a file');
      }

      const fileData = data as GitHubContent;
      
      // Decode base64 content
      let decodedContent = '';
      if (fileData.content && fileData.encoding === 'base64') {
        decodedContent = atob(fileData.content.replace(/\n/g, ''));
      }

      return {
        content: decodedContent,
        name: fileData.name,
        downloadUrl: fileData.download_url,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Failed to fetch file content');
    }
  }

  async validateToken(token: string): Promise<boolean> {
    try {
      const tempOctokit = new Octokit({ auth: token });
      await tempOctokit.users.getAuthenticated();
      return true;
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }

  getPermissionLevel(scopes: string[]): GitHubPermission {
    // Determine permission based on token scopes
    if (scopes.includes('delete_repo') || scopes.includes('admin:org')) {
      return 'admin';
    }
    if (scopes.includes('repo')) {
      return 'write';
    }
    if (scopes.includes('write:discussion')) {
      return 'triage';
    }
    return 'read';
  }

  formatDate(dateString: string): string {
    const date = new Date(dateString);
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      year: 'numeric',
    });
  }

  formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
    if (bytes === 0) return '-';
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    let size = bytes;
    let unitIndex = 0;
    while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      unitIndex++;
    }
    return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
  }
}

export const githubApi = new GitHubApi();

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/googleDriveApi.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { GoogleAccount, DriveFile, DriveFolder } from '@/types/drive';

const DISCOVERY_DOC = 'https://www.googleapis.com/discovery/v1/apis/drive/v3/rest';
const SCOPES = 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.file';

class GoogleDriveApi {
  private gapiInited = false;
  private gsiInited = false;
  private tokenClient: any = null;

  async initialize(gapi: any, tokenClient: any): Promise<void> {
    this.tokenClient = tokenClient;
    this.gsiInited = true;
    this.gapiInited = true;
  }

  async listFiles(account: GoogleAccount, folderId: string = 'root'): Promise<DriveFile[]> {
    const response = await fetch(
      `https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files?q='${folderId}'+in+parents+and+trashed=false&fields=files(id,name,mimeType,modifiedTime,size,thumbnailLink,iconLink,webViewLink,parents)&orderBy=name&pageSize=100`,
      {
        headers: {
          'Authorization': `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`,
        },
      }
    );

    if (!response.ok) {
      if (response.status === 401) {
        throw new Error('Token expired');
      }
      throw new Error(`Drive API error: ${response.status}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data.files || [];
  }

  async getFileInfo(account: GoogleAccount, fileId: string): Promise<DriveFile> {
    const response = await fetch(
      `https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/${fileId}?fields=id,name,mimeType,modifiedTime,size,thumbnailLink,iconLink,webViewLink,parents`,
      {
        headers: {
          'Authorization': `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`,
        },
      }
    );

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to get file info: ${response.status}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  }

  isFolder(file: DriveFile): boolean {
    return file.mimeType === 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder';
  }

  formatFileSize(size?: string): string {
    if (!size) return '-';
    const bytes = parseInt(size, 10);
    if (isNaN(bytes)) return '-';
    
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
    let unitIndex = 0;
    let sizeNum = bytes;
    
    while (sizeNum >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
      sizeNum /= 1024;
      unitIndex++;
    }
    
    return `${sizeNum.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
  }

  formatDate(dateString: string): string {
    const date = new Date(dateString);
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      year: 'numeric',
    });
  }

  getGmailUsername(email: string): string {
    return email.split('@')[0];
  }
}

export const driveApi = new GoogleDriveApi();

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/githubStorage.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { openDB, DBSchema, IDBPDatabase } from 'idb';
import { GitHubAccount } from '@/types/github';
import CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';

const DB_NAME = 'github-accounts-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;
const STORE_NAME = 'accounts';

// Encryption key - in production, use a more secure method
const ENCRYPTION_KEY = (import.meta as any).env.VITE_GITHUB_ENCRYPTION_KEY || 'your-secure-key-here';

interface GitHubDBSchema extends DBSchema {
  accounts: {
    key: string;
    value: {
      id: string;
      encryptedData: string;
      addedAt: number;
    };
  };
}

class GitHubStorage {
  private db: IDBPDatabase<GitHubDBSchema> | null = null;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.db = await openDB<GitHubDBSchema>(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
      upgrade(db) {
        if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains(STORE_NAME)) {
          db.createObjectStore(STORE_NAME, { keyPath: 'id' });
        }
      },
    });
  }

  private encrypt(data: string): string {
    return CryptoJS.AES.encrypt(data, ENCRYPTION_KEY).toString();
  }

  private decrypt(encryptedData: string): string {
    const bytes = CryptoJS.AES.decrypt(encryptedData, ENCRYPTION_KEY);
    return bytes.toString(CryptoJS.enc.Utf8);
  }

  async saveAccount(account: GitHubAccount): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();

    const dataToEncrypt = JSON.stringify({
      token: account.token,
      avatarUrl: account.avatarUrl,
      permissions: account.permissions,
    });

    await this.db!.put(STORE_NAME, {
      id: account.id,
      encryptedData: this.encrypt(dataToEncrypt),
      addedAt: account.addedAt,
    });
  }

  async getAllAccounts(): Promise<GitHubAccount[]> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();

    const allData = await this.db!.getAll(STORE_NAME);
    
    return allData
      .map((item) => {
        try {
          const decrypted = JSON.parse(this.decrypt(item.encryptedData));
          return {
            id: item.id,
            token: decrypted.token,
            avatarUrl: decrypted.avatarUrl,
            permissions: decrypted.permissions,
            addedAt: item.addedAt,
          } as GitHubAccount;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Failed to decrypt account:', item.id);
          return null;
        }
      })
      .filter((acc): acc is GitHubAccount => acc !== null);
  }

  async deleteAccount(username: string): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();
    await this.db!.delete(STORE_NAME, username);
  }

  async clearAll(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();
    await this.db!.clear(STORE_NAME);
  }
}

export const githubStorage = new GitHubStorage();

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/promptUploadEngine.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { githubApi } from './githubApi';

export interface UploadResult {
  folderPath: string;
  shareLink: string;
  rawLink?: string;
}

export async function uploadToDrive(
  sessionName: string,
  promptBlob: Blob,
  linksBlob: Blob,
  files: { name: string; content: Blob }[],
  accountId: string,
  onProgress?: (p: number) => void
): Promise<UploadResult> {
  const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
  if (!account) throw new Error('Account not found');

  async function findOrCreateFolder(parentId: string, name: string): Promise<string> {
    const query = `name='${name}' and mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and '${parentId}' in parents and trashed=false`;
    const res = await fetch(`https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&fields=files(id)`, {
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}` }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.files && data.files.length) return data.files[0].id;
    const metadata = { name, mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder', parents: [parentId] };
    const createRes = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(metadata)
    });
    const newFolder = await createRes.json();
    return newFolder.id;
  }

  async function uploadFile(folderId: string, fileName: string, blob: Blob) {
    const metadata = { name: fileName, parents: [folderId] };
    const form = new FormData();
    form.append('metadata', new Blob([JSON.stringify(metadata)], { type: 'application/json' }));
    form.append('file', blob);
    await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/upload/drive/v3/files?uploadType=multipart', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}` },
      body: form
    });
  }

  onProgress?.(10);
  const proMntId = await findOrCreateFolder('root', 'PRO-MNT');
  onProgress?.(20);
  const sessionFolderId = await findOrCreateFolder(proMntId, sessionName);
  onProgress?.(30);
  await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, 'prompt.txt', promptBlob);
  onProgress?.(40);
  await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, 'links.txt', linksBlob);
  let fileProgress = 40;
  for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
    await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, files[i].name, files[i].content);
    fileProgress += 50 / files.length;
    onProgress?.(Math.min(fileProgress, 90));
  }
  // Make folder publicly readable
  await fetch(`https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/${sessionFolderId}/permissions`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ role: 'reader', type: 'anyone' })
  });
  onProgress?.(100);
  return {
    folderPath: `PRO-MNT/${sessionName}`,
    shareLink: `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${sessionFolderId}`
  };
}

export async function uploadToGitHub(
  sessionName: string,
  promptBlob: Blob,
  linksBlob: Blob,
  files: { name: string; content: Blob }[],
  username: string,
  token: string,
  onProgress?: (p: number) => void
): Promise<UploadResult> {
  githubApi.setToken(token);
  const octokit = (githubApi as any).octokit;
  const repoName = 'PRO-MNT';
  try {
    await octokit.repos.get({ owner: username, repo: repoName });
  } catch {
    await octokit.repos.createForAuthenticatedUser({ name: repoName, private: false });
  }
  onProgress?.(10);
  const { data: repo } = await octokit.repos.get({ owner: username, repo: repoName });
  const defaultBranch = repo.default_branch;
  onProgress?.(20);
  const basePath = sessionName;
  const filesToUpload = [
    { path: `${basePath}/prompt.txt`, content: promptBlob },
    { path: `${basePath}/links.txt`, content: linksBlob },
    ...files.map(f => ({ path: `${basePath}/${f.name}`, content: f.content }))
  ];
  let fileProgress = 20;
  for (let i = 0; i < filesToUpload.length; i++) {
    const file = filesToUpload[i];
    const contentBase64 = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => {
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onloadend = () => resolve((reader.result as string).split(',')[1]);
      reader.onerror = reject;
      reader.readAsDataURL(file.content);
    });
    let sha: string | undefined;
    try {
      const { data: existing } = await octokit.repos.getContent({ owner: username, repo: repoName, path: file.path });
      sha = (existing as any).sha;
    } catch {}
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner: username,
      repo: repoName,
      path: file.path,
      message: `Add ${file.path}`,
      content: contentBase64,
      sha,
      branch: defaultBranch
    });
    fileProgress += 70 / filesToUpload.length;
    onProgress?.(Math.min(fileProgress, 90));
  }
  const shareLink = `https://github.com/${username}/${repoName}/tree/${defaultBranch}/${basePath}`;
  onProgress?.(100);
  return {
    folderPath: `${repoName}/${basePath}`,
    shareLink,
    rawLink: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${username}/${repoName}/${defaultBranch}/${basePath}/prompt.txt`
  };
}

import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { githubApi } from './githubApi';

export interface UploadResult { folderPath: string; shareLink: string; rawLink?: string; }

export async function uploadToDrive(sessionName: string, promptText: string, linksText: string, files: { name: string; content: Blob }[], accountId: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<UploadResult> {
  const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
  if (!account) throw new Error('Account not found');
  async function findOrCreateFolder(parentId: string, name: string): Promise<string> {
    const query = `name='${name}' and mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and '${parentId}' in parents and trashed=false`;
    const res = await fetch(`https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&fields=files(id)`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}` } });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.files && data.files.length) return data.files[0].id;
    const metadata = { name, mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder', parents: [parentId] };
    const createRes = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(metadata) });
    const newFolder = await createRes.json();
    return newFolder.id;
  }
  async function uploadFile(folderId: string, fileName: string, blob: Blob) {
    const metadata = { name: fileName, parents: [folderId] };
    const form = new FormData();
    form.append('metadata', new Blob([JSON.stringify(metadata)], { type: 'application/json' }));
    form.append('file', blob);
    await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/upload/drive/v3/files?uploadType=multipart', { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}` }, body: form });
  }
  onProgress?.(10);
  const proMntId = await findOrCreateFolder('root', 'PRO-MNT');
  onProgress?.(20);
  const sessionFolderId = await findOrCreateFolder(proMntId, sessionName);
  onProgress?.(30);
  await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, 'prompt.txt', new Blob([promptText], { type: 'text/plain' }));
  onProgress?.(40);
  await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, 'links.txt', new Blob([linksText], { type: 'text/plain' }));
  let fileProgress = 40;
  for (let i=0; i<files.length; i++) { await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, files[i].name, files[i].content); fileProgress += 50/files.length; onProgress?.(Math.min(fileProgress,90)); }
  await fetch(`https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/${sessionFolderId}/permissions`, { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ role: 'reader', type: 'anyone' }) });
  onProgress?.(100);
  return { folderPath: `PRO-MNT/${sessionName}`, shareLink: `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${sessionFolderId}` };
}

export async function uploadToGitHub(sessionName: string, promptText: string, linksText: string, files: { name: string; content: Blob }[], username: string, token: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<UploadResult> {
  githubApi.setToken(token);
  const octokit = (githubApi as any).octokit;
  let repoName = 'PRO-MNT';
  try { await octokit.repos.get({ owner: username, repo: repoName }); } catch { await octokit.repos.createForAuthenticatedUser({ name: repoName, private: false }); }
  onProgress?.(10);
  const { data: repo } = await octokit.repos.get({ owner: username, repo: repoName });
  const defaultBranch = repo.default_branch;
  onProgress?.(20);
  const basePath = sessionName;
  const filesToUpload = [{ path: `${basePath}/prompt.txt`, content: promptText }, { path: `${basePath}/links.txt`, content: linksText }, ...files.map(f => ({ path: `${basePath}/${f.name}`, content: f.content })) ];
  let fileProgress = 20;
  for (let i=0; i<filesToUpload.length; i++) {
    const file = filesToUpload[i];
    const contentBase64 = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onloadend = () => resolve((reader.result as string).split(',')[1]); reader.onerror = reject; reader.readAsDataURL(typeof file.content === 'string' ? new Blob([file.content]) : file.content); });
    let sha: string | undefined;
    try { const { data: existing } = await octokit.repos.getContent({ owner: username, repo: repoName, path: file.path }); sha = (existing as any).sha; } catch {}
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({ owner: username, repo: repoName, path: file.path, message: `Add ${file.path}`, content: contentBase64, sha, branch: defaultBranch });
    fileProgress += 70 / filesToUpload.length;
    onProgress?.(Math.min(fileProgress,90));
  }
  const shareLink = `https://github.com/${username}/${repoName}/tree/${defaultBranch}/${basePath}`;
  onProgress?.(100);
  return { folderPath: `${repoName}/${basePath}`, shareLink, rawLink: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${username}/${repoName}/${defaultBranch}/${basePath}/prompt.txt` };
}

import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"

export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {

}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/webcontainerApi.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { WebContainer } from '@webcontainer/api';
import { TerminalFileSystemEntry } from '@/types/terminal';

class WebContainerApi {
  private instance: WebContainer | null = null;
  private isBooting = false;

  async init(): Promise<WebContainer> {
    if (this.instance) return this.instance;
    if (this.isBooting) {
      while (this.isBooting) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100));
      }
      return this.instance!;
    }
    this.isBooting = true;
    try {
      this.instance = await WebContainer.boot();
      this.isBooting = false;
      return this.instance;
    } catch (error) {
      this.isBooting = false;
      throw new Error(`Failed to boot WebContainer: ${(error as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  getInstance(): WebContainer | null {
    return this.instance;
  }

  async readDirectory(path: string): Promise<TerminalFileSystemEntry[]> {
    if (!this.instance) throw new Error('WebContainer not initialized');
    const fs = this.instance.fs;
    const entries = await fs.readdir(path, { withFileTypes: true });
    const result: TerminalFileSystemEntry[] = [];
    for (const entry of entries) {
      const fullPath = path === '/' ? `/${entry.name}` : `${path}/${entry.name}`;
      let type: 'file' | 'directory' | 'symlink' = 'file';
      if (entry.isDirectory()) type = 'directory';
      let size = 0;
      let lastModified = new Date();
      try {
        const file = await fs.readFile(fullPath);
        size = file.byteLength;
        lastModified = new Date();
      } catch { /* ignore */ }
      result.push({
        name: entry.name,
        type,
        size,
        lastModified,
        permissions: 'rwxr-xr-x',
        path: fullPath,
      });
    }
    return result.sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.type === 'directory' && b.type !== 'directory') return -1;
      if (a.type !== 'directory' && b.type === 'directory') return 1;
      return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
    });
  }

  async readFile(path: string): Promise<string> {
    if (!this.instance) throw new Error('WebContainer not initialized');
    const fs = this.instance.fs;
    const content = await fs.readFile(path, 'utf-8');
    return content;
  }

  async getFileStats(_path: string): Promise<any> {
    return null;
  }

  formatPermissions(_stats: any): string {
    return 'rwxr-xr-x';
  }

  formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
    if (bytes === 0) return '-';
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    let size = bytes;
    let unitIndex = 0;
    while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      unitIndex++;
    }
    return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
  }

  formatDate(date: Date): string {
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit',
    });
  }

  isReady(): boolean {
    return this.instance !== null && !this.isBooting;
  }

  async shutdown(): Promise<void> {
    this.instance = null;
    this.isBooting = false;
  }
}

export const webcontainerApi = new WebContainerApi();

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/appStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';

export type SourceType = 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';

interface AppState {
  activeSource: SourceType;
  setActiveSource: (source: SourceType) => void;
}

export const useAppStore = create<AppState>((set) => ({
  activeSource: 'storage',
  setActiveSource: (source) => set({ activeSource: source }),
}));

// Custom selector hooks for better performance
export const useActiveSource = () => useAppStore((state) => state.activeSource);
export const useSetActiveSource = () => useAppStore((state) => state.setActiveSource);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/dfolStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';

export type DFOLMode = 'folder' | 'txt' | 'pdf' | 'compress';
export interface DFOLItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  sourceType: string;
  panelId: string;
  path: string;
  type: string;
  size: number;
  operations: DFOLMode[];
}
export interface DFOLProfile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  format: string;
  compressionLevel: string;
}
export const DEFAULT_PROFILES: DFOLProfile[] = [];

interface DFOLStore {
  isDFOLMode: boolean;
  selectedItems: DFOLItem[];
  operations: any[];
  activeProfile: string;
  customProfiles: DFOLProfile[];
  outputDirectory: string;
  isExecuting: boolean;
  showProfilePanel: boolean;
  showExecutePanel: boolean;
  globalProgress: number;
  notifications: any[];
  enterDFOLMode: () => void;
  exitDFOLMode: () => void;
  selectItem: (item: DFOLItem, ops: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  clearSelection: () => void;
  setItemOperations: (id: string, ops: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  setActiveProfile: (id: string) => void;
  addCustomProfile: (profile: DFOLProfile) => void;
  removeCustomProfile: (id: string) => void;
  openProfilePanel: () => void;
  closeProfilePanel: () => void;
  openExecutePanel: () => void;
  closeExecutePanel: () => void;
  executeOperations: () => Promise<void>;
  updateOperationStatus: (id: string, status: string, progress?: number, msg?: string) => void;
  completeOperation: (id: string, result: any) => void;
  failOperation: (id: string, error: string) => void;
  addNotification: (notif: any) => void;
  dismissNotification: (id: string) => void;
  clearNotifications: () => void;
  getPendingOperations: () => any[];
  getOperationStats: () => any;
}

export const useDFOLStore = create<DFOLStore>()(immer((set, get) => ({
  isDFOLMode: false,
  selectedItems: [],
  operations: [],
  activeProfile: 'default',
  customProfiles: [],
  outputDirectory: '/DFOL',
  isExecuting: false,
  showProfilePanel: false,
  showExecutePanel: false,
  globalProgress: 0,
  notifications: [],
  enterDFOLMode: () => set({ isDFOLMode: true }),
  exitDFOLMode: () => set({ isDFOLMode: false, selectedItems: [] }),
  selectItem: (item, ops) => set((state) => {
    const existing = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === item.id);
    if (existing) existing.operations = ops;
    else state.selectedItems.push({ ...item, operations: ops });
  }),
  clearSelection: () => set({ selectedItems: [] }),
  setItemOperations: (id, ops) => set((state) => {
    const item = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === id);
    if (item) item.operations = ops;
  }),
  setActiveProfile: (id) => set({ activeProfile: id }),
  addCustomProfile: (profile) => set((state) => { state.customProfiles.push(profile); }),
  removeCustomProfile: (id) => set((state) => { state.customProfiles = state.customProfiles.filter(p => p.id !== id); }),
  openProfilePanel: () => set({ showProfilePanel: true }),
  closeProfilePanel: () => set({ showProfilePanel: false }),
  openExecutePanel: () => set({ showExecutePanel: true }),
  closeExecutePanel: () => set({ showExecutePanel: false }),
  executeOperations: async () => { console.log('Execute'); },
  updateOperationStatus: () => {},
  completeOperation: () => {},
  failOperation: () => {},
  addNotification: (notif) => set((state) => { state.notifications.push(notif); }),
  dismissNotification: (id) => set((state) => { state.notifications = state.notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id); }),
  clearNotifications: () => set({ notifications: [] }),
  getPendingOperations: () => [],
  getOperationStats: () => ({ total: 0, pending: 0, running: 0, completed: 0, failed: 0 }),
})));

export const useIsDFOLMode = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isDFOLMode);
export const useDFOLSelectedItems = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDFOLProfiles = () => useDFOLStore((s) => [...DEFAULT_PROFILES, ...s.customProfiles]);
export const useDFOLActiveProfile = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.activeProfile);
export const useDFOLOperations = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.operations);
export const useDFOLGlobalProgress = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.globalProgress);
export const useDFOLIsExecuting = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecuting);
export const useDFOLNotifications = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.notifications);
export const useDFOLIsProfilePanelOpen = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.showProfilePanel);
export const useDFOLIsExecutePanelOpen = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.showExecutePanel);

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/dfolStore.ts.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { DFOLState, DFOLItem, DFOLMode, DFOLProfile, DFOLOperation, DFOLNotification, DEFAULT_PROFILES } from '@/types/dfol';

interface DFOLStore extends DFOLState {
  // Actions
  enterDFOLMode: () => void;
  exitDFOLMode: () => void;
  toggleItemSelection: (item: DFOLItem) => void;
  selectItem: (item: DFOLItem, operations: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  deselectItem: (itemId: string) => void;
  clearSelection: () => void;
  setItemOperations: (itemId: string, operations: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  setItemProfile: (itemId: string, profileId: string) => void;
  setActiveProfile: (profileId: string) => void;
  addCustomProfile: (profile: DFOLProfile) => void;
  removeCustomProfile: (profileId: string) => void;
  openProfilePanel: () => void;
  closeProfilePanel: () => void;
  openExecutePanel: () => void;
  closeExecutePanel: () => void;
  executeOperations: () => Promise<void>;
  updateOperationStatus: (operationId: string, status: DFOLOperation['status'], progress?: number, message?: string) => void;
  completeOperation: (operationId: string, result: DFOLOperation['result']) => void;
  failOperation: (operationId: string, error: string) => void;
  addNotification: (notification: Omit<DFOLNotification, 'id' | 'timestamp'>) => void;
  dismissNotification: (id: string) => void;
  clearNotifications: () => void;

  // Getters
  getPendingOperations: () => DFOLOperation[];
  getOperationStats: () => { total: number; pending: number; running: number; completed: number; failed: number };
}

const generateTimestamp = () => {
  const now = new Date();
  return now.toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);
};

export const useDFOLStore = create<DFOLStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    isDFOLMode: false,
    selectedItems: [],
    operations: [],
    activeProfile: DEFAULT_PROFILES[0].id,
    customProfiles: [],
    outputDirectory: `/DFOL/${generateTimestamp()}`,
    isExecuting: false,
    isProfilePanelOpen: false,
    isExecutePanelOpen: false,
    globalProgress: 0,
    notifications: [],

    enterDFOLMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDFOLMode = true;
        state.selectedItems = [];
        state.operations = [];
        state.outputDirectory = `/DFOL/${generateTimestamp()}`;
      });
    },

    exitDFOLMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDFOLMode = false;
        state.selectedItems = [];
        state.isProfilePanelOpen = false;
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = false;
        if (!state.isExecuting) {
          state.operations = [];
        }
      });
    },

    toggleItemSelection: (item) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existingIndex = state.selectedItems.findIndex(i => i.id === item.id);
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          state.selectedItems.splice(existingIndex, 1);
        } else {
          state.selectedItems.push({ ...item, operations: ['folder'] });
        }
      });
    },

    selectItem: (item, operations) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existingIndex = state.selectedItems.findIndex(i => i.id === item.id);
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          state.selectedItems[existingIndex].operations = operations;
        } else {
          state.selectedItems.push({ ...item, operations });
        }
      });
    },

    deselectItem: (itemId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = state.selectedItems.filter(i => i.id !== itemId);
      });
    },

    clearSelection: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    setItemOperations: (itemId, operations) => {
      set((state) => {
        const item = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === itemId);
        if (item) {
          item.operations = operations;
        }
      });
    },

    setItemProfile: (itemId, profileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        const item = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === itemId);
        if (item) {
          item.selectedProfile = profileId;
        }
      });
    },

    setActiveProfile: (profileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.activeProfile = profileId;
      });
    },

    addCustomProfile: (profile) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.customProfiles.push(profile);
      });
    },

    removeCustomProfile: (profileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.customProfiles = state.customProfiles.filter(p => p.id !== profileId);
      });
    },

    openProfilePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isProfilePanelOpen = true;
      });
    },

    closeProfilePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isProfilePanelOpen = false;
      });
    },

    openExecutePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = true;
      });
    },

    closeExecutePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = false;
      });
    },

    executeOperations: async () => {
      const { selectedItems, outputDirectory, activeProfile } = get();

      // Generate operations
      const operations: DFOLOperation[] = [];
      selectedItems.forEach(item => {
        item.operations.forEach(mode => {
          operations.push({
            id: `${item.id}-${mode}-${Date.now()}`,
            itemId: item.id,
            mode,
            status: 'pending',
            progress: 0,
            message: 'Waiting...',
          });
        });
      });

      set((state) => {
        state.operations = operations;
        state.isExecuting = true;
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = true;
      });

      // Execute operations sequentially or in parallel
      for (const operation of operations) {
        const item = selectedItems.find(i => i.id === operation.itemId);
        if (!item) continue;

        set((state) => {
          const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operation.id);
          if (op) {
            op.status = 'running';
            op.message = 'Starting...';
          }
        });

        try {
          await executeSingleOperation(operation, item, outputDirectory, activeProfile);
        } catch (error) {
          get().failOperation(operation.id, (error as Error).message);
        }
      }

      set((state) => {
        state.isExecuting = false;
        state.globalProgress = 100;
      });

      get().addNotification({
        type: 'success',
        message: `DFOL operations completed. Output: ${outputDirectory}`,
        autoDismiss: true,
      });
    },

    updateOperationStatus: (operationId, status, progress, message) => {
      set((state) => {
        const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operationId);
        if (op) {
          op.status = status;
          if (progress !== undefined) op.progress = progress;
          if (message !== undefined) op.message = message;
        }

        // Update global progress
        const totalOps = state.operations.length;
        const completedOps = state.operations.filter(o => o.status === 'completed').length;
        const runningOps = state.operations.filter(o => o.status === 'running');
        const runningProgress = runningOps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.progress, 0) / (runningOps.length || 1);
        state.globalProgress = ((completedOps + runningProgress / 100) / totalOps) * 100;
      });
    },

    completeOperation: (operationId, result) => {
      set((state) => {
        const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operationId);
        if (op) {
          op.status = 'completed';
          op.progress = 100;
          op.message = 'Completed';
          op.result = result;
        }
      });
    },

    failOperation: (operationId, error) => {
      set((state) => {
        const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operationId);
        if (op) {
          op.status = 'failed';
          op.message = 'Failed';
          op.error = error;
        }
      });

      get().addNotification({
        type: 'error',
        message: `Operation failed: ${error}`,
        operationId,
      });
    },

    addNotification: (notification) => {
      const id = `notif-${Date.now()}`;
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications.push({
          ...notification,
          id,
          timestamp: Date.now(),
        });
      });

      // Auto dismiss after 5 seconds
      if (notification.autoDismiss) {
        setTimeout(() => {
          get().dismissNotification(id);
        }, 5000);
      }
    },

    dismissNotification: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications = state.notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id);
      });
    },

    clearNotifications: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications = [];
      });
    },

    getPendingOperations: () => {
      return get().operations.filter(o => o.status === 'pending' || o.status === 'running');
    },

    getOperationStats: () => {
      const ops = get().operations;
      return {
        total: ops.length,
        pending: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'pending').length,
        running: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'running').length,
        completed: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'completed').length,
        failed: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'failed').length,
      };
    },
  }))
);

// Execute single operation
async function executeSingleOperation(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDirectory: string,
  defaultProfile: string
): Promise<void> {
  const store = useDFOLStore.getState();

  switch (operation.mode) {
    case 'folder':
      await executeFolderDump(operation, item, outputDirectory, store);
      break;
    case 'txt':
      await executeTXTDump(operation, item, outputDirectory, store);
      break;
    case 'pdf':
      await executePDFDump(operation, item, outputDirectory, store);
      break;
    case 'compress':
      await executeCompress(operation, item, outputDirectory, item.selectedProfile || defaultProfile, store);
      break;
  }
}

async function executeFolderDump(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, 'Copying folder structure...');

  // Implementation depends on source type
  // For storage: use File System Access API
  // For Drive/GitHub: use respective APIs

  // Simulate progress
  for (let i = 0; i <= 100; i += 10) {
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100));
    store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', i, `Copying... ${i}%`);
  }

  store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
    outputPath: `${outputDir}/${item.name}_dump/`,
    size: item.size,
  });
}

async function executeTXTDump(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, 'Generating text dump...');

  // Traverse and generate text content
  let content = `DFOL TEXT DUMP\n==============\n\n`;
  content += `Source: ${item.name}\n`;
  content += `Type: ${item.type}\n`;
  content += `Date: ${new Date().toISOString()}\n\n`;

  // Add tree structure and file contents
  // ... traverse implementation ...

  content += `\n\nEND OF DUMP`;

  // Save to file
  const blob = new Blob([content], { type: 'text/plain' });
  const outputPath = `${outputDir}/${item.name}.txt`;

  // Save using appropriate API

  store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
    outputPath,
    size: blob.size,
  });
}

async function executePDFDump(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, 'Generating PDF dump...');

  const { jsPDF } = await import('jspdf');
  const doc = new jsPDF();

  // Add content to PDF
  doc.setFontSize(20);
  doc.text('DFOL PDF DUMP', 14, 20);

  doc.setFontSize(10);
  doc.text(`Source: ${item.name}`, 14, 30);
  doc.text(`Date: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 14, 36);

  // Add tree and content tables
  // ...

  const pdfBlob = doc.output('blob');
  const outputPath = `${outputDir}/${item.name}.pdf`;

  store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
    outputPath,
    size: pdfBlob.size,
  });
}

async function executeCompress(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  profileId: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  const profile = [...DEFAULT_PROFILES, ...useDFOLStore.getState().customProfiles]
    .find(p => p.id === profileId);

  if (!profile) throw new Error('Profile not found');

  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, `Compressing with ${profile.name}...`);

  // Use Web Worker for compression
  const worker = new Worker(new URL('../workers/compression.worker.ts', import.meta.url));

  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    worker.onmessage = (e) => {
      const { type, progress, result, error } = e.data;

      if (type === 'progress') {
        store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', progress, `Compressing... ${progress}%`);
      } else if (type === 'complete') {
        store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
          outputPath: `${outputDir}/${item.name}.${profile.format}`,
          size: result.size,
          checksum: result.checksum,
        });
        worker.terminate();
        resolve();
      } else if (type === 'error') {
        worker.terminate();
        reject(new Error(error));
      }
    };

    worker.postMessage({
      item,
      profile,
      outputDir,
    });
  });
}

// ==================== SELECTORS ====================

export const useIsDFOLMode = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.isDFOLMode);

export const useDFOLSelectedItems = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);

export const useDFOLOperations = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.operations);

export const useDFOLGlobalProgress = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.globalProgress);

export const useDFOLIsExecuting = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecuting);

export const useDFOLNotifications = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.notifications);

export const useDFOLCustomProfiles = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.customProfiles);

export const useDFOLActiveProfile = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.activeProfile);

export const useDFOLIsProfilePanelOpen = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.isProfilePanelOpen);

export const useDFOLIsExecutePanelOpen = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecutePanelOpen);

export const useDFOLOutputDirectory = () =>
  useDFOLStore((s) => s.outputDirectory);

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/authStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';
import { User, Session, ActionPassword, TokenExpiry } from '@/types/auth';
import { LogEntry } from '@/types/auth';
import { openDB } from 'idb';

const ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH = '5e884898da28047151d0e56f8dc6292773603d0d6aabbdd62a11ef721d1542d8'; // "password"

interface AuthState {
  currentUser: User | null;
  currentSession: Session | null;
  isAuthenticated: boolean;
  users: User[];
  actionPasswords: ActionPassword[];
  tokenExpiries: TokenExpiry[];
  isAdminRoute: boolean;
}

interface AuthActions {
  // Auth
  login: (username: string, password: string) => Promise<boolean>;
  logout: () => Promise<void>;
  adminLogin: (password: string) => boolean;
  adminLogout: () => void;
  
  // Users
  createUser: (username: string, password: string, role?: 'admin' | 'user') => Promise<void>;
  updateUser: (userId: string, updates: Partial<User>) => Promise<void>;
  deleteUser: (userId: string) => Promise<void>;
  getUsers: () => User[];
  
  // Action passwords
  setActionPassword: (action: string, password: string, required: boolean) => void;
  verifyActionPassword: (action: string, password: string) => boolean;
  
  // Token expiry
  addTokenExpiry: (expiry: TokenExpiry) => void;
  removeTokenExpiry: (accountId: string) => void;
  checkTokenExpiries: () => TokenExpiry[];
  
  // Session
  getSessionLogs: () => LogEntry[];
  exportSession: () => Promise<Blob>;
  
  // Admin check
  checkIsAdmin: () => boolean;
}

const hashPassword = (password: string): string => {
  return CryptoJS.SHA256(password).toString();
};

const DB_NAME = 'auth-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

export const useAuthStore = create<AuthState & AuthActions>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    currentUser: null,
    currentSession: null,
    isAuthenticated: false,
    users: [],
    actionPasswords: [],
    tokenExpiries: [],
    isAdminRoute: false,

    // Auth
    login: async (username, password) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const user = await db.get('users', username);
      
      if (!user || !user.isActive) return false;
      
      const passwordHash = hashPassword(password);
      if (user.passwordHash !== passwordHash) return false;
      
      // Create session
      const session: Session = {
        id: `session-${Date.now()}`,
        userId: user.id,
        username: user.username,
        startTime: new Date(),
        logs: [],
      };
      
      // Update last login
      user.lastLogin = new Date();
      await db.put('users', user);
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentUser = user;
        state.currentSession = session;
        state.isAuthenticated = true;
      });
      
      return true;
    },

    logout: async () => {
      const { currentSession, currentUser } = get();
      
      if (currentSession && currentUser) {
        // Save session logs
        const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
        currentSession.endTime = new Date();
        await db.add('sessions', currentSession);
      }
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentUser = null;
        state.currentSession = null;
        state.isAuthenticated = false;
      });
    },

    adminLogin: (password) => {
      const hash = hashPassword(password);
      if (hash === ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH) {
        set((state) => {
          state.isAdminRoute = true;
        });
        return true;
      }
      return false;
    },

    adminLogout: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isAdminRoute = false;
      });
    },

    // Users
    createUser: async (username, password, role = 'user') => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      
      const existing = await db.get('users', username);
      if (existing) throw new Error('Username already exists');
      
      const user: User = {
        id: `user-${Date.now()}`,
        username,
        passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
        role,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        isActive: true,
      };
      
      await db.put('users', user);
      
      set((state) => {
        state.users.push(user);
      });
    },

    updateUser: async (userId, updates) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('users', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('users');
      
      const users = await store.getAll();
      const user = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
      if (!user) throw new Error('User not found');
      
      Object.assign(user, updates);
      
      await store.put(user);
      await tx.done;
    },

    deleteUser: async (userId) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('users', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('users');
      
      const users = await store.getAll();
      const user = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
      if (user) {
        user.isActive = false;
        await store.put(user);
      }
      
      await tx.done;
    },

    getUsers: () => {
      return get().users;
    },

    // Action passwords
    setActionPassword: (action, password, required) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existing = state.actionPasswords.find(p => p.action === action);
        if (existing) {
          existing.passwordHash = hashPassword(password);
          existing.required = required;
        } else {
          state.actionPasswords.push({
            action: action as any,
            passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
            required,
          });
        }
      });
    },

    verifyActionPassword: (action, password) => {
      const { actionPasswords } = get();
      const config = actionPasswords.find(p => p.action === action);
      
      if (!config || !config.required) return true;
      
      return config.passwordHash === hashPassword(password);
    },

    // Token expiry
    addTokenExpiry: (expiry) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existing = state.tokenExpiries.find(e => e.accountId === expiry.accountId);
        if (existing) {
          Object.assign(existing, expiry);
        } else {
          state.tokenExpiries.push(expiry);
        }
      });
    },

    removeTokenExpiry: (accountId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.tokenExpiries = state.tokenExpiries.filter(e => e.accountId !== accountId);
      });
    },

    checkTokenExpiries: () => {
      const now = new Date();
      const tenDaysFromNow = new Date(now.getTime() + 10 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
      
      return get().tokenExpiries.filter(e => {
        return e.expiresAt <= tenDaysFromNow && !e.warned;
      });
    },

    // Session
    getSessionLogs: () => {
      return get().currentSession?.logs || [];
    },

    exportSession: async () => {
      const { currentSession, currentUser } = get();
      if (!currentSession || !currentUser) throw new Error('No active session');
      
      const exportData = {
        session: currentSession,
        user: {
          id: currentUser.id,
          username: currentUser.username,
          role: currentUser.role,
        },
        exportedAt: new Date(),
      };
      
      return new Blob([JSON.stringify(exportData, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    },

    checkIsAdmin: () => {
      const { currentUser, isAdminRoute } = get();
      return isAdminRoute || currentUser?.role === 'admin';
    },
  }))
);

// Initialize DB
const initAuthDB = async () => {
  const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
    upgrade(db) {
