      db.createObjectStore('users', { keyPath: 'username' });
      db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id' });
      db.createObjectStore('logs', { keyPath: 'id' });
    },
  });
  
  // Create default admin if none exists
  const users = await db.getAll('users');
  if (users.length === 0) {
    await db.put('users', {
      id: 'admin-1',
      username: 'admin',
      passwordHash: ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH,
      role: 'admin',
      createdAt: new Date(),
      isActive: true,
    });
  }
  
  return db;
};

initAuthDB();
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/dragDropStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { DragDropState, DragDropActions, SelectedItem } from '@/types/dragDrop';

interface DragDropStore extends DragDropState, DragDropActions {}

export const useDragDropStore = create<DragDropStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    isDragging: false,
    isDragMode: false,
    selectedItems: [],
    dragSourcePanel: null,
    dragImagePosition: null,
    pendingOperation: null,
    targetPanel: null,
    showConfirmDialog: false,

    // Actions
    enterDragMode: (panelId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragMode = true;
        state.dragSourcePanel = panelId;
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    exitDragMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragMode = false;
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.selectedItems = [];
        state.dragSourcePanel = null;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
        state.targetPanel = null;
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
      });
    },

    toggleSelection: (item) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existingIndex = state.selectedItems.findIndex(
          (i) => i.id === item.id && i.panelId === item.panelId
        );
        
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          state.selectedItems.splice(existingIndex, 1);
        } else {
          state.selectedItems.push(item);
        }
      });
    },

    clearSelection: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    selectAll: (items) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = items;
      });
    },

    startDrag: (panelId, position) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = true;
        state.dragSourcePanel = panelId;
        state.dragImagePosition = position;
      });
    },

    endDrag: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
      });
    },

    setDragImagePosition: (position) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.dragImagePosition = position;
      });
    },

    setTargetPanel: (panelId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.targetPanel = panelId;
      });
    },

    showConfirm: (operation) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.pendingOperation = operation;
        state.showConfirmDialog = true;
      });
    },

    hideConfirm: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
      });
    },

    confirmOperation: () => {
      // This will be handled by the panel that receives the drop
      set((state) => {
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
      });
    },

    cancelOperation: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
        state.targetPanel = null;
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
      });
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useIsDragMode = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.isDragMode);
export const useIsDragging = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.isDragging);
export const useSelectedItems = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDragSourcePanel = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.dragSourcePanel);
export const useDragImagePosition = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.dragImagePosition);
export const usePendingOperation = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.pendingOperation);
export const useTargetPanel = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.targetPanel);
export const useShowConfirmDialog = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.showConfirmDialog);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/fileSystemStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { 
  FileSystemEntry, 
  FileSystemDirectoryEntry,
  ViewMode, 
  SortBy,
  MountPoint 
} from '@/types/filesystem';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface NavigationHistory {
  handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
  name: string;
}

interface FileSystemState {
  // Current state
  currentPath: string;
  currentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null;
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  viewMode: ViewMode;
  sortBy: SortBy;
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: string | null;
  
  // History for back navigation
  history: NavigationHistory[];
  
  // Mount points (fake root)
  mountPoints: MountPoint[];
  
  // Actions
  setViewMode: (mode: ViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: SortBy) => void;
  pickDirectory: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateTo: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  createFolder: (name: string) => Promise<void>;
  initMountPoints: () => void;
  selectMountPoint: (mountId: string) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Computed
  getSortedEntries: () => FileSystemEntry[];
}

const createFakeMountPoints = (): MountPoint[] => [
  {
    id: 'internal',
    name: 'Internal Storage',
    icon: 'hard-drive',
    handle: null,
    isFake: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'sd-card',
    name: 'SD Card',
    icon: 'sd-card',
    handle: null,
    isFake: true,
  },
];

export const useFileSystemStore = create<FileSystemState>((set, get) => ({
  currentPath: '/',
  currentHandle: null,
  entries: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'name-asc',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  history: [],
  mountPoints: createFakeMountPoints(),

  setViewMode: (mode) => set({ viewMode: mode }),
  
  setSortBy: (sort) => set({ sortBy: sort }),

  pickDirectory: async () => {
    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(handle);
        set({ 
          currentHandle: handle,
          currentPath: `/${handle.name}`,
          entries,
          history: [],
          isLoading: false 
        });
      } else {
        set({ isLoading: false });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateTo: async (entry) => {
    const { currentHandle, history, currentPath } = get();
    if (!currentHandle || entry.kind !== 'directory') return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const newEntries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(entry.handle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle);
      set({
        currentHandle: entry.handle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
        currentPath: `${currentPath}/${entry.name}`,
        entries: newEntries,
        history: [...history, { handle: currentHandle, name: currentPath.split('/').pop() || 'root' }],
        isLoading: false,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateBack: async () => {
    const { history } = get();
    if (history.length === 0) {
      get().navigateToRoot();
      return;
    }

    const previous = history[history.length - 1];
    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    
    try {
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(previous.handle);
      set({
        currentHandle: previous.handle,
        currentPath: history.length === 1 ? '/' : `/${previous.name}`,
        entries,
        history: history.slice(0, -1),
        isLoading: false,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateToRoot: () => {
    set({
      currentPath: '/',
      currentHandle: null,
      entries: [],
      history: [],
    });
  },

  refreshCurrent: async () => {
    const { currentHandle } = get();
    if (!currentHandle) return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(currentHandle);
      set({ entries, isLoading: false });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  createFolder: async (name) => {
    const { currentHandle } = get();
    if (!currentHandle) return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(currentHandle, name);
      await get().refreshCurrent();
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  initMountPoints: () => {
    set({ mountPoints: createFakeMountPoints() });
  },

  selectMountPoint: async (mountId) => {
    const { mountPoints } = get();
    const mount = mountPoints.find(m => m.id === mountId);
    
    if (!mount) return;
    
    // If mount has no handle yet, open picker
    if (!mount.handle) {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        // Update mount point with handle
        const updatedMounts = mountPoints.map(m => 
          m.id === mountId ? { ...m, handle, isFake: false } : m
        );
        const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(handle);
        set({
          mountPoints: updatedMounts,
          currentHandle: handle,
          currentPath: `/${mount.name}`,
          entries,
          history: [],
        });
      }
    } else {
      // Use existing handle
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(mount.handle);
      set({
        currentHandle: mount.handle,
        currentPath: `/${mount.name}`,
        entries,
        history: [],
      });
    }
  },

  getSortedEntries: () => {
    const { entries, sortBy } = get();
    const sorted = [...entries];
    
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      case 'date':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.lastModified.getTime() - a.lastModified.getTime());
      case 'size':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.size - a.size);
      default:
        return sorted;
    }
  },
}));

// Selectors
export const useCurrentPath = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.currentPath);
export const useCurrentHandle = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.currentHandle);
export const useEntries = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.getSortedEntries());
export const useViewMode = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useSortBy = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useIsLoading = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.isLoading);
export const useHistory = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.history);
export const useMountPoints = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.mountPoints);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/index.ts.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// DFOL Selectors
export const useIsDFOLMode = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isDFOLMode);
export const useDFOLSelectedItems = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDFOLProfiles = () => useDFOLStore((s) => [...DEFAULT_PROFILES, ...s.customProfiles]);
export const useDFOLActiveProfile = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.activeProfile);
export const useDFOLOperations = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.operations);
export const useDFOLGlobalProgress = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.globalProgress);
export const useDFOLIsExecuting = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecuting);
export const useDFOLNotifications = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.notifications);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/githubStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { 
  GitHubAccount, 
  GitHubRepository, 
  GitHubContent,
  GitHubViewMode,
  GitHubSortBy,
  GitHubPanelState,
  GitHubPermission 
} from '@/types/github';
import { githubApi } from '@/lib/githubApi';
import { githubStorage } from '@/lib/githubStorage';

interface GitHubStore extends GitHubPanelState {
  loadAccounts: () => Promise<void>;
  addAccount: (username: string, token: string) => Promise<void>;
  removeAccount: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  setActiveAccount: (id: string | null) => void;
  loadRepositories: () => Promise<void>;
  selectRepository: (repo: GitHubRepository) => Promise<void>;
  navigateToPath: (path: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  openFile: (file: GitHubContent) => Promise<void>;
  closeFile: () => void;
  setViewMode: (mode: GitHubViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: GitHubSortBy) => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  logout: () => void;
  getActiveAccount: () => GitHubAccount | undefined;
  getSortedRepositories: () => GitHubRepository[];
  getSortedContents: () => GitHubContent[];
  getCurrentBreadcrumb: () => string[];
  canGoBack: () => boolean;
}

const createInitialState = (): GitHubPanelState => ({
  accounts: [],
  activeAccountId: null,
  currentRepository: null,
  currentPath: '',
  pathHistory: [],
  repositories: [],
  contents: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'updated',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  fileContent: null,
  fileName: null,
});

export const useGitHubStore = create<GitHubStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    ...createInitialState(),

    loadAccounts: async () => {
      const accounts = await githubStorage.getAllAccounts();
      set((state) => {
        state.accounts = accounts;
      });
    },

    addAccount: async (username, token) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });
      try {
        const userInfo = await githubApi.authenticate(token);
        const existing = get().accounts.find(a => a.id === userInfo.username);
        if (existing) throw new Error('Account already exists');
        const account: GitHubAccount = {
          id: userInfo.username,
          token,
          avatarUrl: userInfo.avatarUrl,
          permissions: 'read',
          addedAt: Date.now(),
        };
        await githubStorage.saveAccount(account);
        set((state) => {
          state.accounts.push(account);
          state.activeAccountId = account.id;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
        await get().loadRepositories();
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
        throw err;
      }
    },

    removeAccount: async (id) => {
      await githubStorage.deleteAccount(id);
      set((state) => {
        state.accounts = state.accounts.filter(a => a.id !== id);
        if (state.activeAccountId === id) {
          state.activeAccountId = null;
          state.currentRepository = null;
          state.currentPath = '';
          state.pathHistory = [];
          state.repositories = [];
          state.contents = [];
        }
      });
    },

    setActiveAccount: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.activeAccountId = id;
        state.currentRepository = null;
        state.currentPath = '';
        state.pathHistory = [];
        state.contents = [];
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
      if (id) get().loadRepositories();
    },

    loadRepositories: async () => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId) return;
      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });
      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const repos = await githubApi.listRepositories(account.id);
        set((state) => {
          state.repositories = repos;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    selectRepository: async (repo) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId) return;
      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.currentRepository = repo.name;
        state.currentPath = '';
        state.pathHistory = [];
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, repo.name, '');
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateToPath: async (path) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts, currentRepository, currentPath } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId || !currentRepository) return;
      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.pathHistory.push(currentPath);
        state.currentPath = path;
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, currentRepository, path);
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateBack: async () => {
      const { pathHistory, activeAccountId, accounts, currentRepository } = get();
      if (pathHistory.length === 0 || !activeAccountId || !currentRepository) {
        set((state) => {
          state.currentPath = '';
          state.pathHistory = [];
          state.fileContent = null;
          state.fileName = null;
        });
        await get().refreshCurrent();
        return;
      }
      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;
      const previousPath = pathHistory[pathHistory.length - 1];
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.pathHistory.pop();
        state.currentPath = previousPath;
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, currentRepository, previousPath);
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateToRoot: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.currentRepository = null;
        state.currentPath = '';
        state.pathHistory = [];
        state.contents = [];
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
    },

    openFile: async (file) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts, currentRepository } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId || !currentRepository || file.type !== 'file') return;
      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });
      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const fileData = await githubApi.getFileContent(account.id, currentRepository, file.path);
        set((state) => {
          state.fileContent = fileData.content;
          state.fileName = fileData.name;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    closeFile: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
    },

    setViewMode: (mode) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.viewMode = mode;
      });
    },

    setSortBy: (sort) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.sortBy = sort;
      });
    },

    refreshCurrent: async () => {
      const { currentRepository, currentPath, activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId || !currentRepository) {
        await get().loadRepositories();
        return;
      }
      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });
      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, currentRepository, currentPath);
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    logout: () => {
      set(createInitialState());
    },

    getActiveAccount: () => {
      const { accounts, activeAccountId } = get();
      return accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
    },

    getSortedRepositories: () => {
      const { repositories, sortBy } = get();
      const sorted = [...repositories];
      switch (sortBy) {
        case 'name-asc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        case 'name-desc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
        case 'updated':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.pushed_at).getTime() - new Date(a.pushed_at).getTime());
        case 'stars':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.stargazers_count - a.stargazers_count);
        default:
          return sorted;
      }
    },

    getSortedContents: () => {
      const { contents, sortBy } = get();
      const sorted = [...contents];
      const folders = sorted.filter(c => c.type === 'dir');
      const files = sorted.filter(c => c.type === 'file');
      const sortFn = (a: GitHubContent, b: GitHubContent) => {
        switch (sortBy) {
          case 'name-asc':
            return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
          case 'name-desc':
            return b.name.localeCompare(a.name);
          default:
            return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
        }
      };
      return [...folders.sort(sortFn), ...files.sort(sortFn)];
    },

    getCurrentBreadcrumb: () => {
      const { currentPath } = get();
      if (!currentPath) return [];
      return currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    },

    canGoBack: () => {
      const { currentRepository, currentPath } = get();
      return !!currentRepository && (currentPath !== '' || true);
    },
  }))
);

// ========== SELECTORS ==========
export const useGitHubAccounts = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
export const useGitHubActiveAccount = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getActiveAccount());
export const useGitHubRepositories = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getSortedRepositories());
export const useGitHubContents = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getSortedContents());
export const useGitHubViewMode = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useGitHubSortBy = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useGitHubCurrentRepo = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.currentRepository);
export const useGitHubFileContent = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.fileContent);
export const useGitHubFileName = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.fileName);
export const useGitHubError = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.error);

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/panelStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { 
  PanelState, 
  PanelLayout, 
  createDefaultPanel,
  MIN_PANEL_WIDTH,
  MAX_PANELS 
} from '@/types/panel';
import { SourceType } from './appStore';
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface PanelStore extends PanelLayout {
  // Actions
  addPanel: () => void;
  removePanel: (id: string) => void;
  setActivePanel: (id: string) => void;
  
  // Panel-specific actions
  setPanelSource: (id: string, source: SourceType) => void;
  setPanelPath: (id: string, path: string) => void;
  setPanelHandle: (id: string, handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null) => void;
  navigatePanelForward: (id: string, handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => void;
  navigatePanelBack: (id: string) => void;
  setPanelViewMode: (id: string, mode: ViewMode) => void;
  setPanelSortBy: (id: string, sort: SortBy) => void;
  setPanelWidth: (id: string, width: number) => void;
  togglePanelMinimize: (id: string) => void;
  
  // Storage operations
  pickDirectoryForPanel: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  refreshPanelDirectory: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Getters
  getPanel: (id: string) => PanelState | undefined;
  getPanelEntries: (id: string) => Promise<FileSystemEntry[]>;
}

import { FileSystemEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';

export const usePanelStore = create<PanelStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    panels: [
      createDefaultPanel('panel-1', 0),
      createDefaultPanel('panel-2', 1),
    ],
    activePanelId: 'panel-1',

    addPanel: () => {
      const { panels } = get();
      if (panels.length >= MAX_PANELS) return;
      
      const newId = `panel-${panels.length + 1}`;
      set((state) => {
        state.panels.push(createDefaultPanel(newId, panels.length));
        state.activePanelId = newId;
      });
    },

    removePanel: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.panels = state.panels.filter((p) => p.id !== id);
        if (state.activePanelId === id) {
          state.activePanelId = state.panels[0]?.id || null;
        }
      });
    },

    setActivePanel: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.activePanelId = id;
      });
    },

    setPanelSource: (id, source) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel) {
          panel.source = source;
          // Reset path-specific state when source changes
          panel.path = '/';
          panel.handle = null;
          panel.history = [];
        }
      });
    },

    setPanelPath: (id, path) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel) panel.path = path;
      });
    },

    setPanelHandle: (id, handle) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel) panel.handle = handle;
      });
    },

    navigatePanelForward: (id, handle, name) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel && panel.handle) {
          panel.history.push({ handle: panel.handle, name: panel.path.split('/').pop() || 'root' });
          panel.handle = handle;
          panel.path = `${panel.path}/${name}`.replace('//', '/');
        }
      });
    },

    navigatePanelBack: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel && panel.history.length > 0) {
          const previous = panel.history.pop()!;
          panel.handle = previous.handle;
          panel.path = panel.history.length === 0 ? '/' : `/${previous.name}`;
        }
      });
    },

    setPanelViewMode: (id, mode) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel) panel.viewMode = mode;
      });
    },

    setPanelSortBy: (id, sort) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel) panel.sortBy = sort;
      });
    },

    setPanelWidth: (id, width) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel) {
          panel.width = Math.max(MIN_PANEL_WIDTH, width);
        }
      });
    },

    togglePanelMinimize: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
        if (panel) panel.isMinimized = !panel.isMinimized;
      });
    },

    pickDirectoryForPanel: async (id) => {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (panel) {
            panel.handle = handle;
            panel.path = `/${handle.name}`;
            panel.history = [];
          }
        });
      }
    },

    refreshPanelDirectory: async (id) => {
      // Trigger re-render by updating a timestamp or similar
      // Actual refresh happens in component via useEffect
    },

    getPanel: (id) => {
      return get().panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
    },

    getPanelEntries: async (id) => {
      const panel = get().getPanel(id);
      if (!panel?.handle) return [];
      return fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(panel.handle);
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const usePanels = () => usePanelStore((s) => s.panels);
export const useActivePanelId = () => usePanelStore((s) => s.activePanelId);
export const usePanel = (id: string) => usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(id));
export const usePanelCount = () => usePanelStore((s) => s.panels.length);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/logStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';

interface LogEntry {
  id: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  level: 'info' | 'warn' | 'error';
  action: string;
  details: any;
  category: string;
}

interface LogStore {
  logs: LogEntry[];
  isLiveLogOpen: boolean;
  logLevel: string;
  logCategories: string[];
  toggleLiveLog: () => void;
  setLogLevel: (level: string) => void;
  toggleCategory: (cat: string) => void;
  clearLogs: () => void;
  exportLogs: () => Promise<Blob>;
  logAction: (action: string, details: any, category: string) => void;
}

export const useLogStore = create<LogStore>((set, get) => ({
  logs: [],
  isLiveLogOpen: false,
  logLevel: 'debug',
  logCategories: ['auth', 'file', 'system', 'network', 'ui'],
  toggleLiveLog: () => set((state) => ({ isLiveLogOpen: !state.isLiveLogOpen })),
  setLogLevel: (level) => set({ logLevel: level }),
  toggleCategory: (cat) => set((state) => ({
    logCategories: state.logCategories.includes(cat)
      ? state.logCategories.filter(c => c !== cat)
      : [...state.logCategories, cat]
  })),
  clearLogs: () => set({ logs: [] }),
  exportLogs: async () => {
    const { logs } = get();
    return new Blob([JSON.stringify(logs, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
  },
  logAction: (action, details, category) => {
    const log: LogEntry = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      timestamp: new Date(),
      level: 'info',
      action,
      details,
      category,
    };
    set((state) => ({ logs: [...state.logs, log] }));
  },
}));

export const useLogFilteredLogs = () => useLogStore((s) => s.logs);
export const useLogIsLiveLogOpen = () => useLogStore((s) => s.isLiveLogOpen);
export const useLogNotifications = () => useLogStore((s) => []);
export const useLogUnreadCount = () => useLogStore((s) => 0);

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/driveStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { 
  GoogleAccount, 
  DriveFile, 
  DriveFolder,
  DriveViewMode,
  DriveSortBy,
  DrivePanelState 
} from '@/types/drive';
import { driveApi } from '@/lib/googleDriveApi';

interface DriveStore extends DrivePanelState {
  // Actions
  addAccount: (account: GoogleAccount) => void;
  removeAccount: (id: string) => void;
  setActiveAccount: (id: string | null) => void;
  setCurrentFolder: (folderId: string, folderName?: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateToFolder: (file: DriveFile) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  setViewMode: (mode: DriveViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: DriveSortBy) => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  logout: () => void;
  
  // Getters
  getActiveAccount: () => GoogleAccount | undefined;
  getSortedFiles: () => DriveFile[];
  getCurrentFolderName: () => string;
}

const createInitialState = (): DrivePanelState => ({
  accounts: [],
  activeAccountId: null,
  currentFolderId: 'root',
  currentPath: [],
  files: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'name-asc',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
});

export const useDriveStore = create<DriveStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    ...createInitialState(),

    addAccount: (account) => {
      set((state) => {
        // Check if account already exists
        const existingIndex = state.accounts.findIndex(a => a.id === account.id);
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          // Update existing account with new token
          state.accounts[existingIndex] = account;
        } else {
          state.accounts.push(account);
        }
        // Set as active if no active account
        if (!state.activeAccountId) {
          state.activeAccountId = account.id;
        }
      });
      // Load root files for new account
      get().setCurrentFolder('root', 'My Drive');
    },

    removeAccount: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.accounts = state.accounts.filter(a => a.id !== id);
        if (state.activeAccountId === id) {
          state.activeAccountId = state.accounts[0]?.id || null;
        }
      });
    },

    setActiveAccount: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.activeAccountId = id;
        state.currentFolderId = 'root';
        state.currentPath = [];
        state.files = [];
      });
      if (id) {
        get().setCurrentFolder('root', 'My Drive');
      }
    },

    setCurrentFolder: async (folderId, folderName) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId) return;

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });

      try {
        const files = await driveApi.listFiles(account, folderId);
        set((state) => {
          state.currentFolderId = folderId;
          state.files = files;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateToFolder: async (file) => {
      if (!driveApi.isFolder(file)) return;
      
      const { currentPath } = get();
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentPath.push({ id: state.currentFolderId, name: state.currentPath.length === 0 ? 'My Drive' : file.name });
      });
      
      await get().setCurrentFolder(file.id, file.name);
    },

    navigateBack: async () => {
      const { currentPath } = get();
      if (currentPath.length === 0) return;

      const parent = currentPath[currentPath.length - 1];
      set((state) => {
        state.currentPath.pop();
      });
      
      await get().setCurrentFolder(parent.id, parent.name);
    },

    navigateToRoot: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.currentFolderId = 'root';
        state.currentPath = [];
      });
      get().setCurrentFolder('root', 'My Drive');
    },

    setViewMode: (mode) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.viewMode = mode;
      });
    },

    setSortBy: (sort) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.sortBy = sort;
      });
    },

    refreshCurrent: async () => {
      const { currentFolderId } = get();
      await get().setCurrentFolder(currentFolderId);
    },

    logout: () => {
      set(createInitialState());
    },

    getActiveAccount: () => {
      const { accounts, activeAccountId } = get();
      return accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
    },

    getSortedFiles: () => {
      const { files, sortBy } = get();
      const sorted = [...files];
      
      switch (sortBy) {
        case 'name-asc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        case 'name-desc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
        case 'modifiedTime':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.modifiedTime).getTime() - new Date(a.modifiedTime).getTime());
        case 'size':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => {
            const sizeA = parseInt(a.size || '0', 10);
            const sizeB = parseInt(b.size || '0', 10);
            return sizeB - sizeA;
          });
        default:
          return sorted;
      }
    },

    getCurrentFolderName: () => {
      const { currentPath, currentFolderId } = get();
      if (currentFolderId === 'root') return 'My Drive';
      const current = currentPath[currentPath.length - 1];
      return current?.name || 'My Drive';
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useDriveAccounts = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
export const useDriveActiveAccount = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.getActiveAccount());
export const useDriveFiles = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.getSortedFiles());
export const useDriveViewMode = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useDriveSortBy = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useDriveCurrentPath = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.currentPath);
export const useDriveIsLoading = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.isLoading);
export const useDriveError = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.error);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/promptStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import { openDB } from 'idb';
import { uploadToDrive, uploadToGitHub } from '@/lib/promptUploadEngine';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';

export interface PromptNote {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  createdAt: Date;
  attachedToLink?: boolean;
}

export interface PromptFile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  size: number;
  type: string;
  source: 'upload' | 'drag-drop' | 'reference';
  sourcePath?: string;
  sourcePanelId?: string;
  content?: Blob;
  folderPath: string;
  isCompressed: boolean;
  compressionProfile?: any;
}

export interface PromptFolder {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  path: string;
  children: (PromptFolder | PromptFile)[];
  parent?: PromptFolder;
}

export interface PromptSession {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
  promptText: string;
  notes: PromptNote[];
  files: PromptFile[];
  folderStructure: PromptFolder;
  isCompleted: boolean;
  uploadResult?: {
    provider: 'drive' | 'github';
    folderPath: string;
    shareLink: string;
    rawLink?: string;
    uploadedAt: Date;
  };
}

interface PromptStore {
  sessions: PromptSession[];
  currentSession: PromptSession | null;
  isPromptManagerOpen: boolean;
  selectedUploadProvider: 'drive' | 'github';
  isUploading: boolean;
  uploadProgress: number;
  
  createSession: (name: string) => PromptSession;
  loadSession: (id: string) => void;
  saveSession: () => Promise<void>;
  deleteSession: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  duplicateSession: (id: string) => PromptSession;
  renameSession: (id: string, newName: string) => void;
  updatePromptText: (text: string) => void;
  addNote: (title: string, content: string) => void;
  updateNote: (id: string, updates: Partial<PromptNote>) => void;
  deleteNote: (id: string) => void;
  toggleNoteAttachment: (id: string) => void;
  addFile: (file: Omit<PromptFile, 'id'>, folderPath?: string) => void;
  renameFile: (fileId: string, newName: string) => void;
  deleteFile: (fileId: string) => void;
  createFolder: (name: string, parentPath: string) => void;
  renameFolder: (folderId: string, newName: string) => void;
  deleteFolder: (folderId: string) => void;
  compressFile: (fileId: string, profiles: any[]) => void;
  completeAndUpload: () => Promise<{ shareLink: string }>;
  setUploadProvider: (provider: 'drive' | 'github') => void;
  openPromptManager: () => void;
  closePromptManager: () => void;
}

const DB_NAME = 'prompt-manager-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

const createDefaultFolder = (): PromptFolder => ({
  id: 'root',
  name: 'root',
  path: '/',
  children: [],
});

const createEmptySession = (name: string): PromptSession => ({
  id: `session-${uuidv4()}`,
  name,
  createdAt: new Date(),
  updatedAt: new Date(),
  promptText: '',
  notes: [],
  files: [],
  folderStructure: createDefaultFolder(),
  isCompleted: false,
});

export const usePromptStore = create<PromptStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    sessions: [],
    currentSession: null,
    isPromptManagerOpen: false,
    selectedUploadProvider: 'drive',
    isUploading: false,
    uploadProgress: 0,

    createSession: (name) => {
      const session = createEmptySession(name);
      set((state) => {
        state.sessions.push(session);
        state.currentSession = session;
      });
      return session;
    },

    loadSession: (id) => {
      const session = get().sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
      if (session) set({ currentSession: session });
    },

    saveSession: async () => {
      const { currentSession } = get();
      if (!currentSession) return;
      currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
        upgrade(db) {
          if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('sessions')) {
            db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id' });
          }
        },
      });
      await db.put('sessions', currentSession);
      set((state) => {
        const idx = state.sessions.findIndex(s => s.id === currentSession.id);
        if (idx >= 0) state.sessions[idx] = currentSession;
      });
    },

    deleteSession: async (id) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      await db.delete('sessions', id);
      set((state) => {
        state.sessions = state.sessions.filter(s => s.id !== id);
        if (state.currentSession?.id === id) state.currentSession = null;
      });
    },

    duplicateSession: (id) => {
      const original = get().sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
      if (!original) throw new Error('Session not found');
      const copy: PromptSession = {
        ...original,
        id: `session-${uuidv4()}`,
        name: `${original.name} (Copy)`,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        updatedAt: new Date(),
        isCompleted: false,
        uploadResult: undefined,
      };
      set((state) => { state.sessions.push(copy); });
      return copy;
    },

    renameSession: (id, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        const session = state.sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
        if (session) session.name = newName;
        if (state.currentSession?.id === id) state.currentSession.name = newName;
      });
    },

    updatePromptText: (text) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.promptText = text;
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    addNote: (title, content) => {
      const note: PromptNote = {
        id: `note-${uuidv4()}`,
        title,
        content,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        attachedToLink: false,
      };
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.notes.push(note);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    updateNote: (id, updates) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const note = state.currentSession.notes.find(n => n.id === id);
          if (note) Object.assign(note, updates);
        }
      });
    },

    deleteNote: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.notes = state.currentSession.notes.filter(n => n.id !== id);
        }
      });
    },

    toggleNoteAttachment: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const note = state.currentSession.notes.find(n => n.id === id);
          if (note) note.attachedToLink = !note.attachedToLink;
        }
      });
    },

    addFile: (fileData, folderPath = '/') => {
      const file: PromptFile = {
        id: `file-${uuidv4()}`,
        ...fileData,
        folderPath,
      };
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        state.currentSession.files.push(file);
        const addToFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          if (folder.path === folderPath) {
            folder.children.push(file);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && addToFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          addToFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
        state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
      });
    },

    renameFile: (fileId, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const file = state.currentSession.files.find(f => f.id === fileId);
        if (file) file.name = newName;
        const updateInFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if (!('children' in child) && child.id === fileId) {
              child.name = newName;
              return true;
            }
            if ('children' in child && updateInFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          updateInFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    deleteFile: (fileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        state.currentSession.files = state.currentSession.files.filter(f => f.id !== fileId);
        const removeFromFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          const idx = folder.children.findIndex(c => !('children' in c) && c.id === fileId);
          if (idx >= 0) {
            folder.children.splice(idx, 1);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && removeFromFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          removeFromFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    createFolder: (name, parentPath) => {
      const folder: PromptFolder = {
        id: `folder-${uuidv4()}`,
        name,
        path: parentPath === '/' ? `/${name}` : `${parentPath}/${name}`,
        children: [],
      };
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const addToParent = (current: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          if (current.path === parentPath) {
            current.children.push(folder);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of current.children) {
            if ('children' in child && addToParent(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          addToParent(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    renameFolder: (folderId, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const renameInFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          if (folder.id === folderId) {
            folder.name = newName;
            folder.path = folder.path.split('/').slice(0, -1).concat(newName).join('/');
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && renameInFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          renameInFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    deleteFolder: (folderId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const removeFromParent = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          const idx = folder.children.findIndex(c => 'children' in c && c.id === folderId);
          if (idx >= 0) {
            folder.children.splice(idx, 1);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && removeFromParent(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          removeFromParent(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
        // Find folder path to remove its files
        let folderPath: string | null = null;
        const findPath = (f: PromptFolder): void => {
          if (f.id === folderId) folderPath = f.path;
          else f.children.forEach(c => { if ('children' in c) findPath(c); });
        };
        findPath(state.currentSession!.folderStructure);
        if (folderPath) {
          state.currentSession.files = state.currentSession.files.filter(
            f => !f.folderPath.startsWith(folderPath!)
          );
        }
      });
    },

    compressFile: (fileId, profiles) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const file = state.currentSession.files.find(f => f.id === fileId);
          if (file) {
            file.isCompressed = true;
            file.compressionProfile = profiles;
          }
        }
      });
    },

    completeAndUpload: async () => {
      const { currentSession, selectedUploadProvider } = get();
      if (!currentSession) throw new Error('No active session');
      set({ isUploading: true, uploadProgress: 0 });
      try {
        const promptBlob = new Blob([currentSession.promptText], { type: 'text/plain' });
        const linksContent = currentSession.notes
          .filter(n => n.attachedToLink)
          .map(n => `${n.title}\n${n.content}`)
          .join('\n---\n');
        const linksBlob = new Blob([linksContent], { type: 'text/plain' });
        const files = currentSession.files.map(f => ({
          name: f.name,
          content: f.content || new Blob([`Reference: ${f.sourcePath || f.name}`], { type: 'text/plain' }),
        }));
        let result;
        if (selectedUploadProvider === 'drive') {
          const activeAccount = useDriveStore.getState().getActiveAccount();
          if (!activeAccount) throw new Error('No Drive account selected');
          result = await uploadToDrive(
            currentSession.name, promptBlob, linksBlob, files, activeAccount.id,
            (p) => set({ uploadProgress: p })
          );
        } else {
          const activeAccount = useGitHubStore.getState().getActiveAccount();
          if (!activeAccount) throw new Error('No GitHub account selected');
          result = await uploadToGitHub(
            currentSession.name, promptBlob, linksBlob, files, activeAccount.id, activeAccount.token,
            (p) => set({ uploadProgress: p })
          );
        }
        set((state) => {
          if (state.currentSession) {
            state.currentSession.isCompleted = true;
            state.currentSession.uploadResult = {
              provider: selectedUploadProvider,
              folderPath: result.folderPath,
              shareLink: result.shareLink,
              rawLink: result.rawLink,
              uploadedAt: new Date(),
            };
          }
          state.isUploading = false;
        });
        return { shareLink: result.shareLink };
      } catch (error) {
        set({ isUploading: false });
        throw error;
      }
    },

    setUploadProvider: (provider) => set({ selectedUploadProvider: provider }),
    openPromptManager: () => set({ isPromptManagerOpen: true }),
    closePromptManager: () => set({ isPromptManagerOpen: false }),
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const usePromptSessions = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.sessions);
export const usePromptCurrentSession = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.currentSession);
export const usePromptIsOpen = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.isPromptManagerOpen);
export const usePromptUploadProgress = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.uploadProgress);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/promptStore.ts.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import { PromptSession, PromptNote, PromptFile, PromptFolder, PromptManagerState } from '@/types/prompt';
import { openDB } from 'idb';

interface PromptStore extends PromptManagerState {
  // Session management
  createSession: (name: string) => PromptSession;
  loadSession: (id: string) => void;
  saveSession: () => Promise<void>;
  deleteSession: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  duplicateSession: (id: string) => PromptSession;
  renameSession: (id: string, newName: string) => void;
  
  // Prompt operations
  updatePromptText: (text: string) => void;
  
  // Note operations
  addNote: (title: string, content: string) => void;
  updateNote: (id: string, updates: Partial<PromptNote>) => void;
  deleteNote: (id: string) => void;
  toggleNoteAttachment: (id: string) => void;
  
  // File operations
  addFile: (file: Omit<PromptFile, 'id'>, folderPath?: string) => void;
  moveFile: (fileId: string, newFolderPath: string) => void;
  renameFile: (fileId: string, newName: string) => void;
  deleteFile: (fileId: string) => void;
  createFolder: (name: string, parentPath: string) => void;
  renameFolder: (folderId: string, newName: string) => void;
  deleteFolder: (folderId: string) => void;
  compressFile: (fileId: string, profileId: string) => void;
  
  // Drag-drop from main app
  addDragDropFile: (fileData: any, sourcePanelId: string) => void;
  
  // Upload
  completeAndUpload: () => Promise<{ shareLink: string }>;
  setUploadProvider: (provider: 'drive' | 'github') => void;
  
  // UI
  openPromptManager: () => void;
  closePromptManager: () => void;
  togglePromptManager: () => void;
  
  // Getters
  getSessionFiles: () => PromptFile[];
  getFolderStructure: () => PromptFolder;
  getTotalSize: () => number;
  getAttachedNotes: () => PromptNote[];
}

const DB_NAME = 'prompt-manager-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

const createDefaultFolder = (): PromptFolder => ({
  id: 'root',
  name: 'root',
  path: '/',
  children: [],
});

const createEmptySession = (name: string): PromptSession => ({
  id: `session-${uuidv4()}`,
  name,
  createdAt: new Date(),
  updatedAt: new Date(),
  promptText: '',
  notes: [],
  files: [],
  folderStructure: createDefaultFolder(),
  isCompleted: false,
});

export const usePromptStore = create<PromptStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    sessions: [],
    currentSession: null,
    isPromptManagerOpen: false,
    selectedUploadProvider: 'drive',
    isUploading: false,
    uploadProgress: 0,

    // Session management
    createSession: (name) => {
      const session = createEmptySession(name);
      set((state) => {
        state.sessions.push(session);
        state.currentSession = session;
      });
      return session;
    },

    loadSession: (id) => {
      const session = get().sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
      if (session) {
        set((state) => {
          state.currentSession = session;
        });
      }
    },

    saveSession: async () => {
      const { currentSession } = get();
      if (!currentSession) return;

      currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();

      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      await db.put('sessions', currentSession);

      set((state) => {
        const index = state.sessions.findIndex(s => s.id === currentSession.id);
        if (index >= 0) {
          state.sessions[index] = currentSession;
        }
      });
    },

    deleteSession: async (id) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      await db.delete('sessions', id);

      set((state) => {
        state.sessions = state.sessions.filter(s => s.id !== id);
        if (state.currentSession?.id === id) {
          state.currentSession = null;
        }
      });
    },

    duplicateSession: (id) => {
      const original = get().sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
      if (!original) throw new Error('Session not found');

      const copy: PromptSession = {
        ...original,
        id: `session-${uuidv4()}`,
        name: `${original.name} (Copy)`,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        updatedAt: new Date(),
        isCompleted: false,
        uploadResult: undefined,
      };

      set((state) => {
        state.sessions.push(copy);
      });

      return copy;
    },

    renameSession: (id, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        const session = state.sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
        if (session) {
          session.name = newName;
          session.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    // Prompt operations
    updatePromptText: (text) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.promptText = text;
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    // Note operations
    addNote: (title, content) => {
      const note: PromptNote = {
        id: `note-${uuidv4()}`,
        title,
        content,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        attachedToLink: false,
      };

      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.notes.push(note);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    updateNote: (id, updates) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const note = state.currentSession.notes.find(n => n.id === id);
          if (note) {
            Object.assign(note, updates);
            state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
          }
        }
      });
    },

    deleteNote: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.notes = state.currentSession.notes.filter(n => n.id !== id);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    toggleNoteAttachment: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const note = state.currentSession.notes.find(n => n.id === id);
          if (note) {
            note.attachedToLink = !note.attachedToLink;
          }
        }
      });
    },

    // File operations
    addFile: (fileData, folderPath = '/') => {
      const file: PromptFile = {
        id: `file-${uuidv4()}`,
        ...fileData,
        folderPath,
      };

      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.files.push(file);
          addFileToFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, file, folderPath);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    moveFile: (fileId, newFolderPath) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const file = state.currentSession.files.find(f => f.id === fileId);
          if (file) {
            // Remove from old location
            removeFromFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, fileId);
            // Add to new location
            file.folderPath = newFolderPath;
            addFileToFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, file, newFolderPath);
            state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
          }
        }
      });
    },

    renameFile: (fileId, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const file = state.currentSession.files.find(f => f.id === fileId);
          if (file) {
            file.name = newName;
            updateInFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, fileId, { name: newName });
            state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
          }
        }
      });
    },

    deleteFile: (fileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.files = state.currentSession.files.filter(f => f.id !== fileId);
          removeFromFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, fileId);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    createFolder: (name, parentPath) => {
      const folder: PromptFolder = {
        id: `folder-${uuidv4()}`,
        name,
        path: `${parentPath === '/' ? '' : parentPath}/${name}`,
        children: [],
      };

      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          addFolderToFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, folder, parentPath);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    renameFolder: (folderId, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          updateFolderInFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, folderId, { name: newName });
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    deleteFolder: (folderId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          // Remove files in folder
          const folderPath = getFolderPath(state.currentSession.folderStructure, folderId);
          if (folderPath) {
            state.currentSession.files = state.currentSession.files.filter(f => !f.folderPath.startsWith(folderPath));
          }
          removeFolderFromFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, folderId);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    compressFile: (fileId, profileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const file = state.currentSession.files.find(f => f.id === fileId);
          if (file) {
            file.isCompressed = true;
            file.compressionProfile = profileId;
            state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
          }
        }
      });
    },

    // Drag-drop from main app
    addDragDropFile: (fileData, sourcePanelId) => {
      const file: PromptFile = {
        id: `file-${uuidv4()}`,
        name: fileData.name,
        size: fileData.size,
        type: fileData.type || 'application/octet-stream',
        source: 'drag-drop',
        sourcePath: fileData.path,
        sourcePanelId,
        folderPath: '/',
        isCompressed: false,
      };

      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.files.push(file);
          addFileToFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure, file, '/');
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    // Upload
    completeAndUpload: async () => {
      const { currentSession, selectedUploadProvider } = get();
      if (!currentSession) throw new Error('No active session');

      set((state) => {
        state.isUploading = true;
        state.uploadProgress = 0;
      });

      try {
        // Generate upload structure
        const uploadData = await prepareUploadData(currentSession);
        
        // Upload to selected provider
        let result;
        if (selectedUploadProvider === 'drive') {
          result = await uploadToDrive(uploadData, currentSession.name, (progress) => {
            set((state) => { state.uploadProgress = progress; });
          });
        } else {
          result = await uploadToGitHub(uploadData, currentSession.name, (progress) => {
            set((state) => { state.uploadProgress = progress; });
          });
        }

        // Update session
        set((state) => {
          if (state.currentSession) {
            state.currentSession.isCompleted = true;
            state.currentSession.uploadResult = {
              provider: selectedUploadProvider,
              folderPath: result.folderPath,
              shareLink: result.shareLink,
              rawLink: result.rawLink,
              uploadedAt: new Date(),
            };
          }
          state.isUploading = false;
        });

        return { shareLink: result.shareLink };
      } catch (error) {
        set((state) => {
          state.isUploading = false;
        });
        throw error;
      }
    },

    setUploadProvider: (provider) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedUploadProvider = provider;
      });
    },

    // UI
    openPromptManager: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isPromptManagerOpen = true;
        if (!state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession = createEmptySession('Untitled Session');
          state.sessions.push(state.currentSession);
        }
      });
    },

    closePromptManager: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isPromptManagerOpen = false;
      });
    },

    togglePromptManager: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isPromptManagerOpen = !state.isPromptManagerOpen;
        if (state.isPromptManagerOpen && !state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession = createEmptySession('Untitled Session');
          state.sessions.push(state.currentSession);
        }
      });
    },

    // Getters
    getSessionFiles: () => get().currentSession?.files || [],
    getFolderStructure: () => get().currentSession?.folderStructure || createDefaultFolder(),
    getTotalSize: () => {
      return get().currentSession?.files.reduce((sum, f) => sum + f.size, 0) || 0;
    },
    getAttachedNotes: () => {
      return get().currentSession?.notes.filter(n => n.attachedToLink) || [];
    },
  }))
);

// Helper functions for folder operations
function addFileToFolder(root: PromptFolder, file: PromptFile, path: string) {
  if (path === '/' || path === '') {
    root.children.push(file);
    return;
  }

  const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  let current = root;

  for (const part of parts) {
    const folder = current.children.find(c => 'children' in c && c.name === part) as PromptFolder;
    if (folder) {
      current = folder;
    }
  }

  current.children.push(file);
}

function addFolderToFolder(root: PromptFolder, folder: PromptFolder, parentPath: string) {
  if (parentPath === '/' || parentPath === '') {
    root.children.push(folder);
    return;
  }

  const parts = parentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  let current = root;

  for (const part of parts) {
    const found = current.children.find(c => 'children' in c && c.name === part) as PromptFolder;
    if (found) {
      current = found;
    }
  }

  current.children.push(folder);
}

function removeFromFolder(root: PromptFolder, fileId: string): boolean {
  const index = root.children.findIndex(c => !('children' in c) && c.id === fileId);
  if (index >= 0) {
    root.children.splice(index, 1);
    return true;
  }

  for (const child of root.children) {
    if ('children' in child) {
      if (removeFromFolder(child, fileId)) return true;
    }
  }

  return false;
}

function removeFolderFromFolder(root: PromptFolder, folderId: string): boolean {
  const index = root.children.findIndex(c => 'children' in c && c.id === folderId);
  if (index >= 0) {
    root.children.splice(index, 1);
    return true;
  }

  for (const child of root.children) {
    if ('children' in child) {
      if (removeFolderFromFolder(child, folderId)) return true;
    }
  }

  return false;
}

function updateInFolder(root: PromptFolder, fileId: string, updates: Partial<PromptFile>) {
  const file = root.children.find(c => !('children' in c) && c.id === fileId) as PromptFile;
  if (file) {
    Object.assign(file, updates);
    return;
  }

  for (const child of root.children) {
    if ('children' in child) {
      updateInFolder(child, fileId, updates);
    }
  }
}

function updateFolderInFolder(root: PromptFolder, folderId: string, updates: Partial<PromptFolder>) {
  const folder = root.children.find(c => 'children' in c && c.id === folderId) as PromptFolder;
  if (folder) {
    Object.assign(folder, updates);
    return;
  }

  for (const child of root.children) {
    if ('children' in child) {
      updateFolderInFolder(child, folderId, updates);
    }
  }
}

function getFolderPath(root: PromptFolder, folderId: string): string | null {
  if (root.id === folderId) return root.path;

  for (const child of root.children) {
    if ('children' in child) {
      const found = getFolderPath(child, folderId);
      if (found) return found;
    }
  }

  return null;
}

async function prepareUploadData(session: PromptSession): Promise<FormData> {
  const formData = new FormData();

  // Add prompt.txt
  const promptBlob = new Blob([session.promptText], { type: 'text/plain' });
  formData.append('prompt.txt', promptBlob, 'prompt.txt');

  // Add links.txt with notes
  const linksContent = generateLinksContent(session);
  const linksBlob = new Blob([linksContent], { type: 'text/plain' });
  formData.append('links.txt', linksBlob, 'links.txt');

  // Add files
  for (const file of session.files) {
    if (file.content) {
      formData.append(file.name, file.content, file.name);
    } else {
      // Placeholder for referenced files
      const placeholder = new Blob([`Reference: ${file.sourcePath || file.name}`], { type: 'text/plain' });
      formData.append(file.name, placeholder, file.name);
    }
  }

  return formData;
}

function generateLinksContent(session: PromptSession): string {
  let content = `Session: ${session.name}\n`;
  content += `Created: ${session.createdAt.toISOString()}\n`;
  content += `Files: ${session.files.length}\n\n`;
  
  content += `Attached Notes:\n`;
  for (const note of session.notes.filter(n => n.attachedToLink)) {
    content += `\n--- ${note.title} ---\n`;
    content += `${note.content}\n`;
  }

  content += `\nFile List:\n`;
  for (const file of session.files) {
    content += `- ${file.name} (${file.size} bytes) [${file.source}]\n`;
  }

  return content;
}

async function uploadToDrive(
  data: FormData, 
  sessionName: string,
  onProgress: (progress: number) => void
): Promise<{ folderPath: string; shareLink: string; rawLink?: string }> {
  // Implementation using Google Drive API
  // Create folder: Pro-MNT/SessionName/
  // Upload all files
  // Set permissions and get share link
  
  onProgress(50);
  
  // Mock implementation
  return {
    folderPath: `Pro-MNT/${sessionName}`,
    shareLink: `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/mock-folder-id`,
  };
}

async function uploadToGitHub(
  data: FormData,
  sessionName: string,
  onProgress: (progress: number) => void
): Promise<{ folderPath: string; shareLink: string; rawLink: string }> {
  // Implementation using GitHub API
  // Create repo or use existing
  // Upload files to Pro-MNT/SessionName/
  
  onProgress(50);
  
  // Mock implementation
  const path = `Pro-MNT/${sessionName}`;
  return {
    folderPath: path,
    shareLink: `https://github.com/user/repo/tree/main/${path}`,
    rawLink: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/user/repo/main/${path}/prompt.txt`,
  };
}

// Initialize DB
const initPromptDB = async () => {
  await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
    upgrade(db) {
      db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id' });
    },
  });
};

initPromptDB();
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/renameStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { RenameState } from '@/types/rename';
import { getEngineForConversion, needsConversion, getExtension } from '@/lib/conversionEngines';

interface RenameStore extends RenameState {
  // Actions
  startRename: (item: RenameState['renamingItem']) => void;
  updateNewName: (name: string) => void;
  cancelRename: () => void;
  confirmRename: () => Promise<void>;
  setConversionProgress: (progress: number) => void;
  openKeepReplaceDialog: (result: RenameState['pendingConversion']) => void;
  keepBoth: () => Promise<void>;
  replaceOriginal: () => Promise<void>;
  skipConversion: () => Promise<void>;
}

export const useRenameStore = create<RenameStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    renamingItem: null,
    newName: '',
    isConverting: false,
    conversionProgress: 0,
    conversionResult: null,
    showKeepReplaceDialog: false,
    pendingConversion: null,

    startRename: (item) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.renamingItem = item;
        state.newName = item.name;
        state.isConverting = false;
        state.conversionProgress = 0;
        state.conversionResult = null;
        state.showKeepReplaceDialog = false;
        state.pendingConversion = null;
      });
    },

    updateNewName: (name) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.newName = name;
      });
    },

    cancelRename: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.renamingItem = null;
        state.newName = '';
        state.isConverting = false;
        state.conversionProgress = 0;
        state.conversionResult = null;
        state.showKeepReplaceDialog = false;
        state.pendingConversion = null;
      });
    },

    confirmRename: async () => {
      const { renamingItem, newName } = get();
      if (!renamingItem) return;

      const oldExt = getExtension(renamingItem.name);
      const newExt = getExtension(newName);

      if (oldExt !== newExt && needsConversion(renamingItem.name, newName)) {
        set((state) => {
          state.isConverting = true;
          state.conversionProgress = 0;
        });

        try {
          const engine = getEngineForConversion(oldExt, newExt);
          if (!engine) {
            throw new Error('Conversion not supported');
          }

          if (!engine.isReady) {
            await engine.init();
          }

          const originalBlob = await getOriginalFileBlob(renamingItem);
          
          const convertedBlob = await engine.convert(
            originalBlob,
            oldExt,
            newExt,
            (progress) => {
              set((state) => {
                state.conversionProgress = progress;
              });
            }
          );

          set((state) => {
            state.isConverting = false;
            state.pendingConversion = {
              originalName: renamingItem.name,
              newName,
              originalBlob,
              convertedBlob,
            };
            state.showKeepReplaceDialog = true;
          });

        } catch (error) {
          set((state) => {
            state.isConverting = false;
            state.conversionResult = {
              success: false,
              message: (error as Error).message,
            };
          });
        }
      } else {
        await performSimpleRename(renamingItem, newName);
        get().cancelRename();
      }
    },

    setConversionProgress: (progress) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.conversionProgress = progress;
      });
    },

    openKeepReplaceDialog: (result) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.pendingConversion = result;
        state.showKeepReplaceDialog = true;
      });
    },

    keepBoth: async () => {
      const { pendingConversion, renamingItem } = get();
      if (!pendingConversion || !renamingItem) return;

      await saveFile(pendingConversion.originalBlob, pendingConversion.originalName, renamingItem);
      await saveFile(pendingConversion.convertedBlob, pendingConversion.newName, renamingItem);
      
      get().cancelRename();
    },

    replaceOriginal: async () => {
      const { pendingConversion, renamingItem } = get();
      if (!pendingConversion || !renamingItem) return;

      await deleteFile(renamingItem);
      await saveFile(pendingConversion.convertedBlob, pendingConversion.newName, renamingItem);
      
      get().cancelRename();
    },

    skipConversion: async () => {
      const { renamingItem, newName } = get();
      if (!renamingItem) return;

      await performSimpleRename(renamingItem, newName);
      get().cancelRename();
    },
  }))
);

async function getOriginalFileBlob(item: any): Promise<Blob> {
  switch (item.sourceType) {
    case 'storage':
      if (item.handle) {
        const file = await item.handle.getFile();
        return file;
      }
      break;
    case 'drive':
      break;
    case 'github':
      break;
    case 'terminal':
      break;
  }
  throw new Error('Cannot read file from source');
}

async function saveFile(blob: Blob, name: string, context: any): Promise<void> {
  console.log('Saving file:', name, 'Size:', blob.size);
}

async function deleteFile(item: any): Promise<void> {
  console.log('Deleting file:', item.name);
}

async function performSimpleRename(item: any, newName: string): Promise<void> {
  console.log('Renaming', item.name, 'to', newName);
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/searchStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import MiniSearch from 'minisearch';
import { openDB } from 'idb';
import {
  SearchState,
  SearchFilter,
  SearchResult,
  SearchIndexEntry,
  ExtensionStats,
  BoundPanel,
} from '@/types/search';
import Fuse, { IFuseOptions } from 'fuse.js';

interface SearchStore extends SearchState {
  // Search engine instances
  fuse: Fuse<SearchIndexEntry> | null;
  miniSearch: MiniSearch | null;
  
  // Actions
  initializeSearch: () => Promise<void>;
  setQuery: (query: string) => void;
  executeSearch: () => void;
  toggleFilterPanel: () => void;
  setFilters: (filters: Partial<SearchFilter>) => void;
  resetFilters: () => void;
  toggleGlobalMode: () => void;
  setBoundPanels: (panels: BoundPanel[]) => void;
  
  // Index management
  addToIndex: (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => Promise<void>;
  removeFromIndex: (ids: string[]) => Promise<void>;
  clearIndex: () => Promise<void>;
  scanSourceForExtensions: (sourceType: string, accountId: string, items: any[]) => Promise<void>;
  updateExtensionStats: (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Recent searches
  addRecentSearch: (query: string) => void;
  clearRecentSearches: () => void;
  
  // Getters
  getFilteredResults: () => SearchResult[];
  getExtensionSuggestions: (query: string) => ExtensionStats[];
  getTopExtensions: (limit?: number) => ExtensionStats[];
}

const DEFAULT_FILTERS: SearchFilter = {
  sources: ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'],
  accounts: [],
  extensions: [],
  type: 'all',
  includeHidden: false,
};

const FUSE_CONFIG: IFuseOptions<SearchIndexEntry> = {
  keys: [
    { name: 'name', weight: 0.5 },
    { name: 'path', weight: 0.3 },
    { name: 'extension', weight: 0.2 },
  ],
  threshold: 0.3,
  distance: 100,
  includeScore: true,
  includeMatches: true,
  minMatchCharLength: 2,
  useExtendedSearch: true,
};

const MINI_SEARCH_CONFIG = {
